name: Xuan-Yuan Sword 2
about_the_game: *** This game doesn't support English *** 本游戏附赠《轩辕剑》（仅支持繁体中文） 《轩辕剑》和《轩辕剑贰》是大宇资讯制作的两款剧情连续的角色扮演游戏，《轩辕剑贰》参考《山海经》和《博物经》等史料制作物品和道具，作品具有完全的中国味道，并确立了全系列的游戏特色与风格。 《轩辕剑贰》游戏画面是古香古色的中国画风，场景、接口、怪物等都使用水墨渲染风格，营造出一种古朴的画面美感，配上神话气息的世界观、饱满的剧情、巧妙的系统，一直以来都让玩家津津乐道。 游戏故事背景 盘古开天辟地之初，女娲神捏土为人、撮泥为兽，于焉万物始生。然女娲所造之高智慧生物中，又大致可分成两类：一类自称为 人类 。另一类被人类称为 妖魔 。 长久以来，两类族人争战不断，后来人类造出了一柄无比神奇的神兵利器，以黄帝之姓命名为 「轩辕剑」 。由于轩辕剑的出世，使得妖魔族顿时气焰大消，分化为主和派与主战派，分别被人类称为 「善神」 和 「恶神」 。 然而，原本与人类相近的善神一派，竟与恶神连手向人类展开一场大侵略，被善神出卖的人类全力抵抗，但大多数的人和妖魔在此一战中同归于尽…… 十七年后，初出茅庐的主角 何然 ，发现人类初现了一个帮派—— 轩辕帮 。该帮的宗旨在于斩妖伏魔，见妖就斩、见魔就砍，打破了人魔势力的均衡。此时一位自称「恶神」的妖魔挺身而出，带来了前所未见、凶猛残暴的妖魔，与人类轩辕帮形成对恃的局面。 何然在旅途中遇见了年纪与自己差不多，且满怀正义之心的年轻黑衣侠—— 杨坤硕 ，接着又认识从小在凤凰塔长大，且被妖咒附身的美丽小姑娘－ 江如红 ，三人在机缘之下巧遇，又难得年纪相当，于是便结伴同行，共闯江湖。《轩辕剑》故事于焉展开…… 游戏特色 奇术系统 奇术系统中包含了“神通”、“技巧”、“符咒”与“医术”等四大类。应用这四类奇术后，会消耗某些资料或物品，如“神通”与“符咒”会消耗施法者的仙术值，“技巧”会消耗应用者的体力值，“医术”会消耗物品栏的五类药材。游戏中还提供了所有奇术的表明文，能够在应用前先参照其用法。 属性系统 包括雷水、火风、五行、阴阳等属性，属性具有相生相克关系，影响术法杀伤力。 炼妖壶 传说此壶是远古时期女娲神创造世间生物的工具。后来女娲神将此壶留在凡间，关着无数危害凡间的危险妖怪，静静的隐藏在不为人知的地方…… 当主人公在游戏中拥有炼妖壶后，会在移动画面的' 物品'命令以及战斗画面中'行动'命令里多出'炼妖壶'的指令。战斗中可利用炼妖壶把生命力不足的敌方吸收进来，然后在战斗以外的时间应用炼妖壶组合吸收来的生物。但要重视合体出来的生物级别，若高过主人公太多时，壶中仙会因为主人公无法驾驭而拒绝合体。 关于附赠的《轩辕剑》 《轩辕剑》为DOMO工作室于1990年开发的《轩辕剑系列》起始之作。由于轩辕剑的开发过程期间，主开发人员蔡明宏需要去服兵役，因此整个故事被分成两个。亦因如此，轩辕剑和轩辕剑贰的人物相同，故事亦有连贯性。不过，因为发售时未达到原定开发的进度，轩辕剑中三名主角的名称直接取自当时正在热播电影《倩女幽魂》，直至二代改为原创名称。《轩辕剑》的系统相对《轩辕剑贰》更加简单，采用踩地雷遇敌模式，及回合制战斗。 *轩辕剑1剧情流程攻略 　　1.到朝阳城找县太爷交谈，再回去与师父交谈。 　　2.回到朝阳城，先与耍花枪女子旁的小孩交谈，再到城的右上角与小孩交谈三次，得到绳子。 　　3.在城内的水井使用绳子下去，在陆地通道平行的上边最左上角有隐藏的通道，进入后在最里面与真的县太爷交谈，得到官印。 　　4.出水井在县役前使用官印后，再杀掉虎妖，得到夜明珠。 　　5.到县城左边的山洞解救县太爷的儿子小宝，回去和县太爷交谈，得到令牌。 　　6.出县城往南走，使用权杖后至长春镇，再往南至凤凰塔，在第一层处遇宁采臣加入。 　　7.到凤凰塔最上层，打败小倩。 　　8.回长春镇，与客栈门口的和尚交谈，进入客栈休息，打败火凤凰即结束。 **小贴士：10级前建议仅在师父家门口附近练级。

Hyperun is a mix of driving skills, endurance, style and gravity defying roads. • The game is going really really fast. • Speed and Score international leaderboards. • Learn from the best by watching the replay of any leaderboard entry. • Advanced vehicle customization. • Color-blind-friendly colors • Instant pleasure: smooth and reactive user experience, no loadings. • Procedural tracks. Every race is unique. • Extreme motorcycle tricks for spectacular driving. Important note: Please be aware that due to the fast pace of Hyperun, objects may quickly flash on screen. Anyone with a history of photosensitive epileptic seizures please do not purchase or play this title as it may potentially lead to seizures. Game Design & Programing by @MatoLabu Music & Sound by @Tomavatars from Concrete Games Visuals by Loeiz from Gem Rose Accent With the help of Shin from Rocketwerkz

about_the_game: A clothing shop management sim. Go from quaint corner shop to world-class brand! Ever wanted to run your own clothing store? Now you can! Let your inner fashionista flower as you cultivate a quaint corner shop into a world-class super brand! Position mannequins, run promotions, even set up an in-store crepe stand. Dream up other ways to stand out so that shoppers can't stay away! Patrons will also rely on your fashion sense to coordinate ensembles for big occasions. Elevating their style level will unlock new career paths for them--meaning more revenue for you! Are you ready to try your hand at the trade of trend? ▼Game Flow First, build shelves to display your merchandise. Add fitting rooms and other fixtures to attract more shoppers. Replace sold stock by ordering more from manufacturers. The more you order, the friendlier they become. name: Watamari Part1 - A Match Made in Heaven
about_the_game: A never before seen style of yuri storytelling featuring high quality, Live 2D character sprites. Volume 1 in the Watamari series! Spies, a school for elite, young ladies, urban fantasy, science fiction. From Kuro Irodoru Yomiji, the developers of Ne no Kami: The Two Princess Knights of Kyoto comes this new yuri title filled with intrigue and drama. STORY Spring. Hoshino Hikari is a new transfer student to the prestigious St. Leanne Girl's Academy. While her transferring in is quite extraordinary, everyone is more interested in the ritual that takes place before the opening ceremonies. During this ritual, some students manifest signs of the zodiac, and then are given an angelic title and a blessing. These students are known as the Angels of the Zodiac, and are given the role of bringing fortune to the student body. Hikari, who is trying to not stand out in order to root out the school's secrets, is bestowed with the grace of Virgo during the ceremony and becomes known as 'Exousia'. 'But... but... why me...?' What is her connection to the other Zodiac? And what are the secrets hidden within the school? FEATURES Live2D animated character sprites that brings characters to life including each of their unique and cute mannerisms Yuri-focused UI that displays two character's feelings for each other as if reading a yuri manga Characters in this story are unleashed by the player! Even though each of the girls have their own lives, it isn't right that the player can only control the main heroine. A 'certain voice' will help you guide these girls forward. The choice is in their hands. Featuring beautiful artwork by many notable yuri manga artists! Hakuishi Aoi, tokeshi, Ukani Uka Full Japanese voice acting Voice Cast Hoshino Hikari: Hanashiro Kazari Saginomiya Konoe: Iwamoto Sayori Saginomiya Homare: Kanoko Yata Hime: Kitaouji Yuki ???: Kimura Chisa Ikaruga Gargouille Risette: Akiyama Haruru English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese language support Partial binaural audio support. Experience the game as if the girls are whispering into your ear. CHARACTERS Hoshino Hikari The main heroine of our story. A spy sent by the 'Agency' to discover the secrets hidden within St. Leanne Girl's Academy. Saginomiya Konoe The elder Saginomiya sister who became Student Council President during the Leonine Revolution. Saginomiya Homare The younger Saginomiya sister who supports her older sister's efforts to claim victory in the Student Council Presidential Election. Yata Hime A senior student who cares about Hikari and treats her well from time to time. ??? A mysterious existence that uses 'something' to guide the main heroine. Ikaruga Gargouille Risette A rival of Konoe's who went toe to toe with her during the Leonine Revolution.
