Contains jump out shock (cute)! And super cute Chinese dubbing! More scenes, more voice, more joy! Story background: Nyanbaba from the cat's ear planet came to earth in a flying saucer and burned his tongue with milk tea as soon as he landed. Angry nyambaba, she said she would retaliate against mankind with magic! Introduction to the game: This is a very scary (cute?) Looking for hidden item type click game! The game player plays the weak and stupid human, investigates suspicious hidden objects in various styles, and does not let Nyanbaba's magic trick succeed. Some of the hidden points are illogical or strange, and some may be ancient and strange big monsters (little cute?). Please find all hidden points within the time, otherwise the villain nyanbaba will jump out and scare the players with very, very scary (actually cute) Chinese voice! Playing methods and features: Lovely story setting, lovely art style, lovely Chinese dubbing. It contains 10 different scenes, and each scene contains 20 strange hidden points. Different from the traditional hidden goods game, it is not a reference comparison between the left and right of the two pictures, but a single picture, with a wider field of vision. After playing each scene repeatedly and accumulating 100%, the button to enter the second round mode will appear. Hidden points appear randomly in the first round, and all hidden points appear in the second round. Click error to deduct seconds. Deduct more seconds in the second round. Suitable for family fun of all ages. The rules are simple and there is no language understanding barrier. Hidden achievements are hidden in built-in secrets. Suitable for works, gifts for children and girlfriends, as well as all cat girl fans! Because the personal charm of cat girls may lead to mental retardation of some players, and the symptoms are deliberate failure. 超可愛的反派喵霸霸回來啦！這次喵霸霸入侵了10個全新的場景，找到全部奇怪的隱藏點，破解貓耳娘喵霸霸的幻術！ 含有跳出式驚嚇（賣萌）！以及超萌的中文配音！更多場景，更多語音，更多歡樂！ 故事背景： 来自猫耳娘星球的喵霸霸驾驶着飞碟来到地球，刚刚降落就在喝奶茶时烫伤了舌头。震怒的喵霸霸表示要用幻術對人類發起抱虎（報復）！ 遊戲介紹： 這是壹款非常可怕（可愛？）的尋找隱藏物品類型的點擊遊戲！ 玩家扮演弱小愚蠢的人類，在各種風格的場景中，調查可疑的隱藏物品，不讓喵霸霸的幻術得逞。 隱藏點有些是不符合邏輯或是奇怪的，有些可能是古靈精怪的大怪獸（小可愛？）。 請在時間之內找到所有隱藏點，否則大反派喵霸霸會跳出來，用非常非常恐怖（嗲萌嗲萌）的中文語音嚇唬玩家！ 玩法和特色： 反差萌的背景設定，可愛的美術風格，嗲萌的中文配音。 包含10個不同的場景，每個場景包含20個奇怪的隱藏點。 不同於大家來找茬，並非2個圖左右參照對比，而是單獨壹幅畫面，視野更加開闊。 反復遊玩每個場景積累到100%後，會出現進入二周目模式的按鈕。 壹周目隨機出現隱藏點，二周目出現全部隱藏點。 點錯會罰秒，二周目罰秒加重。 適合全年齡闔家歡。 規則簡單，無語言理解障礙。 隱藏成就藏在內置秘籍裏。 適合送給小朋友和女朋友，還有所有貓娘控！ 因為貓妖的個人魅力可能導致壹些玩家降智，癥狀表現為故意失敗。

name: Logic Town
about_the_game: 🧩 Logic Town is a relaxing coffee-break puzzle game based on Einstein Puzzles (AKA Zebra Puzzles). In each puzzle you must follow the clues to carefully eliminate answers until you've found the truth! 🔁 By procedurally generating every puzzle and solution, the game guarantees an endless supply of challenging Logic Puzzles that require no guesswork . 🏆 After beating the story, take to the free play mode and battle for the best times against other players. Or tweak the parameters of the custom puzzle generator and come up with puzzle recipe of your own. 🐰 The animals of Logic Town need your help! Solve the puzzles to help them redecorate!

name: SONOKUNI
about_the_game: Engage in up-close-and-personal combat against bizarre genetically mutated enemies. Attack, parry and bend time to your will to make it out clean on the other side. Fail and gain the wisdom needed to refine your strategy . Take on the role of Takeru, a lone assassin tasked with raiding a surreal superpower empowered by biotechnology. Join in her struggle to balance the morality of extreme violence against the defence of her own people, in a story inspired by real-life Japanese mythology . Let the intense hip hop soundscape and neon-soaked visuals assault your senses until they are raw. Every moment is punctuated with a visceral soundtrack from Japanese developer and hip hop group, DON YASA CREW .

name: Grisaia Chronos Rebellion
about_the_game: The newest installment in the Grisaia visual novel series. All of the girls from Mihama, past and present, must face off against a new evil terrorist organization in an all-out war. This installment of Frontwing's Grisaia series features writing by the author of 'ATRI -My Dear Moments-' Asta Konno, who is joining forces with the original writers of the first Grisaia game, 'The Fruit of Grisaia', and artwork by Watanabe Akio and many other famous illustrators! We hope you enjoy the newest game in Frontwing's Grisaia series! Story 'If you order me to, Master, I'll wipe out all of humanity.' SORD (Social Ops, Research & Development) is an agency that was established to recruit and train talented operatives for special anti-terrorism units. All kinds of misfit girls are enlisted in SORD's training schools. They are issued guns and live ammunition in the name of national defense, for that is the only way they could be granted a place in the world. Arata is the handler of Class D at Mihama Academy, a school for SORD. Class D is nicknamed 'Dead Stock', because it's full of third-rate students. In order to increase his students' chances of survival, Arata trains them using PeTS, an experimental neural signal synchronization technology. During one extrajudicial mission, he finds a mysterious girl sleeping inside an incubator at a terrorist hideout. As if drawn together by fate, Arata is able to sync with her using PeTS, and the two narrowly escape with their lives. The girl introduces herself as 'L', and Arata welcomes her into Class D. These events trigger the beginning of Class D's fight against the mysterious terrorist organization 'Hadeo.' This is a story of girls who, with nowhere else to go, have chosen the path of the gun...

name: Ritual Night
about_the_game: Hang out in 4-8 player online multiplayer lobbies with your friends or randoms who will soon become your friends. Join the party for one common goal: SUMMON CTHULHU . At least… if you are a monster. Deceive Your Friends To the few human operatives out there: this is your time to shine. Be an absolute menace: lie, sabotage, do everything you can to cause chaos! Remember: friends are temporary, stealing ritual fluid to make magical spells for profit - that is forever. Second Chances “ But guys, I’m terrible at social deduction games… ” Worry not, noob! Set your skill issue aside for there’s always a second chance in Ritual Night! Without early eliminations, the gameplay becomes more watchable and fun for everyone throughout! Refined Chaos Randomness and chaos being core, hidden roles are encouraged to create chaos and cause confusion instead of preventing information from leaking. Nothing in the game is a direct tell or leak of key information on who the imposter may be. Even if one imposter gets found out early in the game, the tools at their disposal are designed around the potential for causing maximum chaos to muddle that information. Roguelite, Upgrades, Emergence Roguelite elements such as procedurally generated props that spawns into the map or additional abilities given to the players as a consequence of their actions. He's coming... Join the effort of dominating regions deeply connected to the unfathomable horror that is about to unfold. Uncover secrets, ciphers, and lore that will one day all make sense. Until then? Enjoy the Party.

name: tiny Cats
about_the_game: In tiny Cats , step into a world of magic and mystery as a young magic girl exploring your late aunt's enigmatic mansion. This isn't just any old house—it's a place where spirits of cats are scattered, hiding in the shadows and waiting to be found. Each cat you save brings you closer to uncovering the mansion's secrets, as every spirit has a story to tell and a bond to form. But the mansion isn't just a home to lost spirits; it holds darker secrets and sinister forces that want the mysteries kept hidden forever. As you search every room and uncover clues, you'll confront these dark forces determined to keep the truth buried. Do you have what it takes to save the cats and unravel the mansion's mysteries before it’s too late? Tiny Cats isn't just a game; it's a journey of exploration, puzzle-solving, and magical discovery. With each chapter, encounter new surprises, challenging puzzles, and more cats to collect and purify. Find, save, and bond with these spirits, and uncover the truth that will set them free. Are you ready to reveal the secrets and become the hero these tiny cats desperately need?

name: Attack Core
about_the_game: In the future world, people live in the electronic network world, and data has become the most important thing. A new type of intelligent disguised virus invades and kidnaps various data, attempting to threaten and dominate the real world, putting the entire world on the brink of destruction, Humans are almost losing all data permissions, as a commander of special operations, your consciousness and attack code combine to enter the cyber electronic space and fight against the most difficult viruses, breaking through enemies and competing for the most important core data. ﻿ You combine with the entity that avatar the attack code and enter the cyber electronic space to fight against intelligent disguised viruses. Your commands will determine the future. ﻿ -6 uniquely charming characters -Free combination of over 60 module skills -Cracking modules during combat will randomly change, and controlling the number, combination, and timing of module usage is the most important ability in combat

name: DragonRoad
about_the_game: 'Dragon Road 'is an open world 3D game. and a mission centered survival and combat game. that includes gameplay such as role-playing, tactical strategy, player cooperation, mission monster fighting, and experience leveling. In the plot, Wang Yangming's philosophy of the mind is combined, and he learns Wang Yangming's sage thoughts while playing the game. The philosophy of the mind is also known as the Dragon Way.     The game has developed dozens of scenes and combat tasks, allowing players to complete the task step by step, get certain gold coins, experience and prestige rewards, and present certain precious weapons and mounts. While learning the survival instincts of fishing and fire, hunting and skinning, riding a horse and driving a boat, and using magic, the players also gradually improved the martial arts level and offensive and defensive abilities of the heroes in the Wulin.     The game also features four player avatars, and players can choose the corresponding avatar according to their preferences when starting the game. The four characters include two female generals and two grand marshals, each of which is lifelike and unique, and is worth players to try out one by one. The game also supports multiplayer collaboration to fight monsters. Currently, it supports up to four people in online games, with one person as the main player and others as auxiliary players, allowing for teamwork and joint completion of combat tasks. The background and plot of the story are as follows:     Billions of years ago, there was a huge dragon tribe on Earth that originated in the Himalayas and lived in nearby areas. The mountains were high and lush, with abundant food chains and activity areas with significant altitude differences, which led to the early evolution of this dragon tribe. People called them 'humanoid dragons'. As humanoid dragons continued to migrate to the Qinghai Tibet Plateau, the Central Plains, and the Hangzhou Jiaxing Huzhou Plain, their bodies slowly stood up and eventually evolved into the first humans: Dragon Cloud and Dragon Cloud.     In order to survive, Long Yun and Long Yun, as well as their descendants, gradually learned survival skills such as logging and fruit picking, medicinal and mining, hunting and fishing, and riding horses and boats. In order to survive better, humans constantly cut grass and wood to build grass houses and wooden fences, mine and iron to make agricultural tools and weapons. The residence has also been built from open-air group houses, with each unit consisting of rough grass houses to prevent wind and rain. I also learned how to make fire and roast animal meat from hunting and eating raw meat. Some tribes(such as Hemudu, Tianluoshan, etc.) even used ropes to tie knots and count, planted rice water chestnuts, and produced planters, blacksmiths, pharmacists, and shamans for worship.     The general trend of the world is that if it is divided for a long time, it will merge, and if it is merged for a long time, it will divide. As the saying goes, 'When things are extreme, they will reverse; when they are prosperous, they will decline.' This is the ultimate principle of heaven and earth, even if they are as powerful as the Tang Dynasty. In the Middle Ages, after the collapse of the Tang Dynasty, it ushered in the most chaotic and shortest period of 'Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms' in history. The country was plagued by war and chaos, and the people were struggling. After years of mutual warfare and annexation, there were still eight political regimes left: Later Jin, Later Shu, Nanping, Later Chu, Southern Tang, Wu Yue, Dali, and Southern Han.     Human beings were born to fight. In the Later Jin Dynasty, the cursed king had a vast territory and strong power, supported by the demonic forces led by the Eastern and Northern demonic sects, competing for power and fighting against the soldiers of the Kingdom of Pele. He defeated the soldiers of the Kingdom of Pele, imprisoned the Queen of Pele, and abducted the Little Prince Lett. The great hero Long Yun (Yun), who has traveled through the world, is the embodiment of the true dragon emperor Zhao Kuangyin. With the power of the 'Five Emperors Dragon Fist' and a coiled dragon stick, he travels throughout China, constantly conquering cities and territories to uphold justice and cleanse evil, demonstrating his heroic qualities and completing one mission after another.     I don't know who opened Pandora's Box and alarmed the demon race. The demon race, which had been sealed for thousands of years, smelled the fresh scent of human blood. For a moment, a demonic wind swept through the world, and various underworld ghosts, monsters, zombies, wooden corpses, ancient undead or ghosts appeared one after another. Especially at midnight, they hunted and killed humans in various dark mountains and forests, drank blood and breathed in. So, humans embarked on a game of killing and being killed with demons for thousands of years.     Finally, on Earth, another massive dragon clan suddenly appeared in the sand dune area deep in the forest. This dragon tribe originated from the Jurassic dinosaur tribe in the vast ocean hundreds of millions of years ago, evolving from the depths of the ocean to shallow seas and coasts. They narrowly escaped the mass extinction caused by forest fires on Earth and have recently crossed the Great Wall to the Central Plains to fight against humans in order to survive. In order to take control of the universe and dominate the Central Plains, humans have organized themselves and elected you as their leader, thus engaging in a prolonged territorial struggle with this dinosaur tribe.     What is the fate of humanity? What kind of changes will it bring to this world? Everything needs to be conquered to the fullest by the hero. Please embark on a new journey!

name: Matching Meadows
tags: Casual,Card Game,Puzzle,Strategy,Deckbuilding,Relaxing,Turn-Based Tactics,2D,Turn-Based Strategy,Isometric,Hex Grid,Board Game,Score Attack,Stylized,Atmospheric,Singleplayer,Nature,Building,City Builder,Logic
about_the_game: Matching Meadows is a deck-based puzzle game that combines the simple pleasures of building a vibrant city with challenging objectives. Build your own idyllic landscape! To reach the top of the leaderboards, you'll have to strategize and carefully plan ahead. City, nature and industry Will you create a peaceful village, or a bustling metropolis? Every card in your deck comes with its own unique objective to complete. Discover the perfect balance between city, nature and industry tiles to grow your city. Hone your skills through dozens of handcrafted levels and climb the leaderboards as your strategic prowess improves. Master your deck Besides containing a puzzle, each card has its own rarity, value, tile-type and side-effects to consider. Can you discover how to make the most of each hand you're dealt? Pool and Draft mode Matching Meadows contains two types of deckbuilding: Pool and Draft mode. In Pool mode, your deck of cards automatically evolves as you increase your score. In Draft levels, you're in control of which cards are added to your deck. Place cards to build a vibrant village or city Easy to pick up and play, challenging to master Strategic puzzles to solve with each card you play Master deckbuilding mechanics to perfect your strategies Seven distinct worlds containing 38 handcrafted levels Unique challenges and objectives for each level Leaderboards to climb versus friends and foes

name: Cozy Solitaire
about_the_game: Cozy Solitaire is a card game about kitties. It features classic Solitaire gameplay with thousands of selected deals. Enjoy a cozy art style and background music. Dozens of adorable kitties accompany you while you play. If you get tired, you can interact with the kitties as well. You can happily spend a few hours of leisure time.

name: 雨上がりのハナビィ Ameagari no Hanaby
about_the_game: Ameagari no Hanaby is a single-player 2D-action game with fireworks as a theme. FEATURES Unique worlds : as if she travels, Hanaby goes round a wide variety of worlds. Fantastic musics : Mr. AAAA's new composed dedicated BGM is prepared in each world. Mild story: you don't have to brace for melancholy and can enjoy the game purely. Operability: it's a simple jump-action game. It will take less than a minute to remember all basic operations. Fireworks: not only to hit enemies but to be used by gliding... New exhilaration feeling is here. Input: it supports both keyboard and gamepad. Key mapping function for gamepad is embedded in the game. Load/Save: There are three independent save files. The progress of the game and possessed items are automatically saved. Game mode: there are the story mode and the speedrun mode. The speedrun mode will be released after you finished story mode. STORY Hanaby is a squirrel-girl living in Retro Rainforest . Squirrels in this forest must become ‘adult’ to leave the forest. Hanaby will challenge the ordeal of forest to become an ‘adult’.

name: Meow Time Machine: Munch
about_the_game: Breaking the Shackles of the Soul: Munch's Spiritual World This is an immersive hidden object puzzle game that takes you through time and space to explore the tumultuous inner world of expressionist master Edvard Munch. From the shadows of childhood to the birth of 'The Scream,' from European travels to the tranquility of his later years, each step is an exploration into the depths of the soul. Journey of the Soul Embark on a five-chapter spiritual journey, from Munch's painful childhood to his artistic awakening, from artistic exploration in Paris and Berlin to the shocking birth of 'The Scream,' and finally to the peaceful contemplation of his later years. In each carefully designed scene, you will collect items intimately connected to Munch's life, piecing together the spiritual puzzle of an artistic giant. Unique Gaming Experience Beautifully Painted Scenes : Reinterprets the life stages of the expressionist master in an adorable style Delicate Emotional Exploration : Experience the artist's inner turbulence at a cold Nordic window, Parisian art salons, and Oslo fjord boardwalks Fun Tasks : Join Munch's feline companions to collect scattered special items and uncover hidden stories Art History Exploration : Learn about the origins and development of expressionist art in the game, and feel Munch's profound influence on modern art Game Features Five carefully designed chapters, each telling a key stage in Munch's life Over 30 unique scenes, from 19th century Norway to European art centers Dozens of key collectible items Side quests brought by cat companions Immersive puzzles that blend art history knowledge with emotional experiences Game Instructions This is a small hidden object puzzle game with five chapters, with a total gameplay time of approximately 1-2 hours. Click on the left and right sides of the book to turn pages Press esc to exit the game The overall difficulty of the game is not high

name: I commissioned some bees (advent)
tags: Hidden Object,Snow,Relaxing,Family Friendly,Abstract,Hand-drawn,Music,Cartoon,Atmospheric,Nature,Fantasy,Colorful,Puzzle,Design & Illustration,Comic Book,Creature Collector,Cute,Indie,2D,Point & Click
about_the_game: A hidden object game where you must find all the bees to complete each level. Advent edition! 🎁🔒📅 During December, a new artwork unlocks each day leading up to Christmas day (25 Dec). This is optional and can be disabled. Key features: 🐝 2500+ bees 🖼️ 25 unique artworks 💡 ∞ Unlimited hints if you get stuck ♻️ Restore a small number of bees to a painting so you can find them again! 🍯 Additional bee related objects to find 🎵 Music and ambiance for each artwork 🏆 Achievements ⌨️ Use your keyboard to move/zoom in if you have no scroll wheel 💾 3x save slots 🗑️ Reset progress entirely and play again 🕒 Timer included to show how long you took to complete each level 🎁 New level unlocked each day (optional). Context: The brief was simple. I commissioned artists to create a fantasy Christmas/winter world, and hide as many bees as they can inside it. Now it’s your job to find them all! With 25 art pieces to choose from, and 2500+ bees, you will have a lot of searching to do. Controls: Use your mouse to move around the image and zoom in / out. When you find a bee, click it and it will disappear. You can also use WASD to move and the arrow keys to zoom. Difficulty: A full range of difficulty is included, but all levels start unlocked*, your progress is saved as you play, and you can use hints if you get stuck. Get immersed: Each painting has its own music and ambiance to help you connect with the world, as you search for all the bees. Replayable You can restore a small number of bees back into a painting so you can find them again! It’s much harder when there are only a few bees left (especially randomly). You can also use up to 3 save slots so you can replay without progress loss. Alternatively, you can reset your progress for the entire game if you’d like to start over. *This is the ADVENT edition of the game. During December, all levels will lock. Each day, a new level will unlock (during 1 Dec to 25 Dec). You can disable this in the settings to immediately unlock all the levels.

name: Cyberdrome
about_the_game: Cyberdrome is a fast-paced, first-person cyberpunk action game where you use a high-tech sword to compete in deadly arena combat against waves of drones Features * Play as a cyber ninja god in first person. Slash through drones, jump up multiple stories and slow down time to perform stylish kill streaks. * Three dynamic arenas for unique battle experiences * Challenge yourself by mastering combos and aerial combat to maximize your score Note: This short game was created by a small student team at SMU Guildhall over a development cycle of 15 weeks. Additional development to extend the game is not currently planned beyond its academic completion. If you have questions regarding this title, please email sstringer@smu.edu.

name: Anime Holidays
about_the_game: Anime Holidays - is a puzzle game where you need to assemble a complete image from several pieces. Assemble one big image from small images and you will be able to move to a new level as well as enjoy already assembled images in a special gallery. Features: Size range from 9 to 25 pieces Simple mouse control Traditional logical gameplay Steam Achievements Credits: The game was created using Clickteam Fusion 2.5! Music by Erwarda Savitnaag.

name: Train Bandit
about_the_game: THE LAW!! Looks to be a showdown atop a train. This will be your last fight. Good luck, Train Bandit. WHAT IS THIS GAME? Train Bandit is a simple score attack game. The Law will attack you from both sides. Your weapon is your keyboard. You'll use those keys to kick the living shit out of the law. React quickly by attacking the correct direction. React...or you're dead. THE FEATURES Unlock new bandits Earn Achievements Become Steam's Most Wanted ? Battle elite officers Kick the law's ass

name: Monster United
about_the_game: This game combines tower climbing and auto-battler gameplay, making it easier for piece synthesis and upgrades, thus allowing various lineups to form more easily. Players can effortlessly experience the fun of satisfying victories in this game! The game offers a rich variety of content: over 60 chess pieces with different attribute skills, more than 30 types of enemy units, as well as a massive amount of equipment, alliances, and enhancement talent systems. Despite the diverse lineup strategies, players do not need to memorize all the alliances and other content deliberately. The game difficulty progresses gradually, making it very beginner-friendly, easy to pick up, and allowing players who have never played auto-battler games to enjoy the fun effortlessly. With a variety of gameplay modes and diverse challenge modes, each mode has its own unique features. The exquisite and detailed game graphics, along with lively and fun animation effects, create a vibrant and entertaining game world for players to immerse themselves in.

name: CosmoPirates
tags: Roguelike Deckbuilder,Deckbuilding,Card Game,Rogue-like,Card Battler,Exploration,Rogue-lite,Pirates,Turn-Based Tactics,Character Customization,Procedural Generation,RPG,Space,Comedy,Singleplayer,Colorful,Strategy,Turn-Based Combat,Turn-Based Strategy,Sci-fi
about_the_game: CosmoPirates takes the card battling, deck building genre to the final frontier of cartoonish comedy in the endless, colorful space! Explore the galaxy, chose your battles, grow your forces and build your ultimate deck to take on the dreaded CosmoPirates overlord... and take their place! EXPLORE THE GALAXY! With each run, the game presents you with a new, procedurally-generated galaxy full of bounty, danger, oddball characters, and high adventure. You will explore it freely taking on the challenges and quests in the order you think is best. Be cautious or daring - your crew looks up to you for the winning strategy! BUILD YOUR DECK! Gadgets, weapons, gambits, and strategems - each card can change the tide of battle. Find them while exploring, buy them, win them in combat, and make sure you figure out the best combos and synergies. Will you lick a battery to gain extra power, or read comic books for extra action points? In CosmoPirates your destiny takes you on a quest to rise to power and put an end to the great pirate overlord's reign of terror. The overlord must die! Die! DIE! As soon as they do, you take their place, effectively ending your run. The next time you play, you'll be up against your previous character, with all the power they acquired in the previous run. HELP US MAKE COSMOPIRATES GREAT! This game was crafted by two passionate developers. We invite you to share your thoughts, ideas, and any issues you encounter. Your feedback is invaluable to us, and we are dedicated to making CosmoPirates the best it can possibly be!

name: GRAPPIN
about_the_game: HOOK INTO ADVENTURE Experience the thrill of adventure and put to the test your climbing and platforming skills in GRAPPIN, the first-person adventure game that takes you to new heights. EXPLORE THE UNKNOWN After a mysterious awakening, you discover the Grip, an artifact that serves as your grappling hook. Your mission is clear: return the Grip to the Grip Shrine, located at the summit of the highest mountain. CLIMB TO NEW HEIGHTS Navigate through challenging environments and overcome obstacles as you journey to the top of the mountain. From blazing hot lava caves to treacherous ridges, you'll need to master the use of your grappling hook to survive. As you explore, uncover more than 50 Relics to unravel the mystery surrounding the Grip and the mountain. KEY FEATURES Explore a variety of unique and colorful environments as you climb to the top of the mountain. Get to face the harshness of nature! Uncover the mystery surrounding the Grip by collecting over 50 hidden Relics scattered on your way up to the mountain. Lush soundtrack composed by Benoît Malis. GRAPPIN is fully compatible with Steam Deck. GRAPPIN DELUXE EDITION Enhance your GRAPPIN experience with the Deluxe Edition, which includes the official soundtrack featuring close to an hour of original music, as well as the full game at a discounted price compared to buying them separately.

name: Beers and Boomerangs
about_the_game: Kangaroos are trying to steal your beer! Throw boomerangs in VR to survive the wildlife chaos. Cook for your mates, and save your Aussie BBQ! Have increasingly perilous BBQs where you survive against different animals, in different scenarios and cook different food! Features: 🤹🏼Cool physics.🤹🏼 🦘Annoying Australian fauna.🐨 🌠Very satisfying boomerang trajectories🌠. 🥕Vegetarian options🥦. 🕹️Boss Fights!🕹️. 👾Infinite Arcade!👾.

name: Darkanoid
about_the_game: Easy to learn, hard to become a master. Darkanoid is a 21st century update of the challenging, frantically paced block-breakers of old. Enter the void and fight your way through a hardcore gaming experience from the heyday of action arcade games. The game features two main modes. Classic mode is a painful trial in the best tradition of the genre. There are currently 40 levels and 4 Bosses. This will prove more than enough if you're willing to move beyond the easiest difficulty. Choose from 3 different levels of difficulty - Noob, Padawan and Master. How much of a challenge you are looking for? In order to give you some hope of victory, we've included 11 different special effects and power-ups . Some will make the game easier, some will be challenging to use, and one will be dangerous even to you. Your firegun and shield will be your main tools in Darkanoid. To give you an idea of the harshness of space, we've also added Teleports and Flying Blocks. What would you say to a double-platform on the BONUS levels ? BONUS levels are located at the other end of a wormhole, but of course it's not *that* easy. First you must find the chip key and defeat the boss guarding the wormhole. Black Zone engineers worked for many cycles to provide Cosmic Aid, a second chance for your platform if things don't go smoothly. Visit the Store to customize your platform with a unique upgrade. Of course for all these improvements, you'll need Darkens, which are hidden inside the hardest blocks and on BONUS levels. In Survival mode, you must break through a wave of blocks, drones and bosses, all moving towards you. Your task is to survive as long as possible. You start with one life, and can only earn additional lives by defeating a Boss. Will you survive to approach the outer limits of the Dark Zone? Survival mode also includes two unique power-ups : Entropy and Kelvin Zero. In a nutshell: - 2 game modes - 40 levels in Classic mode - adaptive wave system in Survival mode - 3 levels of difficulty in Classic mode - 11 different power-ups available – hit them and they'll activate immediately - Teleports and Drones to increase the challenge - BONUS levels available in Classic mode - platform shield with one-click activation - default firegun, plus three big weapons to unlock - unique resource – Darkens - 13 skins, each with its own upgrade - Steam achievements

name: Dolls
about_the_game: Escape from this dark dimension and return to reality! On an ordinary day, a student is suddenly and mysteriously transported to a parallel reality: an abandoned place immersed in darkness. Surrounded by sinister dolls and with no sign of human life, her mission is clear: find a way out of this nightmare and return to the real world. 'Dolls' is a first-person horror game that immerses the player in a dark environment filled with dimly lit corridors and disturbing sounds. Discover the hidden secrets in this macabre setting and unravel the mysteries behind this terrifying experience. Be careful in the dark, there may be beings who do not welcome your presence! Amidst the shadows and wreckage of this abandoned place, it is essential to remain vigilant, as dangerous creatures roam the dark corridors, sensing your presence. Proceed with extreme caution and avoid looking back at all costs. Try to escape as quickly as possible before going insane in the darkness. Explore the darkness, solve puzzles, and run to find an exit, but this won't be an easy task, as the inhabitants of this dimension are keenly aware of your presence! And uncover all the secrets of this shadowy place. What is this place? Who are these dolls? How did I end up here? Embark on the exploration and unravel the mysteries of this dark reality while searching for an exit. Game Features See the game world through the eyes of the main character, providing an immersive first-person experience. Enjoy a heavy and ominous atmosphere that keeps the tension at its peak, immersing you in horror. Navigate detailed environments and explore eerie locations to uncover secrets and find essential items. Immersive and unsettling sounds heighten the suspense and fear throughout the game. Uncover a compelling story while unraveling the mysteries of the alternate reality.

name: Gigapocalypse
about_the_game: As a little kid, picking up your dragon toys, spewing fire, feels powerful and destroying everything is one of the best childhood memories for many of us. Now you become that giant monster in Gigapocalypse , a 2D pixel art destruction game, inspired by classical Kaijū movies such as “Godzilla” and “King Kong” and the game classic “Rampage”. Gigapocalypse features a selection of different “Gigas” from the Prehistoric era, the uncharted outer space and the forgotten history. Each with unique skills, mutations and manifold skins that can be unlocked with level ups. Start your destruction spree and destroy everything on your way through different beautifully detailed pixel style locations. Ever wondered how it looks like when a giant monster destroys a wild west town? Or clashing against the brave Knights Templar? Gigapocalypse has the answer. But beware: Nasty soldiers, wizards, drones and mechs will do everything to stop you! With each try your Giga will become more powerful until you will finally make it to the diversified, epic boss fights that await you at the end of each level. Complete quests, take care of your Giga in Tamagotchi-style mini games, find secrets to upgrade your Giga and its “home” and unlock cute, but yet lethal pets that accompany you on journey. Gigapocalypse is loud, punk, metal, anarchy and a lovely homage to the game and movie classics. It´s a game for the kid in all of us. Nine Gigas with unique abilities and skill trees Six beautifully detailed stages based on earth's past, present and future timeline Themed enemies and buildings Epic and hilarious boss fights Unlockable minions, skills, and mutations Extra quests and secrets to unlock more abilities for your monsters Fast-paced arcade action with simple controls Satisfying visual destruction in cute pixel art style A heavy metal soundtrack to perfectly complement the chaos Razer Chroma support

name: Impasse Journey ~ Kaohsiung Chapter ~
tags: Adventure,Interactive Fiction,Dating Sim,Visual Novel,2D Platformer,2D,Cute,Anime,Cinematic,Dystopian,Futuristic,Post-apocalyptic,Alternate History,Historical,Dark Comedy,Dark Humor,Story Rich,Multiple Endings,Female Protagonist,Singleplayer
about_the_game: Synopsis In the year 20XX, the Taiwan Strait War erupted, igniting a massive conflict, and a prolonged stalemate has brought about its first mushroom cloud to end the world, but the outcome of the battle is still in question. Thirty years later, Taiwan has split into multiple autonomous regions of various sizes. Although the world is silent, humanity is still striving to build a new world amidst the ruins. As the protagonist, Yang Qiongqi, you will embark on a post-apocalyptic journey to fulfill a promise to your father. Your first stop is Kaohsiung in which you are dragged into an ongoing feud between the government military and a militia force. How you resolve it will depend on your decisions... This is a choice-based story of hope as you search for a new life amidst the ruins of a post-apocalyptic world. The cast “Suppose one day, my actions are going to clash with your ideals, would you still support me?” The protagonist who has decided to embark on her journey to search for the truth. Quiet and reserved, she has that unapproachable presence about her, or maybe, she is actually a sentimental girl. “No, I came here to fulfil my dreams, and prove that I didn't make a wrong decision.” A young girl who joined the militia to pursue her dreams, hoping for the day when someone could actually understand her, and Qiongqi's arrival has brought about an actual change in her. “The truth still hurts a little...” A young girl who has been brought up by the locals in Taiwan, and stayed on the island after the war. As the militia force's vice captain, she has impressive leadership qualities, and always diligent in her duties despite her inaptitude in warfare. “So, we have to use peaceful and rational iron fists to shatter those stupid dreams. It's quite simple, actually.” A young girl who is nearly forgotten as an underground dweller when she used to live in the canals below Kaohsiung. She is willing to give her all to help the person she loves to fulfil his dreams. Could she soldier on in her illusory dream bubble? “Is this line only used by villains? What a joke.” As an influential envoy from Yunlin-Chiayi-Tainan Autonomous Zone, this young girl has come to Kaohsiung to resolve the ongoing feud, although she does not seem to care too much about it. Perhaps she is simply looking for some spice in her life. “Before we clashed, we have worked together for a long time, so we're bound to have that camaraderie between us.” The mayor's most trusted secretary, and an indispensable part of the government military. She has been pushing hard for peace because the most important goal in her life is to stop the war that ended long ago. Game Features 1Multiple options, your choices in battle will lead you to defeat the enemies. 2.Over 300,000 words of storyline. 3.Descriptions of the local culture and landscape of Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Cafe Master Story
about_the_game: Have you ever wanted to run your own coffee shop? The smell of fresh roast beans, the gurgling of the espresso machine, the sheen of a squeaky-clean counter... All this and more await you in this quirky sim game! Just set up your tables and counter seats, and wait for the customers to come rolling in. Add handy features like magazine racks, or chic furnishings to give your cafe a more welcoming atmosphere. Coffee and tea are just the beginning—there's a whole world of hot and cold drinks out there just waiting to be discovered! Try out different combinations to make your regulars happy, or attract new customers. You can even recommend your favorites via the Specials Board. Feel like a little something on the side? Combine food items with drinks to create Combo Meals. These can also be entered into contests—pick the right meal for the right theme, and you're sure to win it big and make your cafe even more popular! You're not just limited to one town, either. You can move your cafe to several new locations and discover new customers. You may even encounter some familiar faces... So, what are you waiting for? Grab an apron, boil up some water, and get started on your journey to becoming a five-star cafe!

name: Guns N' Runs
about_the_game: Add to your wishlist to support us ♥ In Guns N’ Runs, you take control of 8 skillful members of the Conspiracy Squad, in a stylish platform game, action and shooter, totally drawn by hand in pixel art, where time is the primordial factor at the battle against a prodigy technopath and his army of robots. Help our protagonists in the invasion of a bunker in the middle of the Atacama desert, in a capture and rescue mission full of challenges and dangers. Made for one player, with over 200 challenges, 23 bosses and focused on the individual narrative of each of the squad members. The controls are simple and accessible - you can jump, shoot, dash and use the special - but make no mistake! The game possesses layers of difficulty that require a greater depth of skills to advance to the next levels. In this game, you will learn a new lesson with each death. Use a variety of weapons, protect yourself with a shield, recover your dash to utilize it in sequence, destroy some enemies with a strengthened dash (if you found) and enjoy every second of the game with an original soundtrack that will leave you excited with each new stage. So, prepare yourself to die several times and overcome your limits.

name: Doodle Adventure of Chameleon
about_the_game: 'Doodle adventure of Chameleon' is a hand-drawn doodle-style hardcore side-scrolling platformer game. You'll play as a chameleon born from a young boy's imagination. By using your color-switching abilities, you can alter the elements of the game world as you navigate through different flat worlds, such as a sketchbook, a blackboard, and a storybook. As you tackle challenging levels, you'll gradually enter the boy's inner world and help him overcome the challenges of growing up. Childhood hand-drawn doodle style This game captures the brushstrokes of childhood doodles, taking you back to an imaginative time when you could savor the simple joys and dreams of your early years. Fun gameplay mechanics centered around color-changing You need to make clever use of the chameleon's color-switching ability by freely switching between red, yellow, and blue colors to alter the elements in the game world. You must skillfully combine wall climbing, jumping, sprinting, and other actions to solve a series of puzzles. Unique level settings and puzzles As you progress through the levels and shift between the different flat worlds, new scene mechanics and puzzles will emerge, creating an enjoyable synergy with the color-switching gameplay. Enjoy the thrill of precise timing and route planning! Additionally, the game features a chalkboard-style with chalk drawings and familiar elements such as math formulas, timetables, and classroom assignments. In these entertaining scenes, the chameleon embarks on a joyful adventure.

name: Movie Cinema Simulator
about_the_game: Sell tickets to customers that want to watch movies in your cinema! Manage your own cinema in this first-person simulation game! Defend your Cinema from Thugs and Troublemakers! Discover the following features in Movie Cinema Simulator : ♦ Collect 20+ movies to show in your cinema 🎬 ♦ Decorate your cinema in your own style 🎀 ♦ Upgrade your cinema to welcome more customers 🍿 ♦ Increase your cinema’s rating to attract special customers 👩👨 ♦ Kick out thugs and delinquents who bothers your cinema 💪 ♦ Keep your cinema clean 🧹 ♦ Explore the big and mysterious city 🏙 ♦ Decorate your house to be as pretty as possible 🏠 ♦ Play minigames to get special rewards 🏀 ♦ Recruit employees to help serve the customers 👩‍🍳👮‍♂️ ♦ A first-person gameplay with lots of surprises to make your experience fun and exciting 🌟 ♦ Complete achievements to get numerous rewards 🎁 ♦ Follow the main story to return your grandfather’s cinema back to its glory days ✨ ♦ Do side quests and get to know with the town citizen🎉 ♦ It’s an offline game, so you don’t need an internet connection to play 👏

name: Brink of Consciousness: The Lonely Hearts Murders
about_the_game: HOW FAR WILL YOU GO TO SAVE YOUR ONLY DAUGHTER'S LIFE? Is there a limit? Help Owen Wright rescue his daughter from the clutches of the Lonely Hearts Killer, the mysterious figure who kidnaps and murders people who have suffered a love gone wrong. Unravel the intrigue and put a stop to the whirlwind of crime that has paralyzed this late 19th century British city. The killer must be stopped so justice can be done! Features: Discover the clues! Amazing Hidden Object game-play, tricky puzzles and mini-games. Explore a 19th century English city, amazing Victorian homes and meet an intriguing cast of characters! Stop a demented mind and end the killing spree! Save Olivia before it's too late! The Collector's Edition includes; A bonus chapter with a surprising plot An integrated strategy guide Downloadable soundtrack, concept art and wallpapers An interview with the developers

name: Barro T23
about_the_game: Barro T23 is the new generation of Barro, now with a new style of race tracks but, with the good old toy car/ go kart arcade style! 2 types of trucks 21 new race tracks Improved time trial (Leaderboard lap-by-lap | Fight for your position in real time!) Single player Up to 4 players local split screen Up to 10 cars on the grid

name: 混世萌王喵霸霸 Cute Chaos Demon Nyanbaba
tags: Funny,Casual,Cute,Comedy,Female Protagonist,Hand-drawn,Investigation,Point & Click,Exploration,Indie,Clicker,Hidden Object,Anime,Creature Collector,Minimalist,Family Friendly,Psychological Horror,Puzzle,Horror,Logic

Angry nyambaba, she said she would retaliate against mankind with magic! Introduction to the game: This is a very scary (cute?) Looking for hidden item type click game!
