name: Graze Counter GM
tags: Bullet Hell,Action,Shoot 'Em Up,Anime,Arcade,Pixel Graphics,Casual,Female Protagonist,2D,Indie,Cute,Singleplayer,Sci-fi,Mechs,Difficult,Shooter,1990's,Dark Fantasy,Lore-Rich,Story Rich
about_the_game: Overview A refreshing and highly re-playable bullet hell style shooter that WANTS you to play dangerously! 'Graze' past enemy bullets to charge your 'Graze Counter', then unleash it upon your enemies as a highly deadly attack! Ride the razor's edge of life and death in this high-risk high-reward danger oriented arcade style shooting game. Story It is the 23rd century. EDEN, the massive virtual reality network witch helped humankind to flourish, suddenly severed all contact with the outside world...Leaving the minds of its 100 million users trapped inside. A covert special task force known as 'Saviours' has been called in to address the situation. Using special attack programs modeled after fighter jets, they plan to delve into the deepest cores of EDEN and find who or what has set it haywire. There's no telling what they may discover within the troubled space of this human created universe... Characters Uzuki Ginyose Male pilot of the [APRIL DIVIDER] attack program. He may look like a girl, but he's dressed that way for specific combat reasons. Plus he doesn't really mind how it feels either... Satsuki Furuyama Pilots the [FREEDOM DANCER] attack program. Male turned into a female as the result of an ill-fated human experiment. Uzuki's best friend who always has his back. Hayate Katori Pilot of the [REVOLGEAR] program. A world renowned genius programmer in real life with a strong connection to EDEN. Kiriko Kirisame Pilot of the [KIRISAME BLADE] program and master of short range firepower. Yandere girl who is secretly in love with Uzuki. Striae The Mysterious entity that has taken control of the virtual world [EDEN]. Who or what she is remains to be discovered... Gameplay A top-down scrolling 2D shooting game where you charge your gauge by getting dangerously close to enemy fire, then unleash it as a powerful enemy obliterating 'Graze Counter'! Each ship has a 'Counter Gauge' that charges by being in close proximity to enemy bullets. You then use this charge to unleash powerful attacks.Destroying enemies with these special attacks gives you stars which are collected and used to build the 'Break Gauge'.Once the break gauge reaches MAX, you can activate 'Break Mode' for a temporary yet intense firepower boost! Test the limits of your destructive power with these highly deadly counter techniques! Features 7 total stages consisting of 5 stages + 2 alternate stages. Including a continuous 'All Stages' mode. 4 difficulty levels. 4 unique story modes featuring fun interactions between the game's variety of characters. Upgraded graphics and additional illustrations not in the original game. Flexible input system that supports any combination of mouse and Keyboard or gamepad. 2 default ship types + 14 unlockable types totaling 16 to choose from! Including popular STG loving Vtubers Hatsuki Hachimiya and Tomoko Machinery as playable guest ships! As well as 2 more playable guest ships from two other (soon to be released) Henteko Doujin published titles GRAND CROSS: ReNOVATION and Blue Sabers: Early Mission ! Boss rush mode featuring all bosses, and a bonus extreme difficulty stage. 30 part mission mode that teaches you the tips and tricks of the game as you play. Archive Mode where you can view illustrations and game world lore that unlocks as you progress through the game. Features a remastered version of the original game's highly rated soundtrack including a brand new song! Includes the bizarre bonus mini game 'Laser Maidens 2'.

name: TTV3
about_the_game: TTV3 is the third volume of the retro hardcore maze wanderer minigame series Trip to Vinelands Exit the screen avoiding vines, blades, and spikes. Made by the same developer of the arcade series UBERMOSH, TTV3 brings a reflex-based challenge with original audio and art.

name: El Tango de la Muerte
about_the_game: Argentina, 1923 Martita’s birthday is soon, and Luciano still doesn’t know how to do the Tango! You must help him learn to dance, and win the heart of Martita, the love of his life. Each song will teach you new steps that’ll help you improve your score, earn more stars, and master each song in this FAST and CASUAL RHYTHM game, set in the twilight of the Tango era. Features Easy to pick up and learn – Anyone can learn how to play the game in seconds! Move Luciano in four directions, one tile at a time, or sliding through several at a time – always following the rhythm of the song. Each new song brings a new move you can learn. Master them to increase your score! Play through an epic story full of love – and melodrama – set in the era of Tango, as no one has ever done before! A soundtrack with 13 modern day Tango songs performed by Latin American band, YIRA. Extra features include Classic Mode, and special Challenges for each song. And we can’t forget the (very annoying) cats!

name: Castle Doombad Classic
about_the_game: BAD IS BACK! Castle Doombad is the treacherous strategy / Tower Defense puzzler where you play the villain and must defend against the pesky heroes so-rudely invading your evil lair. This Classic edition includes the original Castle Doombad from 2014 ,  newly rebuilt and remastered from the ground up, plus the addition of brand-new content and features. IT'S GOOD TO BE BAD! Slay the good guys with your choice of over two dozen delightfully devious traps and minions! Strategically mix-n-match your arsenal with wicked weapons that fire automatically and manually-activated traps that require precision timing to pack a painful punch! Unlock and upgrade your traps, troops, and castle on your quest to become the baddest of them all! TWO WAYS TO SLAY! Break Bad and defend your dark domain across 75 puzzling stages, or take on the nefarious new roguelite mode: Dr. Lord Evilstein's Roguevenge ! In this new mode, the challenge is ramped up, and no two attempts are the same. Choose how your castle expands as you advance, grow your trap arsenal during each run, and collect mighty Nightmare powers to make the heroes pray for a quick Game Over... SINISTER STYLE! Collect loot from fallen heroes to deck out your Dark Lord and his control room! Each item includes a Baddie Bonus upgrade -- but your equipment spots are limited, so prepare to tinker with different diabolical builds. FIENDISH FEATURES: Includes the original Castle Doombad f rom 2014 remastered and rebuilt from the ground up -- with no ads and no IAP! Play the original 75 puzzling stages, or try your evil hand at the challenging new replayable roguelite mode! Unlock an antagonistic arsenal of 29 traps and over 150 upgrades! Customize your Dark Lord and your control room with new equipment and cosmetics, or collect reskins for your traps and troops For the first time, play the original Castle Doombad with a mouse+keyboard! Play on Steam Deck with touch screen controls (button and joystick support coming soon) Earn sinister Steam Achievements! New villainous content coming with free future updates! STAY UPDATED! Add Castle Doombad Classic to your wishlist now to receive updates, or keep up with development by following one of our social media accounts or joining our official Discord Community. Castle Doombad Classic is from the team that brought you Steven Universe: The Light Trilogy , Super Mole Escape ,  Teeny Titans 1+2 , and more!

name: そこへ向かう(GO THERE)
about_the_game: A short action game that the girl go ”There” 'GO THERE' is a side-scrolling action game with a short, wordless story. The story begins when a girl who desperately wants to go 'There' finally comes close to 'There'. Various large dragons live 'There' and block the way of the girl. There aren't many obstacles along the way, but the dragons will make the path difficult. The girl fights the dragon with forward rolls, jumps, and a wand that controls the dragon. Even if she is attacked by a dragon, she can heal herself with magic that heals wounds. The wand to control dragons If the girl wins the battle, she can control the dragon with the power of her wand. The controlled dragons will fight at her signal and protect her when she's stuck, but she's never controlled a dragon before. BGM : MaouDamashii, SKIPMORE, Ichthyostego

name: Pocket City 2
about_the_game: Pocket City 2 adds a playful twist to city-building, giving you more ways to create, explore, and have fun! Construct your ideal metropolis with intuitive tools, then step inside and experience it firsthand. You're not just managing a city—you’re part of it. Walk, drive, and fly through your streets, meet citizens, and even stir up a little mayhem! Plan roads, zones, and landmarks while balancing strategy and creativity. Optimize your city's growth with special buildings, expand its borders, and bring it to life with events. Whether you're developing a booming economy, hosting festivals, or simply wandering your world, Pocket City 2 offers a fun and dynamic way to build and play. Features: 🏙️ Build & Expand – Create a thriving city with zones, special buildings, and unique landmarks. 🚶 Jump In & Explore – Control your avatar, walk the streets, and interact with NPCs. 🌆 A Living World – Enjoy seasons, a day-night cycle, and dynamic events. 🎮 Minigames & Activities – Race cars, fly planes, and take on quirky challenges. 🎉 Lively Events – Host block parties, respond to disasters, or see what happens! 🏠 Customize & Collect – Decorate your home, unlock outfits, and personalize your city. 💰 Grow & Upgrade – Complete quests, invest in mega projects, and earn rewards. 🌍 Creative & Challenge Modes – Relax in Sandbox Mode or test your skills in Survival Mode. Updated for PC: 🎮 Updated Controls & UI – Optimized for a seamless PC experience. 🏙️ Larger Maximum City Size – Build bigger and better than ever. 🎨 Updated Visuals & Audio – Enjoy improved graphics and sound design. 🏗️ New Buildings – Expand your city with fresh additions. Build, Expand, and Shape Your City! Plan and develop a thriving metropolis by zoning residential, commercial, and industrial areas while managing power, water, and new systems like waste and sewage. Gather natural resources for upgrades, research, and income. Unlock new buildings by completing quests and improving relationships with citizens through encounters and city events. Take on massive Mega Projects —time-intensive investments that bring major benefits to your city. Explore and Interact in 3D Step inside your city as your custom avatar and roam freely! Walk through neighborhoods, interact with NPCs, and discover loot scattered around town. Drive through your streets, visit interiors, and experience your city in a new way with a full day-night cycle and seasonal changes. Minigames and Activities Take a break from city management with fun and dynamic minigames. Race through the streets, fly planes, pilot a fire helicopter, run businesses, and more! Level up your city to unlock new challenges and rewards. Customize Your Avatar and Home Create your own character and buy a home in the city! Furnish and decorate it with furniture from shops and quest rewards. Host house parties to boost your relationships with citizens. Events and Challenges Keep your city lively with block parties, festivals, parades, and more . But be ready—disasters like fires and storms can strike, causing chaos to your economy and buildings. Quickly rebuild and keep your city thriving! Face Off Against Rival Cities Compete in City Competitions against NPC-controlled cities to prove who’s the better mayor. Win and unlock new special buildings to enhance your metropolis!

name: スペルトナエル
about_the_game: *Caution! Localization to English has not yet been started. * What kind of game is it? Keyboard barrage roguelike! A game where you physically move around the on-screen keyboard and keep casting magic spells. You can attack with spells, increase your stats, and summon animals. A tense barrage! Enemies will interrupt your casting with barrages of spells. Cast as many spells as you can while avoiding enemy attacks. Don't worry if you're not good at avoiding barrages! Increase your defense to become invincible, or summon animals to block your bullets. More than 300 types of magic! You can buy magic at the shop at night. Choose a combination of spells that are easy to cast and create your own spell build! Short spells are weak, but can be cast quickly. Long spells are powerful, but take time to cast. Multiplayer support! Two controllers can be connected to the same PC to allow two players to play at the same time! Using Steam Remote Play Together, you can connect two controllers to each other and play multiplayer with friends who are far away from each other! Story This is a world where magic is commonplace. The main character, Two Speth, is a girl who loves magic and dreams of becoming a wizard in the future. However, even when she is old enough to use magic, she does not have any magical powers. Two was sad. Is she destined not to become a wizard? Two became a recluse. Poor thing. Then, Two received a book of magic. It was a mysterious grimoire that allows you to activate any magic by writing and chanting the spell. With this book and you, Two's journey to collect magic has begun. Let's make Two the strongest, best wizard! Video submission and distribution guidelines These are the guidelines for video submission and distribution (hereinafter referred to as 'live commentary') of 'Speltnael'. Please cooperate with the following points so that you can enjoy the game and not spoil the experience of other players. Permission to comment You are free to comment on the game regardless of whether it is monetized or not. Permission is not required. However, as described below, it would be encouraging if you could contact the developer. Prevention of spoilers Please refrain from including content that may be considered as spoilers of the story in the thumbnail or title. It is okay if the expression is somewhat vague. Please be considerate so as not to spoil the experience of other players. Spoilers about things such as magic builds, but not the story, are okay. Contact the developer (optional) If possible, please send a DM to the developer's Twitter account when commenting. Permission is not required, so you can comment without waiting for the developer's reply. The developer may watch your commentary. Twitter: @0MAD03 Other requests We hope you will share the fun of the game. If you find any bugs or problems, please contact the developer. Twitter: @0MAD03

name: Purgatory -NARAKU-
about_the_game: This is a survival horror action game in which a young girl 'Enri' tries to escape from a mysterious facility filled with blood and madness. The story begins with many mysteries, and the mysteries are revealed little by little as the game progresses. The game includes elements such as escaping from monsters, searching for items, and solving puzzles. Controls Cursor keys: Move Shift + cursor keys: dash (you can also set a constant dash where you can save) Enter, Z, Spacebar: Decide, look up ESC key: cancel/open/close item screen Gamepad Controls Four-way controller: Move A button: Decide/Examine B button: Cancel Y button: Open/close item screen Y button + cross key: Dash move This work is made with RPG Toolkit MZ. Only Japanese is supported. Description of adult content The developer describes the contents as follows Gore expression exists.

name: Shanshui Haven
about_the_game: Why Made This Game: * Craving the fun of city building without the burden of remembering complex building functions. * Busy with work and study, unable to devote long hours to extensive games. * A pure building experience, without dealing with the daily issues of virtual citizens. 《Shanshui Haven》 is a casual building placement game, every player can easily engage and enjoy the joy of building towns. Game Features: * Randomly Generated Grid Map: Every game is a brand new challenge, bringing you endless exploratory fun. * Strategic Building Placement: Choose the right locations to place buildings, maximize your population score, and showcase your strategic wisdom. * Diverse Buildings: Each building has its unique footprint and scoring rules; use them flexibly to build your dream city. * Ancient Chinese-style Architecture: Feel as if you are immersed in a flowing ancient Chinese scroll. 2 Game Modes: * Casual Mode: Perfect for players looking to relax and unwind. A stress-free experience where you can take your time and enjoy the game at your own pace. * High Score Mode: For those seeking to step up their game and tackle some tough scenarios. Test your skills and strategy in a more demanding setting. Do not buy this game if you are: * A hardcore city-building enthusiast * Looking for a multiplayer gaming experience * Expecting an epic storyline * Interested in conquest and combat elements * A severe OCD sufferer Consider buying this game if you: * Enjoy a relaxed and pleasant gaming atmosphere * Like games that are easy to pick up and addictive * Are mildly OCD-friendly * Willing to support a couple of indie game developers for a coffee's price In the game, you need to cleverly layout buildings and consider their interactions with each other. As your score steadily climbs, the level of your town will also gradually increase, unlocking new maps filled with challenges. At this point, you can continue to build your town, enhancing its level and unlocking more buildings. The game ends when there are no more plots or buildings that can be placed on the map. At that moment, you can proudly admire your architectural masterpiece, feeling the fruits of your wisdom and effort. Small Tips: * Sometimes, for the sake of potentially higher scores in the future, you might need to adopt long-term strategies rather than the best immediate options. Your patience and wisdom will be rewarded throughout the game's progress. * Although the game itself is not competitive, you can compare your scores with players worldwide and experience more challenges and fun by viewing the player leaderboard. After unlocking the new town, you can also choose to continue building it to achieve a higher score. Keep going until you run out of plots or buildings, and then take a look at the town you've meticulously crafted. Inspired by the following games: Minesweeper Islanders Tetris Civilization

name: Burst Hero
tags: Shoot 'Em Up,Top-Down Shooter,Twin Stick Shooter,Bullet Hell,Rogue-lite,Auto Battler,Card Game,Shooter,Arcade,Rogue-like,2D,Top-Down,2.5D,Gun Customization,Deckbuilding,Action,Pixel Graphics,Vampire,Singleplayer,Indie
about_the_game: Quick gameplay, easy to pick up Each battle takes only about 10 minutes, allowing you to enjoy intense and thrilling fights anytime, anywhere. Simple controls make it easy to pick up and enjoy endless exhilarating moments. Diverse hero selection The game offers a wide range of heroes with various abilities to choose from, each providing a unique gaming experience. Find the character that suits you best and experience different combat styles. Unique weapon system Any weapon can fire any bullet, with different weapons having different ammo capacity, firing speed, and barrel count. Each bullet type has its unique flight trajectory, damage, and attack effects. Thousands of combinations let you create personalized weapons. Strategic card building The card system in the game allows you to strengthen your abilities, and different card strategies will bring various gaming experiences. Focus on bullet penetration, area damage, or build a drone army? Explore to your heart's content! Diverse level challenges Each level features different map mechanics and enemies, with unique abilities for each enemy. Challenge yourself with 20 progressively difficult levels, each adding a difficulty option to keep things fresh. Rich collection elements Collect gacha coins to unlock new heroes, weapons, bullets, and cards. As the game progresses, the content will continue to grow, bringing you even more fun. Tips for clearing levels 1.Always check the store to buy and upgrade cards to strengthen yourself. 2.Lock the store when you see a suitable card to avoid the minute refresh replacement. 3.Prioritize upgrading the store when not under pressure to purchase more powerful cards. 4.Plan your card composition in advance, as there is an 8-card limit for your deck.

name: Polar Penguin Post
tags: Early Access,Time Management,Puzzle-Platformer,Puzzle,Life Sim,Female Protagonist,2D,Cute,Casual,Post-apocalyptic,Linear,Cartoony,Management,Family Friendly,Fantasy,Score Attack,Comedy,Supernatural,Inventory Management,Resource Management
about_the_game: ABOUT GAME Polar Penguin Post is a puzzle simulation game that runs the penguin delivery company Polar Penguin Post in the freezing city state Winter Mountain. The main character 'Min' establishes a penguin delivery company with his younger brother 'Hour' to make her friend 'Penguin' accepted as a family member of Winter Mountain. PPP Delivers Anything The PPP's Lists always have a lot of delivery orders stacked up. Please check the list and put delivery items in the penguin's bag correctly. Each delivery items have different sizes and shapes. There are things that can hold dozens of pieces, and things that take up half the bag by themselves. Please make good use of the space in your bag so that you can put all your deliveries. No Customer Wants A Broken Mug And A Dirty Letter If you put the glass next to the brick, the glass will break, and if you put the letter next to the sickle, the letter will break too. If you put things next to coal or oil, they'll be covered with soot and oil. But placing a blanket on a cement bag doesn't break it. In order to complete the delivery safely, we need to pack the bag considering the characteristics of the product. No one wants to get a broken glass, and the penguins don't know what's in their bags. Interact With A Variety Of Clients We have a variety of clients To exchange help, test, or accompany us with the Polar Penguin Post. Build trust in them by doing their clients' requests. Human relationships will lead you to various futures. Survive the freezing Winter Mountain Winter Mountain, the stage of 'Polar Penguin Post,' is becoming increasingly frozen for unknown reasons. Will Winter Mountain end like this? Enjoy the fun story of Pola Penguin Post somewhere in the dying world!

name: Cartonfall
about_the_game: It was another night shift at your job in a warehouse, when a madman with a box on his head, took control over the complex. Now you are under his control, to get out of here you have to solve his wicked riddles and smash through his weird cardboard structures by using anything you find in the boxes... Cartonfall is a dynamic first-person puzzle game, based on complex physics simulation. Explore twisted cardboard boxes constructins, full of traps and secrets. Use multitude of unusal throwable weapons like: rubber roosters, nitroglycerin bottles or holy hand granades. Beat each level in a creative way by combining different weapons and mechanics. ...and get free from the box-headed psycho.

name: Songs Of Death
about_the_game: This is a roguelike rhythm action game that requires you to block and counter (accurate block) enemy attacks at the right moment. This is a fictional world based on characters from the Three Kingdoms. Here, there are not only martial skills, but also spiritual energy and technologies that led to the invention of spells and firearms. You will play as Ma Chao, master of a variety of attacks and tools, and break enemy defenses with the help of friends to exact revenge on Cao Cao for slaughtering your family. EXP will be gained from kills for you to level up, unlocking new weapons. Each of the weapons has a unique attack pattern and works best against specific targets. They also have Synergy tags, and activating the same tags grants characters special effects. When you have extra copies of the same weapon, the weapon will be starred up activating its Synergy effects without having to equip the weapon. It is up to you to manage resources for greater combat prowess. It was back when PlayStation 3 was still the latest console, I got obsessed with Drakengard 3. It was the last boss battle, and the rhythm game played to The Final Song by Eir Aoi scarred me permanently and I remembered it to this day. So it began my journey to make a good yet depressing game like Yoko Taro did. Based on this idea, I took elements of Vampire Survivors and Taiko no Tatsujin and added some roguelike and auto battler features to complete this game. As a small segment of the Songs series, the story is relatively independent of the other games, so don't worry if you haven't played the other works in the series. If you are interested in the story, you will need to use different characters to clear the required difficulty levels and stages to unlock each character's story chapters and get a glimpse into the whole story. Hope you all have fun playing!

name: カルトに厳しいギャル-CULT VS GAL-
tags: Action,Shooter,Boomer Shooter,2.5D,1990's,Old School,Dark Comedy,Dark Humor,Indie,Gore,Violent,Female Protagonist,Singleplayer,FPS,Cute,Anime,Pixel Graphics,Retro,Funny,Great Soundtrack
about_the_game: You know what? Gals are tough on cults,.., Imperial year 248. The empire is in the midst of deteriorating security, hopeless diplomatic relations, and endless war. The oppressed people of the devastated society believe in the apocalypse, and soon a huge religious organization rises up. People were kidnapped by the organization and disappeared one by one. The empire sent its own troops to the organization, but they were all destroyed. The imperial army, unable to devote its strength to the country due to the worsening war situation with neighboring countries, They transferred one gal to a religious organization, Galwoya. ・・・・ CULT VS GAL is an ultra old-school, yet high-tempo, user-friendly FPS. Take control of the 'Hell Smasher Saki' and destroy the cult that threatens the empire! This is a 4-episode, 16+ map, old school FPS. The simplified maps do not interfere with your fighting instincts and allow you to just focus on fighting the cult. Right click to manufacture raw heads! When you cut off a head, Saki's tension rises and she becomes invincible for a moment. Close combat is dangerous, but daring to charge in and hunt for the head is one of the strategies. You can unleash a melee attack that can pop a cult's head off in an instant. Mince the cult with your shotgun, tactically attack with your assault rifle, and slash the cult's head off with your machete! Sounds effect's 瑠璃高原 Using this template by Play8Bitars

name: Lucky and a life worth living - a jigsaw puzzle tale
about_the_game: Lucky, the dog, shares good moments with his parents. From the morning until the night, Lucky joyfully participates in the family routine, either in house duties, working activities, or leisure time. Life can be simple and fulfilling at the same time. Lucky is a more than appropriate name for him! In this jigsaw puzzle game, find six of those daily moments. Set up the jigsaw puzzle scenes at five different levels of difficulty - from 135 to 735 pieces. Lovely illustrations created especially for the game by artist @Katia.Numakura . Relax with a soothing and exclusive lo-fi soundtrack. Features include zooming the scene, highlighting border pieces, shuffle the remaining pieces, previewing the scene. Complete the puzzle and unlock the image for download. Share it to express your love and friendship! Use it as a desktop background to inspire your day 🌞! Play this if you love dogs, love jigsaw puzzles, or just love life! This is one instance of a life worth living. There are other ways, for sure. How about you, have you found your own way? Share your views on our community forum.

name: Son of a Gun
about_the_game: A retro-inspired twin-stick shooter like they made back in the day. Guns, blood, and gore all in one nostalgia-looking package. Son of a Gun is an intense action packed top down shooter full of bullets, blood and explosions. Collect and manage your guns and grenades to fight swarming bugs, gigantic robots, slimy monsters and even space ghosts. Select one of 6 characters and upgrade them while progressing through the single player campaign. Overwhelming enemies can be sometimes dealt with by the prototype time-bending device. You are Son of a Gun - an interplanetary mercenary working for the Sons of a Gun organization. You’re called always when firepower matters and something needs to be solved by force. While being on a vacation on a tropical planet you’re just received a phone call from the SOAG Command Center… You'll have plenty of guns in 7 different classes at your disposal. Grab pistols, shotguns, SMG's, rifles, plasma guns, sniper rifles, or rocket launchers - you're defining your own playstyle. Don't forget about grenades - gear up with your favorite grenade type - cluster, force, explosive, implosive… You'll fight in the heart of the distant planets with versatile biomes. Each with their own unique environment and challenges - reach a target area, unlock base gates, download data from data-pylons or survive the horde's attack. Face over 20 different enemy types with swarming bugs, zombie-like creatures, auto-turrets, gigantic robots, horrific degenerations, slimy monsters and even space ghosts. Plenty of guns in 7 different classes - pick your shooting style Use a time-bending device that will often save your ass Play as one of 6 space mercenaries Tactically push tactical explosive barrels to gain a tactical advantage Use environmental hazards to kill enemies Annihilate 8 gigantic bosses with unique mechanics Experience full of tropes, sci-fi story :)

name: Six nights to die
about_the_game: About the game . Karen is a girl who works as a waitress in a bar, when her boss Joss returns from a trip to South America, strange things start to happen in the bar. Karen will have to start investigating what is going on, but she can't neglect her job either. Caracteristicas. Immersive experience: Atmospheric and photorealistic graphics intensify the horror experience. Gameplay : The game mixes the gameplay of a walking simulator with a bar simulation game. Psychological terror: The game will try to trick and scare you. Six nights to die is a short game that lasts between 60 and 120 minutes.

name: Lilja and Natsuka Painting Lies
about_the_game: A yuri kinetic novel about overcoming the tribulations of the human heart, telling the story of Lilja, a genius painter, and Natsuka, her live-in assistant. Asou Ei—main writer of the notorious “euphoria” visual novel—weaves a sapphic tale on the heartaches and reprieves of fathoming love. Game Overview “Lilja and Natsuka: Painting Lies” features: A story with two female protagonists who support, fulfill, and dazzle each other. A script written by Asou Ei that comprises a prologue and four chapters, each part concerning an enigmatic client who Lilja paints for with Natsuka’s help. Stunning character designs and paintinglike artwork by Kippu, who’ve previously illustrated for the “Fire Emblem Heroes” tactical role-playing game and the “No-Rin” light novel series. 1920x1080 resolution support; a first for visual novels developed by Frontwing. An amazing soundtrack of background music composed by industry veteran Hijiri Anze (BGM tracks in “Muv-Luv Alternative”). An opening theme by yanaginagi (“My Teen Romantic Comedy SNAFU” anime series opening themes) and ending theme by Hina Aoki (“GINKA” visual novel ending theme). A voice cast led by Tomoyo Takayanagi (Sarina, “Oshi no Ko”) as Lilja and Yurie Igoma (Ruby, “Oshi no Ko”) as Natsuka, among many other experienced voice actors well-known for their anime and video game roles. Story Lilja is a gifted painter whose intellect exceeds the limits of human imagination, possessing a vision of the world so vivid that merely copying it onto a canvas creates a masterpiece. However, upon losing her sight and mobility to a disease, her world is reduced to a numb nothingness. Unwilling to endure the pity from those around her, she resolves to move to Japan and live in solitude. Natsuka, on the other hand, is a wanderer at heart who lives each moment to the fullest despite her meager lifestyle. One fateful day, she is hired by Lilja for a deceptively simple task: to observe the world and narrate her experiences, illuminating Lilja’s world once more. As they continue to spend time with each other, Natsuka comes to deeply respect Lilja and treasure their companionship. Together, they take on a series of painting commissions—only the ones that Lilja deems worthy of their time. Each client she chooses, even if they do not realize it themselves, is tormented by a past that they cannot overcome alone. Lilja may have the means to discover the truths about each client on her own, but it is up to Natsuka to find the colors that she needs to complete her paintings. The blue of reminiscence, the green of monsters, the red of martyrdom... With each pigment the pair uncovers together, they are one step closer to encountering the “light” that gives color to the world. You being by my side, as I tell you all about the world around us, has made this world so much more beautiful than before.

name: The Devil is in the Details
about_the_game: CAN YOU SURVIVE THE DEVIL'S GAME? In The Devil is in the Details , is an Anomaly detection -meets- Escape Room - meets Survival Horror hybrid, played from a first-person perspective. You find yourself trapped in a hellish mansion. Each step forward is a gamble in this ever-changing nightmare, where no two playthroughs are alike. Explore and investigate your surroundings and try to beat the devil at his own game, by placing talismans on cursed objects, while trying to survive with limited resources against the many deadly traps and foes that lurk in the shadows, as well as having to deal with the pranks demons and the devil throw at you. Key Features: 4 distinct campaigns: Each one of the 4 trials features a large, sprawling and distinct mansion, each with unique trials to conquer, offering many hours of gameplay. The Prank System™ : Introduces randomized pranks, ensuring a fresh, unpredictable experience and keeping players on their toes. There's a lot of variety in these, ranging from sliding on the floor, reversed controls, and other unexpected modifiers that will provide a fun challenge for players. Side quests: Each trial has 30 mini-arbiters hiding throughout the mansions waiting to be collected, as well as a secret side quest that will be hard to crack. These provide countless more hours of gameplay for completionists. Randomized Cursed Objects: Every venture into the game offers a unique challenge, ensuring a fresh experience with each playthrough. Time is your most precious resource: Time is your health. Explore the different mansions while keeping an eye on the time, and beware of enemies that will try to consume it. Use potions to increase time, just keep in mind they come in limited quantities. Summon your inner Detective: Sharpen your observation skills as you observe and recall changes in your environment to progress. Talisman Placement: Use mystical talismans to cleanse objects twisted by demonic influence. Demonic Traps: Navigate, outwit, and disarm devilish traps that lurk around every corner. Eerie Atmosphere: Immerse yourself in a chilling game against the forces of darkness, set against a backdrop of haunting visuals and sounds. Survival: The demons will do whatever it takes to prevent you from finalizing the rituals, from physically assaulting you to engaging in mind games. You must use your wits and utilize your environment to trap or destroy the demons. Limited Resources and Route Planning: Create the best plan of attack to avoid foes(or lead them to traps) while managing the limited environmental resources at your disposal as well as your time. Customize your Experience: Completely customize the game to your needs and liking. If the game is too difficult, intense, or you just want to focus on doing side quests without the nerve-wrecking intensity of the default experience, you can individually turn off enemies, traps, jump scares or ghosts, thus providing everyone with lots of modifiers to really give you an unique experience fitted to your needs. The Devil is in the Details offers a gripping blend of psychological horror and puzzle-solving, wrapped in a veil of mystery. Are you ready to challenge the devil in his own game?

name: Vestaria Saga II: The Sacred Sword of Silvanister
tags: Tactical RPG,Turn-Based Tactics,Strategy RPG,Wargame,Turn-Based Strategy,Anime,RPG,Pixel Graphics,Fantasy,Hex Grid,Grid-Based Movement,Strategy,Character Customization,2D,Story Rich,Team-Based,Class-Based,Turn-Based Combat,Singleplayer,Magic
about_the_game: Vestaria Saga is a strategy RPG series where positioning, movement, and weaponry are paramount to success. Move your heavily armed units around a classically styled grid-based map and engage pirates, rebels, monsters, imperial soldiers, and anyone else that stands in your way. While Vestaria Saga I chronicled the battles that ensued in the Solvian-Meledian War, Vestaria Saga II focuses on the further adventures of Zade, the hero from VS1, bringing the tales of him and his companions to a thrilling, satisfying end. Across his epic quest, Zade will encounter allies both new and old while also uncovering more of the mysteries behind the vile Margulites and their plan to plunge Vestaria into a new age of darkness. Features New classes, gear, and skills to utilize across a wider variety of maps compared to its predecessor Ally conversations now confer stat boosts and other advantages A slew of other quality of life improvements have been made to the classic VS system An enthralling campaign of espionage, international intrigue, and war written by veterans of the genre Varying story paths and endings based on your choices and who survives to the end Over 30 unique characters to recruit with a wide variety of classes, weapons, and skills Intricate maps filled with a variety of enemies and strategic puzzles to overcome A rebalanced, single difficulty mode The ability to save every turn so that you can quickly undo any mistakes you've made during a battle A full English script translated from the original Japanese by a veteran translator Another chapter in a strategy RPG series that builds upon Japanese SRPG traditions Story After a ship carrying a Solvian imperial diplomat was mistakenly set ablaze in Meledian waters, the Solvian Emperor Manneus declared war on the island kingdom. Led by the famed general Ajax, Solvia's imperial forces soon invaded Meledian shores. Once Meleda suffered a critical defeat in the Battle of Frist, the Empire quickly swooped in to seize the royal capital of Regina. Crushed beyond any hope of recovery, Meleda was forced to watch its invaders brutally wipe 500 years of history right off the face of the map. And so, one year passed... Once thought to have gone missing, the young princess Athol miraculously returned to the royal capital and freed its people through a furious battle. The one who fought valiantly by her side and helped lead her to victory was none other than Zadrian, the young heir to Redessa. Meleda praised Zadrian as a national hero, showering him with fame and glory that far exceeded what they had once shown his elder brother Zecharias, the kingdom's finest knight. Zech was not only engaged to the princess, he was also the acting commander of the Meledian army... And most importantly, he was Zade's big brother– the man who Zade loved and respected more than anyone else. Feeling like his very presence had become a stain on his dear brother's reputation, Zade decided to leave the capital and set off on a new journey to the Temenos of Vesta. He took with him on his quest only a single traveling companion: Accorte Roland, a student of Sphire's magic academy and the daughter of a man who once saved Zade's life...

name: A game that saves the muscles caught in the ceiling of the gymnasium
about_the_game: 'Game to save muscles caught on the ceiling of the gymnasium' is a new kind of shooting game where you have to hit a man caught on the ceiling of the gymnasium with a ball to rescue him. As you know, many machos are caught on the beams near the ceiling of the gymnasium. I don't know why these half-naked machos are trapped in the gymnasium ceiling. Players hit them with a special macho rescue ball in the shape of a volleyball, shock them and drop them off the ceiling. ■ Game features There are two types of game modes that you can play. In 'Rescue Mode' you can rescue Macho until you are satisfied with unlimited time. Rescue and collect the occasional 'rare macho'. 'Challenge mode' is a time attack mode that measures how quickly you can rescue 10 machos within the time limit.

name: Catty & Batty: The Spirit Guide
about_the_game: Catty & Batty: The Spirit Guide is a casual couch co-op puzzle game, inspired by Lemmings and Tower Defense! Play as Catty or Batty and build a path to guide spirits home. 🐈🦇 Features: Campaign with 30 levels for 1-2 players (local co-op) Switch characters on-the-fly when playing solo Over 800 hand-drawn sprites Over 150 animations Over 100 new sounds Original soundtrack 100% Controller support (2 controllers recommended for co-op) 6 color modes (white, sepia, gray, dark, inverted, gameboy) About 2 hours of gameplay Streaming Permissions 🎬 You are allowed to stream and create videos of this game (Twitch, YouTube, etc.), even with monetization enabled. The music is an original soundtrack that is safe to stream. Have fun!

name: Bunny Game
about_the_game: A merciless multiplayer survival challenge. Trust is fragile when betrayal lurks in every shadow. Dive into a world where alliances are as unstable as the harsh conditions you face. Will you outwit your friends and survive the impending doom? Experience the thrill and treachery in 12-player multiplayer mode , online or over LAN. Work together to complete quests and outlast the winter, but more importantly, can you see through the deception among your allies? Diverse strategies, unique mechanics: Each game unfolds differently. Will you be a cunning saboteur or a dedicated gatherer? Work together to overcome obstacles and gather resources.  The locals don't take kindly to carrot-stealing visitors, but you’ll need snacks to make it through winter. Stealth and strategy: Utilize the terrain to your advantage against the dangerous environment. Navigate in between hiding spots and dense underbrush while keeping an eye on your companions – are they really helping? You'll need to work together if you want to survive past winter. Dynamic time and weather systems make exploration dangerous and unpredictable. Be mindful not to get stranded alone in the cold! Prepare and survive against dangerous weather changes! Mind the time and don't get lost at night! Cold slows you down and makes you vulnerable, so stay warm! Prepare for the unpredictable in the safety of your burrow. Unlock new maps and upgrades while you wait for your friends to get ready to play. Relax and get ready in your home burrow while waiting for the rest of your friends to join. Get upgraded! Spend the resources you gathered to unlock tools and upgrades which will make your job easier. Unlock new maps and areas for you and your friends to explore.

name: The Cursed Legacy
about_the_game: The Cursed Legacy is a Puzzle Game set in a dark and mysterious atmosphere. Keep calm and solve the riddles to unravel this strange disappearance. But be careful, you're not alone! Investigate and Gather clues Solve the riddles Discover the story And... survive The Developer After battling evil entities on This is a Ghost, I wanted to focus on another project I'm passionate about: The Cursed Legacy. This game, with its original story, is the first chapter in a horrific experience rich in mystery, black powder and demonic creatures. Nuci

name: Athena Crisis
tags: Turn-Based Tactics,Turn-Based Strategy,Pixel Graphics,Tactical,Sci-fi,PvE,PvP,Retro,2D,Top-Down,Colorful,Tactical RPG,Strategy,Co-op,Relaxing,Atmospheric,Level Editor,Early Access,Online Co-Op,Multiplayer
about_the_game: Athena Crisis is a modern retro turn-based strategy game that presents multiple gripping single-player campaigns alongside sync and async online multiplayer, as well as a full map and campaign editor, leaderboards, player skills and unit powers. Fans of Advance Wars or Fire Emblem will feel right at home in Athena Crisis ! Victory in Athena Crisis can be obtained in multiple ways: defeat all enemy units to clear a map, take over your opponent’s structures and bases, escort units to an escape zone, or simply survive for a period of time against overwhelming odds. Outwit, outbuild, and outfight your opponents to become the best Athena Crisis player. Take Command Command 40+ infantry, ground, naval, air and special units in turn-based battles. Seamlessly convert single-player games into multiplayer by activating Power Crystals that allow friends to join for coop. But beware: Activating crystals might mean other players will invade and battle you! Think Tactically Beware the fog! Proceeding too far behind enemy lines may leave your units exposed to attacks from unexpected directions, or even at risk of…dinosaur munches? Strategic thinking will be required to take advantage of terrain and lines of sight. Skills and Powers Customize your gameplay experience with unique unlockable skills and powers: Unlock new units, apply status effects or completely change how some unit mechanics work. And when you need to gain the upper hand, activate powers to unleash devastating counter attacks. Just One More Game A lighthearted, humorous story full of memorable characters will keep you playing long past when you planned to put your Steam Deck down. Just…one…more…map… And when you run out of official content, there are hours of community created campaigns and maps to play through! Make Your Own Maps And Campaigns A full map and campaign editor is included, allowing you to customize your own campaigns with your own dialogue or make challenging encounters for your friends to overcome. You can make single maps to play with friends and other community members, or create complete campaigns with entirely new dialogue and stories. Play On The Go Athena Crisis takes the phrase “multi-platform” to a whole new level: you can start a game on PC or Mac and seamlessly continue it on iPhone, Android, or Steam Deck, whether you’re playing the lengthy single-player campaign or an online skirmish with your friends. Key Features Immerse yourself in a single-player campaign with funny & memorable characters Over 30 hours of official and community created content Create your own maps and campaigns and share them with friends Compete online in sync or async, ranked or casual battles with up to 7 players at once Explore seven environments with unique playstyles Compare your scores with other players in online leaderboards Play on Windows, macOS, iPhone, iPad, Android, Linux or Steam Deck, seamlessly transitioning your progress between all of your devices Full-length original soundtrack

name: JOIN tiles - Anatolian game to play
about_the_game: JOIN tiles - Anatolian game to play is a puzzle game whose aim is to combine broken tiles. Our game, which offers a pleasant and fluent gameplay, contains the works of Anatolian Tile art of hundreds of years. There are 80 puzzles in four categories in our game. Thematic categories in our game Anatolian Kitty Cyber Bird

name: Super Puzzled Cat
about_the_game: Help Puzzled Cat use jetpacks, portals, bombs, gum, and more to conquer treacherous platforming stages. Play your own way using save states to explore a world full of challenges and secrets - but can you find the way through? Travel through time and space and reach enlightenment. Save states mean you can experiment and figure out exactly how to solve any task. Try things out without losing progress. Explore and you'll find hidden collectibles, levels, and more. There are many ways to tackle the world's hidden challenges. Practice makes perfect, and perfect play has its own rewards. Over 150 levels to explore and multiple endings to find. Use save states, or don't! Focus on puzzles, precision, or exploration. Cat!

name: Archons
tags: Action,Action Roguelike,Bullet Hell,Rogue-lite,Action-Adventure,Controller,Rogue-like,Adventure,RPG,Atmospheric,Local Co-Op,Hack and Slash,Combat,Difficult,Isometric,Perma Death,Action RPG,Singleplayer,Co-op,PvE
about_the_game: An ancient evil festers on the planet. Summon the Archons and face off against swarms of parasites and towering bosses. Harvest essence to enhance your weapons and powers, then unlock bloodrunes to sacrifice health for devastating strength, paving the way to victory. Control two characters as one player, one with each hand Find what's causing the plague to fester on the alien planet Discover new environments and bosses as you progress Local Co-op Endless Mode Slay various enemy types that try to stop you Gain different currencies that will assist you in progressing through the levels Select a build that suits you: active or passive? Defensive or Offensive? It's up to you! Unlock achievements and rewards!

name: Sudoku Classic
about_the_game: Customizable Sudoku with the feel of writing with a pen on paper and the ease of playing a video game. It's a video game, but you can play it as if you were writing with a pen on paper. You can customize the assist functions to your liking. * Customize the assist functions and play with the settings you like. Customize the assist functions to play with the settings you like. We wanted to retain the feel of playing with pen and paper, but make it easier to play...! ...and other assist functions you can turn on/off any way you like. *The game can be played anytime, anywhere, even if it takes a long time. * Touch controls are supported. Touch controls make it easy to play casually like you would on a smartphone app. * There are a total of 300 problems in EASY, NORMAL, and HARD difficulty levels. There are 300 problems in three difficulty levels: EASY, NORMAL, and HARD.

name: UnderDungeon
about_the_game: UnderDungeon is a peculiar adventure based on the classic dungeon crawlers. Our protagonist, Kimuto, will have to face the harsh world of work on his first day on the job. With the enigmatic appearance of the monsters, the lives of the residents of Kutopia have radically changed. The famous 'Heroes' have emerged who try to hunt down these creatures, some have created communities to try to resist them, and others try to survive as best they can. Be careful, doing your job will not be easy. Let your imagination fly with very careful 1bit graphics. Memorable and emotional soundtrack. Meet charismatic characters, discover surprise mechanics and explore the strange world of Kutopia. Many secrets to discover. A great story.

name: Marble Land
about_the_game: Marble Land is a physics-based puzzle game that was designed primarily for VR. The purpose of the game is to guide a rolling marble on the correct path to its target destination by changing the configuration of the elements in the level. The game contains 45 levels of increasing difficulty, split across three different environments: the desert, the cave and the mountain. There is no time limit on the puzzles and you can try as many different approaches as you like in order to find the solution. Marble Land offers an immersive and comfortable experience that doesn’t induce any VR motion sickness. It can be played using a gamepad or motion controllers, either as a sitting, standing or room-scale VR experience. It can also be played as a non-VR game, with mouse and keyboard or a standard controller. Features: 45 different puzzles of increasing complexity 3 gorgeous and relaxing environments Lots of different level mechanics and contraptions Playable VR modes: sitting, standing and room-scale Comfortable VR experience, no motion sickness Supports linear motion, snap turning, teleport and 'grab and pull' locomotion Support for motion controllers, gamepad Playable as Non-VR game (doesn't require a VR headset)

name: to a T
about_the_game: to a T is a narrative adventure game that portrays the extraordinary life of a 13-year-old teenager, whose body happens to be in the shape of the letter 'T.' They live in a modest seaside town that they explore by foot, train, or even their favorite unicycle, and interact with a the charming cast of characters who live there. From teenager’s loyal fluffy canine companion and their caring mother, to a gang of despicable bullies and a giraffe that makes the most scrumptious sandwiches. After a chance encounter, the teenager discovers a newfound ability, and a story begins to unravel around a mysterious object enveloped in light that falls from the sky. Features: ● Episodic Story : Take part in a story that unfolds over multiple days while Teen finds a way to fit in, and discovers a new found sense of self. ● Minigames : Control Teen in a variety of different scenarios that they encounter throughout their day. Maneuver Teen’s arm to reach for and interact with objects. Open Teen’s mouth to take a bite of food or a drink of water. From petting a dog, to eating breakfast, Teen can do a lot even if they have to do it in their own way. ● Explore town : Outside of the main story, collect coins, find a beautiful vista point, visit all the shops around town, or hunt for interesting characters around town to talk to in free mode. ● Character customization : Style Teen to your own liking. Purchase clothing from stores around town to expand your wardrobe and experiment with fun clothing combinations. ● A very cute dog.

name: SHUFFLE! Episode 2 ~Kami ni mo Akuma ni mo Nerawareteiru Otoko~
tags: Visual Novel,2D Platformer,Interactive Fiction,Dating Sim,2D,Cute,Story Rich,Romance,Casual,Anime,Cartoony,Fantasy,Comedy,Drama,Emotional,Adventure,Cartoon,Singleplayer,FPS,Sexual Content
about_the_game: 《SHUFFLE! episode2 ～被神与魔同时盯上的男人～》是日本美少女游戏知名大厂Navel制作的恋爱题材作品。前作《SHUFFLE! 》是经典人气名作，并曾推出过颇具人气的动画版。本次时隔16年所推出的续作由原班人马制作，一样的配方一样的味道，在新的时代演绎全新的故事。   本作由业界知名画师西又葵与铃平广携手担当原画与人物设计，并由创作了《近月少女的礼仪》、《我们没有翅膀》等超人气作品的剧本家王雀孙、东之助以及创作了《D.C.》经典系列作品的剧本家TAKEUCHIKOUTA、桑原文彦共同创作剧本。遥空、花园MEL、上原葵等知名声优为游戏女主角献声。本作曾荣获萌系游戏大赏角色设计奖金奖。 《SHUFFLE! episode2 ～被神与魔同时盯上的男人～》国际中文版将于2023年3月10日发售。

name: Petit Island
about_the_game: Grandpaw was once a brave, adventurous cat who had many tales to tell. Now, as his memories fade, all that remains is the story that was told to his beloved grandchild Lily.. and some in his old journal that has recently been discovered. It is time for you, as Lily, to go on your own quest to relive Grandpaw’s adventures and uncover new ones! Can you help grandpaw remember his past? Explore Petit Island : Have the purrrfect time of your life! Discover hidden treasures and wild animals on the island. The villages and cities have so much to offer too, so soak up all the knowledge while you can! Capture memories : Help your grandpaw reminisce about his adventuresome days by capturing nostalgic spots on the island with your camera. Take a lot of photos with locals, tourists, animals, and everything else you can on the island! Meet new friends and local tourists : Get to know the island's quirky and interesting characters as you go along your journey! Befriend the community to gain their trust - scratch their back, and they scratch yours! Let yourself shine : Customize your appearance to your heart's desire! With plenty of options, you can look exactly how you want to.

name: Onde
about_the_game: Dive into a world filled with sounds. Let ethereal tunes carry you fluidly on your way through abstract landscapes. Learn to create and follow ephemeral paths of sound and light. Follow whimsical companions through a delicate world that changes from clear lines to swirls of color, from bursts of crystalline notes to soothing sound spheres. Tune in to the soundscapes surrounding you and feel the world become alive with wonders. Trust the cycle, resonate with the flow and ascend to what is yet to become. Key Features Smooth, intuitive puzzle-platforming: create ephemeral paths along waves of sound and light to follow your calling Ethereal, adaptive soundscapes: conduct soothing sounds as you navigate through melodic environments Meditative experience: organic movement, fluid gameplay and relaxing sounds make for a Zen-like journey A world filled with wonders: from the deepest ocean to the depths of space, explore manifold areas along your way, each sporting unique visuals and puzzle mechanics Elegant abstract artwork: a serene world that changes from clear lines to swirls of color during this journey of life Story Deep in the stillness of underground caves carved into rocks and crystal, removed from the world, there is an empty shell. Yet, life finds its way through the darkness, and by filling the shell, sparks a light. With the light comes a sound, and the waves of this communion propagate in all directions. A new being sets out and follows their lead to discover a world of wonders and witness life unfolding on its way. Will the wee creature get through the dark spaces to find that it is darkness that makes light really shine?

name: NecroBoy : Path to Evilship
about_the_game: Follow young necromancer NecroBoy and his recently resurrected servant, Lackey! Well, they might disagree on the term servant. Even on the name Lackey. It won't prevent them to learn from one another - the motivations of NecroBoy and his path of Evil being the catalyst that will tie their fates together. Using his dark powers, NecroBoy’s brings his NecroMinions back to life to do his bidding and solve puzzles to venture forth into the crypt of his infamous hero, NecroMan! A Crypt Full Of Puzzles! Have your minions flip switches on and off and move objects back and forth to open the path to the crypt’s depths. As you delve deeper into the ominous vault, your necromantic powers will grow allowing you restrain your minions in place and release them from their binding close up and at a distance, so you can strategically move your ghostly buddies as you need. Some tasks, like cranks and giant blocks, may require you to summon and gather multiple minions to move. Should you become lost on your way, NecroBoy can invoke his soul link, peering into realm beyond revealing the links between devices and passage ways to help you make that shut way, shut no more! Guardians of great stature and power will also stand in your way. Our hero must find ways to bring down these towering terrors! But just so you know, there is no violence or combat in this game! NecroBoy is just a kid, godammit. Should you bring to heel these fearsome foes, you may get a special new skin for your minions. There are 8 ways to dress up your spirit servants and some will require you venturing down secret paths. For Steam Deck Users A fix for Steam Deck is coming soon. Thank you for your patience.

name: Sklime - A Difficult Climbing Adventure
about_the_game: Sklime is a brutally difficult twin stick climbing game made to be played with a controller. Play as a slime who has fallen to the bottom of the depths and struggle to climb through many unique environments and obstacles to return home. The journey back up demands great patience and determination. Gameplay: -Aim the joysticks to move your arms The arms move faster to catch up if they are farther away. Simple input but difficult to master, make sure to stretch your thumbs! -All progress forward and backward is saved Sorry, no checkpoints. But maybe some inhabitants of the Depths will help you on your way.. -7 Environments each with unique challenges Your journey will never get dull with each area providing new mechanics and minigames to play. Take a break with a minigame, set a highscore and compete with friends Inspired by Bennett Foddy's Getting Over It Monetization policy: You have permission to stream the game, record and upload videos, and monetize streams/videos. You can also stream and monetize the game in paywalled streams (such as member only or subscription only streams). You do not have to contact for permission to monetize videos of the game. Contact: sklime-support@zan-kai.com

name: SOULVARS
tags: JRPG,Deckbuilding,Pixel Graphics,Turn-Based Combat,Cyberpunk,Card Game,RPG,2D,Anime,Adventure,Tactical RPG,CRPG,Collectathon,Sci-fi,Dungeon Crawler,Score Attack,Futuristic,Strategy,Singleplayer,Character Customization
about_the_game: SOULVARS takes deckbuilding combat to the next level with the innovative Soulbit system. Combine Soulbit actions and use deck-controlling Abilities to pull off 100+ breathtaking moves. Tactically counter powerful attacks and debuffs from enemy 'Dominators,' and time your counterattacks for maximum effect! Enjoy the best of both worlds: deep deckbuilding strategy and high-speed RPG battles! ◆ A future where human souls can be digitized... Humanity faces the consequences of its technology with the sudden appearance of grotesque Dominators. Elite units consisting of Soulbearers, next-generation humans born with alternate Souls, are dispatched day and night to intercept and counter Dominator attacks. The story follows Yakumo, a freelance Soulbearer, as he handles assignments from private military contractor 'DDO' (Dominator Disposal Organization). ◆ Deep, exhilarating battles and character growth Experience the best of both worlds - dynamic pixel art animations and turn-based tactical planning. Each enemy is a puzzle to solve, a challenge to overcome! Identify their weaknesses and combine Soulbit actions to unleash powerful finishing moves! Explore the cityscape and hunt unique Dominators for rare and powerful gear on your path to mastering the ultimate Arts! ◆ Super-enhanced port of acclaimed mobile original The original mobile version, released in January 2022, soared up the rankings to #1 for paid RPG apps and #2 for paid game apps on both Google Play and Apple App Store (in Japan) and continues to garner wide acclaim (4.6 score average on App Store, 4.8 on Google Play as of Sep 2022). The Steam version offers an enhanced horizontal UI and intuitive controller input, combining the speed of SOULVARS with full dynamism on your favorite display!

name: Forest Camp Story
tags: Simulation,Casual,Strategy,City Builder,Colony Sim,Pixel Graphics,Life Sim,Farming Sim,2D,Cute,Indie,Retro,Nature,Building,Singleplayer,Resource Management,Real-Time with Pause
about_the_game: The great outdoors are calling! Create and run your own campground in this business management sim. Get a lay of the land and find the best places to camp. Before you know it, customers will be setting up tents and taking pictures, making memories that will last a lifetime. But it's not all about peace and solitude. With activities like bird watching, fly fishing, and horse riding, there's no shortage of ways to show your campers a good time! No camping experience? No problem! Set up guided tours to show new campers the ropes, and they'll soon be coming back for more. If you play your cards right, you might get visits from rabbits, squirrels, and other cute critters too! Don't be afraid to branch out and grow your business. Set up a camping goods store in nearby towns to earn extra cash and attract new customers. Get more people interested in your wares, and you might just spark a nationwide camping craze... Answer the call of the wild and start creating the camp of your dreams! Try searching for 'Kairosoft' to see all of our games!!

name: Linkito
about_the_game: Linkito is a logic puzzle game all about connexions where you need to wire blocks in order to let the current flow. Progress through 80+ brainteasers and learn new mechanics along the way in diverse settings. Build machines, defuse bombs, control robots and feel the spark as you progress through a fully narrative campaign! BE THE FIRST SPARK OF THE REVOLUTION In campaign mode, start a new career in Albatross Technologies and discover its secrets! This enterprise (and its great leader Kane) are not what they seem and you'll have to what it seems and you'll have to counteract their plans one puzzle at a time.Use your logic to climb the corporate ladder and your insight to destroy the system from within. DESIGN AND SHARE YOUR OWN PUZZLES Unleash your creativity with our full-featured level editor! Craft your own unique puzzles or even design epic campaigns with multiple levels and branching. Go beyond classic level design with your own adventures, narratives, or interactive sandbox creations! Instantly play community-made levels, unlocking unlimited content and challenges. Ready to test your logic skills and challenge others player puzzles? GO FURTHER Experience next-level innovation with Linkito! It connects to the real world in unprecedented ways. You can try the Twitch-integrated campaign where viewers join forces in real-time, creating an electrifying vibe in the chat. Plus, with OSC support, you can seamlessly control music software, or use the serial port to interact with electronics. It's never been easier to create whatever you imagine in a fun and intuitive way! GAME FEATURES Just use your logic, no knowledge required Various connection-based puzzles Uncover the truth about Albatross Technologies in an original 50s dystopian setting Complete level-editor & sandbox mode Browse community created levels directly in the game Connect the game to Twitch or other systems

name: Cute Capybaras
about_the_game: Capybaras are cutest and biggest rodent on our planet! They are 100% vegetarians who likes to swum in the water. Capybara’s eyes and ears are positioned high on the head, so they can see and hear easily while swimming. Capybaras also have webbing between their fingers and toes, which helps them dive and swim. These magnificent, wonderful, sociable, good-natured animals will help you and your children in training your memory, intellect and concentration. Carefully examine pictures and find all differences amongst them. You can mark the difference on any picture. Enjoy pictures of beautiful capybaras and train your memory with all your family! Features: * 10 levels. * Beautiful artworks. * Relaxing music. * Casual gameplay. * Simple control by mouse. * Achievements. * Game suited for all ages.

name: QuietMansion1
about_the_game: [Game Play] The aim of the game is to use a range of weapons, including handguns, shotguns, and rocket launchers, to defeat terrifying monsters and escape from the mansion and laboratory. The player is constantly forced to choose to either fight against their enemies or flee to safety. This management of the limited items available creates gameplay imbued with a sense of palpable tension. The game also features multiple endings, meaning that the game's conclusion changes dramatically based on the player's actions. [Graphics] QuietMansion1 is entirely compatible with 4K HDR! Provide visuals and gameplay of the ultimate quality. Even users with concerns about the capacity of their PC specs need not worry. *Also playable on full-HD displays. [Audio] The atmosphere generated by the 3D audio effects creates a brand-new horror experience unlike anything seen before. [Game Overview] Title : QuietMansion1 Genre : FPS survival action horror Play time : 1.5 to 2 hours (plus an additional 2 hours for Extreme Mode and additional content) Distribution permission : Full (video distribution and monetization permitted for any individual or company) Hashtag : #QuietMansion

name: Melon Journey: Bittersweet Memories
about_the_game: Melon Journey: Bittersweet Memories puts you in the shoes of Honeydew, a bunny headband-wearing employee of a melon soda factory who's on a mission to find her recently missing best friend. But is it really that safe traveling to a town where melon possession can land you in the slammer? And why is there a hamster so preoccupied with sneaking into the Kitten King's castle? Uncover the mystery in this latest story-exploration game from developer Froach Club. Explore a charming, pixelated world - filled to the brim with eccentric characters, criminals, and a plot as weird as it is cute. Features: Mystery at Every Turn Comb every inch of Hog Town to collect clues, trail shady characters, and sneak your way through the seedy underworld, using your keen observational skills and quick wit to piece together the whole picture before it’s too late. Silly Characters with Intricate Backstories While looking for your missing friend, you’ll encounter dozens of curious creatures with unique personalities and sometimes tragic backstories, adding additional mysteries for completionists to unravel. Jazzy Lo-Fi Soundtrack While you’re on the case, enjoy more than 90 different electronic and jazz-inspired tracks from composer markeryjane. Gorgeous Retro-Style Graphics The green-tinted, monochrome world is filled with loving detail, a nostalgic ode to the classic handheld generation with plenty of modern twists.

name: Paws and Whiskers
about_the_game: Choose a hero and continue to improve your abilities and learn new skills along the way. Lead an army of cats to victory! Without a backpack you have nothing! Pay attention to constantly expanding your backpack space, always adjusting the backpack storage items. Summon a powerful army of cats and kittens with the summoning stones in your backpack. You can spend all gold to buy any items you found.Full Your backpackage! Synthesize and upgrade the Summoning Stones through unique recipes, allowing them to summon even more powerful Cat Soldiers! Form different cat soldiers to fight against strong enemies! Collect magic scrolls to unleash powerful magic and instantly turn the tide of battle.

name: maboroshi caravan
about_the_game: ■Overview maboroshi caravan is an auto-play simulation game about a journey through the desert. The player becomes an observer of the caravan and sometimes watches over, sometimes advises and sometimes helps them on their journey. ■Recommended for Who do not have the time or energy to play games, but want to do something Who like abstract games (Who want to enjoy the freedom of imagination) Who want to enjoy watching the slightest change in the unchanging everyday life Who want to enjoy everyday life in a different world Who love deserts ■Additional information to avoid becoming 'Not for me' In terms of classification, it is just like an auto-play game, but it is not a game that focuses on efficiency and growth. If you are looking for the gameplay and functions of an idle game, there is a high possibility that it will not suit you. It's not a glittering desert. It's a world of dust and wilderness and camels and robbers. There are no shocking developments or heart pounding elements. It's a calm game. ■About Demo Version There are restrictions on destinations, levels, tribes, etc. The basic game cycle and text content is similar to the production version. View mode and various useful functions (transcendence) are available only in the product version. You can check the details of past updates from the official website. ■Story This desert is later given another name People called it the Chain Desert The cursed sandy earth that binds the souls of the dead There are caravans there to release the souls of the dead trapped in the desert Caravans appeared and disappeared like a mirage Its name is―― This is the story of a caravan and the observer who watches over it ■System The caravan's journey is automatically progressive. They are the ones who decide the destination of the journey. Their journey continues even while the player is not observing. The player can help them to properly handle the resources they have gathered, expand the size of their caravan, and add more members. There are three things players should do in the course of the game. It's 'Materialization,' 'Liberation,' and 'Caravan Leveling Up.' Materialization: The Materialization of the Soul Caught in the Chain Desert Liberation: Liberation of the materialized soul from the chain curse Caravan Leveling Up: Expanding the caravan by consuming resources gained during the journey There are other things you can do to make your journey more varied and efficient, but the basics are to do the above three things. Once in town, the caravan will conduct transactions and listen to the stories of the townspeople. The stories that can be heard in town vary from town-related stories, useful stories, and personal stories. Listen to what they have to say and enjoy the journey the world. The year in the desert is 354 days. It shows a variety of faces depending on the season, weather, and time. The events that the caravan encounters along the way will also be affected by the changing environment.

name: Legendary Knight
tags: Action,Strategy,Indie,RPG,Early Access,Tower Defense,Third Person,Tactical,Singleplayer,Medieval,Character Action Game,Hack and Slash,Voxel,Combat
about_the_game: 'Defend your kingdom. Protect the sacred statues. Lead your knights to victory.' The enemy is invading your lands, and only the Legendary Knight , the king himself, can rally his forces to stand against them. As both ruler and commander, you must lead your army , fortify defenses , and push back relentless waves of invaders to safeguard your kingdom. Core Gameplay Take control of the king and command your forces in strategic real-time battles. Every decision matters: Defend the statues that represent your kingdom’s ruling power Fight alongside your knights to repel endless enemy waves Manage resources wisely to strengthen your army and upgrade your defenses Build, Train & Strategize Before each battle, carefully prepare for the enemy assault: Purchase powerful items to boost your combat strength Train soldiers to improve their effectiveness in battle Assign generals and units to defend key buildings Learn new skills using experience gained on the battlefield to enhance your king and troops Game Modes & Content Choose your challenge and test your strategies: Classic Mode → Includes 3 unique maps with up to 40 intense waves Endless Mode → Survive as long as you can against an unstoppable horde 5 Playable Heroes → Each with unique abilities +1 DLC Hero available for even greater variety Difficulty & Replayability Victory won’t come easy — one mistake could cost you everything: If the sacred statue is destroyed or the king falls , defeat is immediate Master different heroes, upgrades, and strategies to adapt to tougher enemies Challenge yourself to survive longer, unlock new skills, and refine your tactics

name: PolyZen Drive
tags: Simulation,Automobile Sim,Driving,Relaxing,Atmospheric,Indie,Immersive Sim,Casual,Racing,Stylized,3D,Replay Value,Music,Retro,Controller,Character Customization,Open World,First-Person,Third Person,Action
about_the_game: PolyZen Drive: Your Style, Your Rules! Chill cruise at night or rush hour madness—your call! Feel the Freedom: PolyZen Drive is your driving playground! Cruise under the stars, race friends, weave through traffic, drift around corners, or just enjoy the view with cool tunes—it's all up to you. Endless styles, mini-games, cop chases, speed runs—your vibe, your ride! Solo or With Friends: Adventure solo or have a blast in multiplayer. Express your style and explore the sandbox with your pals! Dynamic Atmosphere, Dynamic Fun: Feel the thrill of changing weather and time! From calm nights to misty mornings and wild storms—every drive’s a new adventure! Customize Your Ride: Make it yours! Flashy colors, fine-tuned details—build your dream machine that screams 'YOU'! Soundtrack to Your Journey: Jam to your favorite tunes with PolyZen Drive's live radio. From reggae to synth-wave, let the music drive your adventure! Realistic Traffic, Real Fun: Tackle lifelike traffic with PolyZen Drive's smart AI. Dodge jams, surprise obstacles, and race friends or team up in multiplayer! Capture and Share: Snap epic moments with the in-game camera. Show off your best shots—every Steam screenshot is player-made with our camera mode! Start Your Adventure: Dive into PolyZen Drive—where every drive is a new thrill! Set your pace, make your rules, and enjoy endless fun. Jump in and redefine your driving experience today!

name: 東方幻想魔録W ～ The Devil of Decline
tags: RPG,Adventure,JRPG,Party-Based RPG,CRPG,Turn-Based Tactics,2D,Cute,Pixel Graphics,Top-Down,Fantasy,Hack and Slash,Female Protagonist,Story Rich,Singleplayer,Faith
about_the_game: ~Story~ -The Spiriting Away- An incident visited Gensokyo alongside summer. One by one, things all over Gensokyo began to disappear. It started with living things such as fairies and humans, then continued on to affect even inanimate objects like buildings. These mysterious happenings have struck fear into the people of Gensokyo. Is this an incident...? Just now, four individuals have set out amidst these strange events. Select one of these four protagonists, and resolve the spiriting away incident plaguing all of Gensokyo! There are over 100 allies called 'shikigami' to recruit. Combine shikigami however you like and bring the incident to its resolution! ~Game Systems~ 'Touhou Gensou Maroku W ~ The Devil of Decline' is a 2D turn-based RPG. After the prologue, you'll be able to select one of four protagonists. There are no major changes to enemy strength or the story between them, but there are differences in their ease of play, your initial party members, the type and number Spell Cards you start with, and so on. (The characters you didn't choose will join your party later.) Devil of Decline's main selling point is its shikigami system. Putting it simply, it's a system that lets you 'equip your allies.' *Touhou Gensou Maroku W is a Touhou Project fangame. Touhou Project is a copyright of Team Shanghai Alice.

name: Lance A Lot: Enhanced Edition
about_the_game: Grab your couch and your friends and get ready to lance a lot . Lance A Lot® is a fast-paced local multiplayer game about jousting. Except you’re on rockets. Because let’s face it, knights on rockets are way cooler. And if anyone says otherwise, then challenge them to a duel and prove them wrong! Glorious Features Lance A Lot! You have a rocket lance that you can poke your friends with to cause a one hit kill. Or fire it from your hands to skewer them to the wall. We're pretty sure your friend deserved it. SMASH. EVERYTHING. You have a Rocket Hammer to bash each other with. Smack them into things, take out all that internal aggression on the controller. Interact with your environment. Bash rockets for an excessive amount of explosions. Don't like trees? Yeah, no one does, so break them with your hammer. You also have Holy Hand Grenades. Throw them. Throw all of them. Change your playstyle with 4 different game modes and 6 different rulesets. You can fight over territory in King of the Hill until everyone is yelling at each other, or smack each other out of the arena in Sumo. We're pretty sure that's how rockets work. Play solo against AI. They're pretty smart. A little too smart. Suspiciously smart.
