name: wurdweb
about_the_game: Grab words from a list and cross them with words on the board. Puzzle your way towards a Finish Tile, put down enough words, or put down as many words as you can! In this game, you'll find: Infinite unique puzzles, generated by an intelligent algorithm. Challenges, to let you try different play styles. Daily, Weekly and Monthly Puzzles, where you put down as many words as you can! Numbered Puzzles, a sequence of slightly harder puzzles. On top of that, you'll also find: Cute little characters who walk around in your puzzles doing absolutely nothing. Leaderboards for Daily, Weekly and Monthly Puzzles, for when you feel competitive. Make Your Own Puzzle, where you get to pick the type of puzzle, the theme, and the optional variation. Play with controllers compatible with your device. wurdweb can generate puzzles in the following languages: Dutch English (U.K.) English (U.S.) French (Canada) French (France) German Italian Portuguese (Brazil) Russian Spanish (Latin America) Turkish Swedish Polish On top of the languages above, the interface (but not the puzzles!) is also available in the following languages: Japanese Arabic Chinese (Simplified) Chinese (Traditional) Korean wurdweb is designed by Aran Koning and Adriaan de Jongh, two game designers and friends from the Netherlands.

name: Explorer of Yggdrasil
about_the_game: Yggdrasil, also known as 'The Tower of God', is a giant tower that reaches all the way to the clouds. It is commonly believed among explorers that weapons of all kinds can be found within the tower. One day, a kind-hearted explorer named Mei rescues an armless man during a chance encounter. The man discovers that Mei had lost her memories while exploring the tower. Having just realized her predicament, Mei yearns to discover the truth behind her amnesia. Fortunately, being a mage, the armless man Gilles senses their answer lies within Yggdrasil itself. Together with her new ally, Mei embarks on her journey to explore Yggdrasil once more, aiming to reach the top of the tower and uncover the mystery of her past. Features: Unique Combat System Many Weapons to Collect Change Appearance with Collectable Outfits Fully Voiced Heroine Uncover the Mysteries of Yggdrasil

name: Tactical Nexus
about_the_game: About the Game Enter the Tactical Nexus: What lies underneath the cute and colorful pixel-art RPG facade is nothing less than one of the world’s most difficult hand-crafted puzzle games. A combination of resource management, logic puzzles, and tantalizing power-ups are your tools to climb up the enemy-riddled floors of each Magic Tower! Tactical Nexus is a single-player Magic Tower game inspired by the classic game “Tower of the Sorcerer,” combining magic, power-ups, and multitudes of monstrous foes to defeat and delve deeper into each Tower! From the team: This is our Puzzle RPG that can be played for 10,000 hours. A resource management game with overwhelming “quality-of-life functionality' to conquer puzzles with overwhelmingly high difficulty. One of the world's top 3 indie games in terms of average play time. Features and Content The base game includes twelve Magic Towers, with dozens of hand-crafted floors to navigate, explore, and grow your power! The base game can reward you for hundreds of hours of gameplay with continued meta progress that allows you to take another step further! There are no random elements used, no procedural generation, and to advance you’ll need to find the best way through your enemies and reach the ‘Clear’ tile. Every tower will remain the same each time you play it, yet you can grow stronger! Undo and redo every action instantly! Save, and see what happens when you try things in a different order or do something a little different! Load into a previous game state instantly and compare with Status Stamps! Scout each Magic Tower’s depths to further your own insight and plan meticulous routes with shareable Memos! Score well to earn meta-progression resources, Sunstones and Medals. Reuse them each time that you start a Magic Tower, and unlock new depths! Face the difficult Nexus stage, or perhaps even the terrifying ‘Clowns’! Achieve ‘Pure’ scores for more Sunstones rewards by playing a tower without meta-progression medals. Thousands of hours of deep strategy and tactical decision making gameplay are able to be enjoyed without any mindless grind: Return to each Magic Tower with more meta resources to improve your score, obtain more Sunstones and upgrade your Medal to the max, and repeat the cycle, with each step only becoming a more difficult puzzle to solve! Blunder your way through the world’s most accessible NP-hard problems disguised as treasure rooms with trillions upon trillions of permutations and even more novel solutions. No microtransactions! Advance only by the best Tactical strategy! Each DLC contains several complete hand-crafted Magic Towers with dozens of floors, new mechanics and gimmicks, each with new meta progression resources, adding another layer of meta progress to all previous towers for a compounding effect of thousands of hours of gameplay! Take on the later DLC Magic Towers when you’re ready, without needing to wait for them to be on sale: Tactical Nexus DLC will not be discounted before 2027! No mods and no NSFW derivative works are permitted due to various legal limitations. TeamNexus strongly encourages use of its systems and design, so feel free to implement a ‘Nexus system’ into your own game or mods for other games! Join the Human Hive Mind A robust Discord community server invites all players to share their high scores as well as their Memos and strategic insight. Work together to find the best solutions that you can—there will always be a way to improve! Become the trailblazing hero with the most Sunstones, find new routes and solutions, or make new friends as you learn to play one of the world’s hardest games! 'Won't using the Discord for help make the game no fun?' This is normally the case for a puzzle game, and in a few situations, you might find a particular experience more hollow in Tactical Nexus due to the help you receive, but Tactical Nexus does avoid a common 'pitfall' of difficult puzzle games: it never ends or runs out of genuinely novel problems with extremely particular solutions. Tactical Nexus remains in active development with more DLC on the way! The small development team is always looking for feedback, will respond to your messages and questions on the Discord server, and even implement your suggestions. name: Scarlet City of Devils
tags: Action,Action-Adventure,Adventure,Metroidvania,Indie,Anime,Demons,Combat,Singleplayer,2D Platformer,Souls-like,2D,1980s,Dark Fantasy,Dystopian,Story Rich,Boss Rush,Cute,Hack and Slash,Controller
about_the_game: Features  2d Metroidvania exploration with 5-9 hours of playtime.  Soulslike combat against Elovelle's toughest thugs.  Six free-flowing movement weapons can be found throughout the city.  Boss Rush Mode unlocks once you beat the game for the first time.  About the game  Elovelle. A city of devils. Demons across the city fractured into clans in the pursuit of their desires. The most notorious among them were the Knights of Virtue. The Knights of Virtue seized the famed Fountain of Elovelle and built a fortress around it. Speaking words of virtue to the powerful Essence. Many clans now wage war against the Knights. Attempting to take the fountain's power for themselves and become the new masters of the city. Chaos reigns across Elovelle. Ferality spreads throughout the realm. This is the story of one who would try to heal the broken heart of this city. And how I stopped her…

name: Captain Sabertooth and the Magic Diamond
about_the_game: Embark on an epic quest for treasure in Captain Sabertooth and the Magic Diamond, a pirate platform-adventure game for the whole family!  Play as either Pinky or Sunniva, and join the legendary pirate Captain Sabertooth's crew on the hunt for a mysterious magic diamond. Traverse a dangerous yet gorgeous world as you sail between islands and explore pirate harbours, exotic beaches and ancient ruins. Search for treasure, collect upgrades and new abilities, and fight against the evil Maga Khan and his army!

name: 3D Math - Ultra
about_the_game: Hello! - Why, 3D Math – Ultra: - In this game I'm trying to implement dynamic and positive game-play, with a good, responsive and dynamic behavior. I'm looking for a solution that could be make the game less tiring and would help to sustain desire to dive back into that training. * (also a few alternative UI interfaces will be available in the future, a minimal UI for example) - What you have to do: - Improve Computational and Logical skills Study all Formulas from School teaching. Step your iq up. - How to learn formulas: - In the game formulas are combined on a separate desk, I tried to include the maximum number of formulas, even some rare not common tricks. I supplemented each formula with a special decomposition to help understand how these formulas were derived. There’s also a tables. And one of the things tables is table's formulas need to be manually entered, each operator, separately. * (this is an experimental release, some formulas are not yet included, but the papers are ready already) - How to improve brain skills: - There're special dynamic training mini-games that are placed on a several tables at the right. Each game has a wide range of difficulty levels In order to systematize the training exercises, I’ve mixed the tasks separately and added them to the Challenge mode. Challenge mode includes over 200 to-do lists each of which includes 3 or 5 tasks, with increasing difficulty level. Which means you’ll have more that 1500 minutes brain training game-play There is a help section in the game that will help you to master common functions in short time. Take that if you wanna try to pick up all the school formulas or just pump your brain.

name: Monmusu Gladiator
about_the_game: A board game, card game, and monster girl-raiser all in one! Build the perfect deck in this cute & casual roguelite action RPG! Having become a monster breeder, it's time for you overcome various trials and hardships with the monster girls ('monmusu') at your side, and raise them to be the greatest monster girls there ever were! Crush the competition in the arenas, and deliver their freedom! Raise cute monster girls with cards! Pick and choose cards to train and strengthen your monster girls! Move forward on the map for the number at the top left of each card, and trigger events! Will you prioritize raising your monster girls? Making them fight? Or maybe you're more of a shopping fiend! Overcome the competition, and aim to come out on top of all the arenas! Engage in thought-provoking battles, evaluating the enemies' actions with straightforward controls that only involve clicking! Fight until either side goes down! Win, and now you've got your hands on some powerful cards and artifacts! Use them to take your monster girl to new heights! And once you're done raising one monster girl...? A delivery of Magic Stones in your name, based on your score! Unlock new cards and characters, and challenge yourself once more! Raise all 13 monster girl types, and become the greatest monster girl trainer there ever was!

name: Hellsinker.
about_the_game: Overview A legendary SHMUP influential to the best makers in the genre, Hellsinker is now available on steam in its most advanced form! A mindbogglingly deep gameplay experience that gets deeper as your skill progresses. Intense boss battles one after another. Fragmented and epodic lore texts leave the player to piece together a story for themselves. [B]Gameplay, story, graphics, and even music all united into one cohesive and highly dimensional Shoot-em-up![/B] Story The world was long ago split in two by the sudden collapse of an advanced civilization and the destruction of the ancient and powerful core mechanism that reigned over it it. GRAVEYARD A band of those who have great stake in the remains, studiers of the various surviving artifacts of the lost civilization. Each member's fate was once connected to the remains in some way. EXECUTORS Watchers that live only in obsession. An obsession to sever the fate they are bonded by. Agents who exist as 'Those who must go to the place they are meant to go'. The ceaseless echos of a severed past. Their devotion is a torch that renders through the darkness and guides them toward their final duty. The ruins to which they are all bound to by fate...have yet again appeared on the surface world. Playable Characters DEAD LIAR The longest living member of the Graveyard survivors. Standard.Specializes in cooperative tactics with his Misteltoe, Tobari-Maru. His narrow range of attack makes him enviable to delicate and precise operations, But he packs an equally worthy level of firepower. FOSSIL MAIDEN A female of great latent ability, but whose blindness and poor physical health make her reliant on the support of her Misteltoe. Effective mainly at subjugating spaces with her wide area of attack, she is also capable of highly powerful single shot attacks. MINOGAME An androgynous android deity created by a mysterious religious organization long ago. Their main shot is rather simple , but their innate defensive capabilities and wide AOE attack excel at handling large numbers of targets. Gameplay Utilize a plethora of unique skills to attack and maneuver through long intense stages! How you chose to master each character's strengths and weaknesses will be the key to victory. Whether you take your enemies head on, play it slow and steady, or hit them with precision from a distance...Each play style possesses inherent merits, and inherent faults. Adaptive on-the-fly strategy and an awareness of your position and targets will also be critical to success. Features 8+ stages that change in form and intensity in real time as you progress. 3 characters + a bonus character each with drastically differing play styles to explore. Replay function and Boss fight selection mode. More than 40 unique tracks of doujin game music. 3 element scoring system. Limited give-and-take style life point system and bullet guard elements designed to encourage strategy. Unique life extend system that can be capitalized on with the right skill and know-how. Expanded digital manual with access to gameplay and story information. Easy to learn tutorial for basic play and a no-limits practice mode. [/B]

name: Sonority
about_the_game: A unique puzzle mechanic using melodies In Sonority the players explore a lost world in which music is magic and with whose help you can progress through the game. The puzzles are solved by the correct arrangement of notes. The solution is deduced acoustically or using symbols. No previous musical knowledge necessary. The player takes on the role of young Esther, who sets out on a journey to help a friend. Equipped with her pan flute, she reaches the mysterious rockery. But soon her path is blocked and she must use the power of music to overcome the obstacles. Not always an easy task. In a world lapsed into silence, Esther rediscovers lost songs and mossy works of art. Naturally aided by singing stones and a talking raccoon. Yet there seems to be no trace of the legendary preceptors of music. The further you get, the trickier the game becomes. Collect new notes and instruments to overcome even the most difficult puzzles of the preceptors. Features Interesting new puzzle mechanic based on melodies. (Simple note sequences develop into small melodies and then into complex pieces of music.) A touching story about Esther and an old, oddball raccoon and his singing stone friends. A lovingly designed, cohesive 3D game world with varied locations. Atmospheric, extensive soundtrack with English and German versions of original songs. Play with keyboard or controller.

name: exclusive memory
about_the_game: Three Days of Crisis: Exclusive Memories 'is a suspenseful love story full dynamic live action interactive video game. The whole game is a process of exploration and puzzle solving, in which you will delve into a complex and mysterious story. Collect clues through interactions with different characters, solve puzzles, and gradually uncover the truth hidden behind them Welcome to join the official QQ communication group：460786833 Follow our Bilibili and Tiktok account：三日危情独家的记忆 ------------------------------------------------------------------------- Product Features The whole process adopts a first person perspective, allowing players to experience the VR like feeling from a more realistic perspective. You need to carefully consider your options. When your beloved girl is stuck in a quagmire, you need to carefully discover the clues left in the game to avoid potential accidents. Numerous branches and more endings, as well as more hidden storylines and Easter eggs. Is what you see the whole picture of the situation? Or rather, there are other hidden secrets buried within the woven lies. Our game has designed over a hundred story branches, dozens of endings, multiple hidden storylines and Easter eggs, a rich achievement system, and a large number of text dialogue arrangements for you. Real person performance, real-life shooting. Our production team hopes to provide players with a more immersive experience through scenes and sound effects music, and give interactive video games new vitality through some onomatopoeic environmental sounds. Create scenes that are more in line with the character's persona, as well as quieter suspense scenes. The plot arrangement, our production team understands that the current market cannot attract more players through mediocre works, so we will provide players with a higher quality plot and dialogue arrangement to experience the 2.0 version of the game. Six girls with vastly different personalities can meet, including your fianc é e, childhood sweetheart, new intern at a biotech company, well-known Coser from a university club, former F1 racer, and professional boxer in free combat. They have different personalities, but they all have a good impression of you. ------------------------------------------------------------------------- Chen Wanning: Miss Qianjin, your considerate, gentle, and meticulous fianc é e. Not only in words, but also in actions to express her love. Willing to give for you and become a ray of sunshine in your life. Mengxin: The changeable anime cos girl, innocent and lovely, is curious about new things and has a sincere love for the world. Qianshu: An intellectual and elegant research intern, everything that is happening is perfectly logically consistent with literature or reason, and has a strong interest in cosmic theory and books Wu Bingyu: A free fighting boxer who dares to love and hate, with his own set of standards for the logic of right and wrong in all things in the world, capable but with beautiful curves, and has a deep understanding of combat joint techniques. Zhao Yawen: President of a biotechnology company, your childhood sweetheart. A leader with both decision-making and leadership abilities, possessing innovative thinking and a strong sense of responsibility. Arrogant and fickle, there is a gentle garden in one's heart Gianna: The heroic motorcycle girl is decisive and cheerful, naturally familiar but with a sense of boundaries About Us Our production team comes from various industries, and we believe that many developers start as players before developing a game. While marveling at the magic of reality and the pressure of life, we are addicted to games. Games are the ninth art form, with strong inclusiveness. We have found that there are many types that are very niche, but have a small circle of players belonging to that group. Our game genre is somewhere between interactive dramas and games, and we hope to incorporate more elements of criminal investigation, suspense, or other elements into the medium of love movies and games. Provide a more diverse display for love movies and games. ending In the development of interactive romantic video games, we have witnessed the peak of several games and the disappointment they have brought to players. We listen to the voices of players. Thank you very much for opening up this theme, which allowed our production team to come together and bring this work to all gamers. I believe everyone was attracted by the excellent plot and excellent dialogue arrangement, but in the beginning, everyone went in the wrong direction. Perhaps many people have an unforgettable opposite sex companion during their childhood, and when you are getting married, how will she face it emotionally. Each conversation is carefully designed to give players the most authentic feeling of love. You will face various choices and intertwined emotions, gradually uncovering the secrets of memories, while finding your true love in these beautiful and moving stories. In terms of dubbing, we use the original actor's dubbing method. In some event environments, we have increased the volume of tone words and some nasal and oral sounds. Further enhance the audio-visual experience, hoping to provide players with a better experience. Get ready for this challenging and romantic journey! Exclusive Memories will take you on an unforgettable love adventure, where every choice you make will affect the development of the story and ultimately determine who you will spend the future with.

name: Munchy Mammals
about_the_game: Munchy Mammals is a tricky puzzle game about strategy, snacking, and survival. Guide adorable animals of various lengths as they munch on fruit—and sometimes each other—to squeeze into their hiding spots! As the player, you'll need to plan their moves carefully. Each mammal has unique skills and diets, from gentle herbivores to meat-loving carnivores, adding a delicious twist to every puzzle. With over 60 challenging levels, evolving creatures, and a level editor for endless new challenges, Munchy Mammals will keep you thinking and munching. Ready to outsmart the food chain? Level Editor Think you’ve mastered all 60+ levels? Test your skills with endless player-made puzzles, and collect more gold medals than any muncher before! With fresh levels added regularly, the challenges never end. Unleash your creativity and design your own levels to share with the world. Features 60+ mind-bending puzzles with increasing difficulty 5 different areas with unique art Minimalist design; no keys, boxes, or doors to distract from the puzzles Move tracker & medals for the perfectionists Fully-featured Level Editor to create and share your own puzzles Endless new levels from players around the world in the level browser

The end goal is simple enough, the player who has the most Victory Points at the end of the game wins! Players acquire Victory Points by employing a variety of maid cards that allow for different strategies when played together. You can even employ more interesting, unique maids that stick around to use their special powers each per turn! But beware, your opponents can make your maids sick or give them bad habits, affecting your maids in negative ways and decreasing your Victory Points! name: Old Coin Pusher Friends 3
about_the_game: For video creators and streamers STP WORKS permits the use of our games for video distribution to YouTube and other sites, and monetization through video distribution platform partner programs. Game Overview This is the 3rd in a series of online co-op coin pusher games, 'Old Coin Pusher Friends,' set in the Edo period. In this installment, there is a Sugoroku (board game) themed around the Tokaido Fifty-Three Stations, with various events triggered by the squares you land on. Work together with other players to defeat yokai, punish corrupt officials, and aim for the jackpot. As you progress in the game, you can enhance your abilities with various upgrades. Multiplayer There are two types of multiplayer modes: random matchmaking and friend matchmaking. Whether you want to experience one-time encounters with random players or play with your friends, the game can be played in various styles. You can play with up to four people at once. Sugoroku Advance by collecting dice that appear on the board. Various events are triggered depending on the squares you land on. Co-op Events There are cooperative mini-games such as defeating yokai, punishing corrupt officials and evil magistrates, and dealing with volcanic eruptions. The strength of the yokai increases according to the players' strength, and the stronger the yokai, the more prizes they drop. Prize Collection Collect various Edo-period-themed prizes. The more prizes you collect, the more rewards you receive at reach the goal of the Sugoroku. Ability Enhancements & Avatars There are various upgrade features such as Gatling guns, auxiliary launchers, appearance changes for pieces and launchers, attack power upgrades, and increased firing speed.

name: GABANG: ULTIMATE
about_the_game: GABANG: ULTIMATE is a roguelike deck-building game where you use the items in your bag to defeat your enemies and build your own deck. You go on an adventure to defeat The Devil with the mysterious bag from a goddess that holds items indefinitely. Will you be able to reach the Cursed Land safely and defeat the Devil? Build your own deck, with over 350+ different items and multiple classes! Defeat enemies through items of your choice that are randomly placed! Complete a lot of achievements and collect various outfits !

name: Caromble!
about_the_game: This is Caromble ! ; A fresh new take on the brick break game! Free the corrupted world and fight evil with physics-based destruction, puzzles, explosions, skill-levels, power-ups, mayhem, more explosions, further puzzles, speedruns, superscore medals, unlockable challenges and some surprises you would't expect in a brick breaker game. Brick break your way to glory and discover a world of nostalgic wonder. Let’s get ready to Caromble ! The full release of Caromble! will feature: Six chapters Each level has multiple playable areas Physics based destruction Medals for speed runs and highscores Numerous unlockable skill levels Powerups Explosions Powerups that cause explosions Explosions that release powerups Puzzles And yes... platforming elements (say what?!) Bonus: we decided to include a more elaborate story than originally intended :) The current state of the Early Access build is: Optimized for performance Contains all story content: 24 levels 8 unlockable skill levels Production quality equivalent to release quality It's Awesome! Please help us improve Caromble! Report bugs. Play the game. Enjoy the mechanics. Don't like the mechanics? Tell us about it! Tell us why you think Caromble! is great. Tell us why you think it stinks. Know somebody who might enjoy Caromble! ? Help us find them! We're forever in your debt. Thank you for playing Caromble!

name: Once Upon A Puppet
about_the_game: Welcome to Once Upon a Puppet, a 2.5D puzzle-platformer that unfolds within a vibrant world of theater. Take part in a magical tale that combines classic platforming with puppet-inspired gameplay, in a captivating story of friendship, self-discovery, and redemption. Wear the glove of Nieve, a Stagehand exiled to the Understage, and wield control over Drev’s strings, a Puppet magically bound to her. As they journey to return to the Frontstage above, they will retell forgotten stories, uncover shadowy secrets, and learn their fate is interwoven with the kingdom of theater itself. Become Puppet and Puppeteer: Pull the strings and master the art of puppetry in this unique approach to action, movement, and creative puzzle-solving. A Troupe of Characters: Meet an ensemble cast of dozens of Major and supporting characters, featuring hundreds of lines of handcrafted dialogue. Deadly Shadows: Face a horde of villainous creatures who will do all they can to snuff out the lights and bring the show to an untimely end. A Meticulously Crafted World: Marvel at the stylized and detailed graphics and 2D cutscenes that reinforce the magic of theater, with stages that fluctuate between past and present. Set The Scene: Arrange and move props, backdrops and characters to rebuild theatrical stages, and re-enact scenes to unveil what befell the once proud World Stage. Enchanting Soundscapes: Be captivated by a rich, theatrical soundtrack and immersive sound effects that bring the world of Once Upon a Puppet to life... Collectibles : Observant players will find a variety of collectible surprises along the way! Unwittingly bound together by spool and thread, Drev and Nieve reluctantly embark on a quest to reclaim their place in the theater, against a heartbroken King. Nieve, a talented Weaver beset by self doubt, builds a strong bond with Drev, a naive yet ambitious Actor. With Drev's unbridled theatrics and Nieve's brilliance, they will conquer their deepest held fears to reveal the truth of the void harbored in their hearts.

name: CRAYON SHINCHAN The Storm Called! FLAMING KASUKABE RUNNER!!
about_the_game: ・Simple and fun action-packed runner game! An exhilarating runner game featuring everyone's favorite 'Crayon Shin-chan'! Jump past obstacles, collecting sweets and 'golden balls' along the way. Easy-to-use controls mean anyone can jump right in! ・Full of Shin-chan's costumes and reliable crew! Use the 'golden balls' and 'medals' earned in-game to collect Shin-chan's costumes from the animated series and movies along with picking up crew along the way. ・Hone your skills and continue challenging! Not stopping at just clearing a stage, you can continue having fun by aiming for the high score and completing goals, obtaining all the costumes, and gathering the entire crew.

name: Warrior Maiden Lecia and the Lost Fortress
tags: Nudity,Sexual Content,Action,NSFW,Adventure,RPG,JRPG,Action-Adventure,Action RPG,2D,Mystery Dungeon,Dungeon Crawler,Female Protagonist,Fantasy,Story Rich,Multiple Endings,Singleplayer,Indie,Hentai,Anime
about_the_game: A fresh graduate of the military academy, the honor student Lecia has just joined the ranks and received her first posting. She is to head to Kreist Fortress, a remote outpost far from the capital Central. However, what awaits her is the Lost Fortress fallen into disrepute at the hands of her new commander. As a result of his continued neglect of the local town's troubles, the reputation of Kreist Fortress is at rock bottom and the locals have completely lost their confidence in the military. Lecia alone will have to struggle day by day to regain their trust and to reform this utterly corrupt Lost Fortress! This game provides full-scale action battles. Control Lecia as she rips through monsters, lowlifes, and worse, chain skills, parry, evade, and execute exhilarating combos with simple controls! 5 difficulty levels for a wide range of players. A variety of guns to compliment your main-hand sword. Fun minigames and quests for when you want to take a break from fighting.

name: Blade Jumper
about_the_game: Blade Jumper is a 2D action platformer where players use a simple jump mechanic in order to climb the obstacle-filled tower. In 2045's Yeouido, in the heart of Seoul, the massive structure Kukuru Tower was constructed, overshadowing the rest of the city. In this unfathomably high tower, the selected 1% of Seoul residents live their happy lives, separated from the outside world. From their headquarters within Kukuru Tower, the authoritarian Unreality conglomerate dominates Seoul with pleasurable feelings, using its highly addictive Kukuru Candies. The vigilante group Ground Z, preparing for the final battle to overthrow Unreality's hold, comes looking for you, their former infamous agent. Are you ready to climb the mysterious Kukuru Tower? ▶Stylish jumping action to stimulate your desire for a challenge!◀ Players must perform all movements and attacks with one single action: the jump attack slash. They must navigate the enemy units determined to send the protagonist crashing downward, all while continuing their own constant climb. Use skilled controls and reactions to elegantly deal with your enemies, or you may taste frustration as you're sent back to the start. ▶Various mob designs and stage layouts◀ Within the Kukuru Tower, completely cut off from the outside world, more adventure awaits than the players can even imagine. Target and push through the various enemy units with unique quirks, the map topography that highlights the extraordinary charms of each zone, and the hidden traps in order to conquer each map. ▶A story hiding within this alluring world◀ As the players climb the tower, they will encounter all sorts of characters and discover breathtaking records. The higher they climb, the further this hidden truth will gradually be revealed—and with it, the feeling of unease. Why does the player climb the tower alongside these characters? What awaits them at the top? Reach the tower's pinnacle to reveal the truth. ©2022 bit paradigm All rights reserved. Published by CFK. ※ Regarding gameplay upload and streaming Any individual or company may stream or upload videos of this game as long as the copyright information and store URLs are included within the video description or the video itself. We would appreciate creators leaving out spoilers of the ending whenever possible.

name: VR Battleship YAMATO
about_the_game: Full Scale Restoration of the Japanese battleship “Yamato” in VR. Battleship Yamato was constructed during the World War Ⅱ in 1941, and it was the biggest battleship ever built. Unfortunately, Yamato didn’t last through the war, and it sank to the bottom of the sea. Now, battleship Yamato is completely restored in full scale in VR. It is based on the blueprints and the recollections of the actual crew who are still alive. In this app, you can actually get on Yamato and walk across the deck, climb up the bridge, and go inside the ship. See the Yamato crew taking command. View the explosions of the gun fire from a close distance. The list below shows what you can actually see in the first edition of VR Yamato. ・Deck ・Inside the first bridge ・Inside the main gun ・Scene of the crew practicing firing the gun ・Fire control center ・Captain’s cabin ・Pilot house ・Hangar ・Ship’s kitchen With VR Yamato, enjoy the battleship from the perspective of an actual crew.

name: One-inch Tactics
about_the_game: Turn the tide of the war with nuanced strategies in One-inch Tactics. Now available, One-inch Tactics introduces players to a unique turn-based strategy experience. Kogado Studio, recognized for it's simulation games in the early days of PC gaming, has taken on the challenge of simplicity in this title. Beneath the game's simple design lies a deep, strategic complexity. Immerse yourself in the unparalleled enjoyment of strategy. Intuitive, simple and smooth operation. Featuring an interactive 3D playing field, the game resembles a multidimensional board game, creating a relaxed, tabletop gaming atmosphere. Choose from a variety of missions. Traverse mountains, urban areas, fortresses, and more, making sure to use the right equipment for each setting. Keep in mind line of sight and line of fire as your strategy will have to take into account hilltops, cliff shadows and shields. Carefully search for and uncover the enemy position to gain the upper hand in your operations. Each pilot has their own strengths and weaknesses. It's important to organize your squad to make the most of their characteristics. Staff Planning/Production : KOGADO STUDIO Executive Producer : Ippei Tani Producer : Takanori Kitagawa, Chizuru Fuke Program : Kazuma Funayama Production Manager：Keisuke Kawai Graphic Supervisor: Kohei Yamada 3D Model Production: PUNKT 2D Graphics: Yaski Galactor Design: Arisa Music: Yasuhito Saito

name: Cute Cats 2
about_the_game: Cute kittens return to play the new puzzle with you! Find differences between two almost identical pictures and enhance your memory and attention by this. You can mark the difference on any of the two pictures. After three fail, the game will end. The level of complexity will increase gradually, but you can make it! Meow... Features: * 10 levels. * Beautiful artwork. * Relaxing music. * Casual gameplay. * Simple control by mouse. * Achievements. * The game is suitable for all ages.

name: Path of Ra
about_the_game: In Path of Ra , you accompany the soul of a Pharaoh reincarnated as a hieroglyph on the murals of his tomb. Move the slabs and create a path for him to collect the fragments of his heart. Relive his story and discover the circumstances of his death through sumptuous hand-crafted cinematics. A UNIQUE AESTHETIC Inspired by the magnificent hieroglyphic frescoes of the pyramids, Path of Ra will take you on a journey into Ancient Egypt as you have never seen it before. EASY TO PLAY Move and rotate the tiles with a simple swipe to rearrange the murals. The game is designed to be played by anyone. Over 60 carefully hand-crafted levels offer a challenge with each new painting. AN ORIGINAL SOUND TRACK The music and the different soundscapes will immerse you in the mystic atmosphere of ancient Egypt. Headphones are recommended for an optimal experience.

name: Lotion samurai
about_the_game: 'About this game' Operate the samurai covered with lotion to escape from Ninja Castle! However, I can not walk because I slip with lotion. By kicking the wall, you can take advantage of the slickness, slip through the enemy's attack, and head to the exit! 'Game features' ・ If you hit an enemy, you can cut it, so you can concentrate on your escape while enjoying the pleasure of defeating. ・ Unprecedented sprint feeling due to the fusion of lotion and samurai! Kill many ninjas and escape at super high speed! ・ Learn the terrain, refine your acceleration techniques, and repaint the rankings! ・ Aim to escape from the Ninja Castle by capturing 6 unique stages!

name: Hero and Daughter+
about_the_game: This is the classic story of good old Ralph, the legendary hero from RPG Maker VX Ace, on his quest to defeat the diabolical Demon Lord. Ralph has been reduced to Level 1, and must rely on a cast of ladies straight out of the daydreams of the game's creator in order to succeed on his quest! Hero and Daughter+ is a game about serious dungeon crawling, fun-loving comedy, and beautiful, powerful girls! The first Japanese RPG Maker game to be fully translated and made available on Steam for an English audience, Hero and Daughter+ received the top prize at the NikoNiko Indie Game Festival - Japan's biggest indie game contest! Mr. Koichi Nakamura, the creator of the Dragon Quest series and Mystery Dungeon: Shiren The Wanderer, gave Hero and Daughter+ high praise! Featuring: A quirky RPG where the hero is severely underpowered Summon over 30 powerful, talented, and magical girls to do all your fighting for you Use stat boosts to help Ralph survive his harrowing, heroic journey More than 10 hours of storyline play with enough side quests and features to keep you in the game for as long as you want Defeat the Challenge Tower's 9,999 levels... Good luck with that Tons of items, weapons, and armor to keep your team safe as they lunge forward into dangerous dungeons Customizable and upgradable player housing A heavy focus on character interactions with lots of special scenes for each playable character Full of humor that plays spectacularly on RPG tropes Warning: Some of the female characters are scantily clad - may not be suitable for children The asset pack of Hero and Daughter+ for RPG Maker VX ACE is available as FREE DLC!

name: New Heights: Realistic Climbing and Bouldering
about_the_game: Get ready for the ultimate climbing & bouldering simulation game, with more than 250 routes across real-world European locations. Made by real climbers, New Heights allows you to experience some of the real challenges and feelings that come up when you're up there. New Heights comes with workshop support for creating & sharing custom routes and fully custom locations. Experience Climbing on a New Level New Heights allows you to experience parts of the real climbing experience and technique. It features the most realistic physics-based climbing mechanics to date, taking grip, balance, body position and hold directions into account. Approach climbing and bouldering problems just like in real life. Feel the adrenaline rush as you make your way upwards, and the sense of accomplishment as you reach the top. Explore Epic European Crags Explore more than 25 of routes across Europe, from quick boulder sessions in Fontainbleau to 30 minute climbs at Freÿr, Belgium and old ruins of castles and chapels. Push the boundaries of what's possible in climbing and bouldering. Try out free solo climbing and bouldering from the safety of your computer and climb routes that are inaccessible in real life. Create Custom Routes and Locations Create locations with full creative freedom using our custom Unity-based workshop tool. Set your routes with pre-made holds, or import any 3D model to climb it in New Heights. Or design new pitches while climbing at existing crags. The workshop possibilities are vast! Key Features Realistic climbing gameplay: physics-based climbing mechanics that test your balance, body position and grip. Dyno's are also supported. More than 250 real world routes: Real cliffs and structures made possible by photogrammetry and drones. New content is added regularly. Climb the impossible: Climb in locations you might never visit, or where it's not allowed in real life. Try out free solo climbing from the safety of your computer. Workshop support: Create and share your own routes in New Heights, and create fully custom locations with our Unity-based tool. Leaderboards: (Optionally) compete with your friends and other players to get the fastest times on the leaderboards. Climb when you can't: Experience that climbing feeling even if you're injured or otherwise unable to climb. Conquer fear of heights in a virtual setting, or climb your favourite route on a really rainy day. New Heights is the ultimate climbing and bouldering game for anyone who wants to experience the thrill of climbing in the most authentic and immersive way possible. Get ready to reach new heights!

name: Nova: Cloudwalker's Tale
about_the_game: Nova: Cloudwalker's Tale is a charming puzzle game where you move, combine and walk on clouds to gather star shards and make your way through the skies. Key features Explore over 70 levels carefully crafted to challenge you with unique puzzle mechanics. Make use of 4 types of clouds: rearrange and merge them to make your way across the skies. Travel over 4 unique dreamlike regions as The Cloudwalker in your journey to reunite the lost star shards. Rich, atmospheric presentation of a devastated fantasy land, with stunning visuals and evocative music. Enjoy non-linear exploration of a world full of mystery and legends, through wordless storytelling.

name: TRAUMA Broken Paradise
tags: Adventure,Puzzle,Exploration,Hidden Object,Third Person,1990's,Atmospheric,Emotional,Psychological,Retro,Supernatural,Horror,Survival Horror,Psychological Horror,Thriller,Old School,Story Rich,Combat,Inventory Management,Resource Management
about_the_game: Welcome to TRAUMA Broken Paradise 🎭A true Psychological Survival Horror experience!🩸 🎭 Psychological Horror – A subgenre of horror that focuses on the player’s mind , creating fear through tension, atmosphere, and storytelling. Instead of relying on direct jump scares, it explores deep themes like paranoia, insanity, and the unknown , making the player question reality within the game. 🩸 Survival Horror – A genre centered on surviving against terror , where resources are limited, and every decision matters. The player must face terrifying threats, either through combat or specific mechanics to fight back. Fear comes not only from the enemies but also from the character’s vulnerability and constant tension . Both genres can blend, creating unique experiences where the player not only survives but also feels the psychological weight of horror . 👁️ Step into a World of Unseen Terror 🕯️🖤 Enter the haunting world of TRAUMA Broken Paradise , where every corner of the mansion whispers secrets and its walls are steeped in tragedy. As Sophia Markwell, explore the dark, decaying halls of a forgotten legacy. The air is thick with the echoes of the past, and the deeper you venture, the more the lines between reality and nightmare begin to blur. Unravel a Tale of Madness and Loss 📜🧠 TRAUMA Broken Paradise isn’t just a journey through a haunted mansion—it's a descent into the fractured mind of Sophia Markwell. Influenced by the unnerving atmosphere of Stephen King’s 'The Shining', this psychological survival horror game challenges your perception, as you piece together the riddles of a shattered past. Solve cryptic puzzles and face mind-bending challenges that will keep you questioning what’s real. A Silent Battle with the Mind 🧩💀 Forget the loud jumpscares. In TRAUMA Broken Paradise , the true horror lies within the silence—the quiet hum of your heartbeat, the rustling of a note or photograph that might hold the key to your survival. Navigate through fixed camera angles and tense, atmospheric environments, as you piece together clues that will either guide you to safety or lead you into deeper despair. Every Decision Counts 🔐💭 Your choices are not just choices—they are decisions that will echo through your fate. Multiple endings await, each one shaped by the paths you take and the clues you uncover. Every note, every photograph you collect may hold the key to your survival, but in this mansion, knowledge may also be the most dangerous weapon. Explore the Unseen, Discover the Unknown 👀🔎 The mansion is full of secrets, and no two journeys are alike. Hidden passages, concealed achievements, and mysterious objects are scattered throughout. The more you discover, the more you’ll begin to understand the twisted reality that holds Sophia captive. The question is: Are you ready to face what’s buried in the darkness? A Masterpiece of Psychological Horror 🎮👻 TRAUMA Broken Paradise is more than a game—it’s a passion project that brings together a love for survival horror and a deep respect for the genre’s roots. Every corner of this game is meticulously crafted to draw you into its haunting world. Will you dare to uncover the truths hidden in the shadows?

name: Fish Story: Gourmet Puzzle
tags: Match 3,Casual,Turn-Based Tactics,Puzzle,Point & Click,Board Game,Turn-Based Strategy,Tabletop,Strategy,2D,Isometric,Cute,Cooking,Relaxing,Choices Matter,Minimalist,Colorful,Family Friendly,Space,Atmospheric
about_the_game: The new adventures of Lucian and his friend XO! This time the friends are traveling through mysterious planets in search of delicacies! You have to collect groups of identical tokens to move on to the next planet and try all the delicacies! Destroy obstacles, use bonuses and score points! Great graphics and addictive gameplay await you. Help your friends on their journey and show off your tactical skills!

name: Blow it up
about_the_game: Blow it up is a physics destruction game with light-puzzle elements where you shoot bombs to destroy your enemies who are hiding behind tower-like structures.  Master seven unique bombs in a realistic physics simulation and explore over 70 levels of mayhem and destruction. With Steamworks integration, you can play custom levels or unleash your creativity in Creator Mode to build your own explosive puzzles. STORYLINE An alien invasion is in full swing—mysterious, powerful creatures have descended upon BOOMTOPIA, stripping it of its natural resources and claiming dominance with their explosive superpowers. As your friends are captured one by one, you’ve had enough. Fueled by determination, you gear up to fight back. The adventure begins, but with chaos all around, can you truly survive the mayhem and rescue all your friends? GAMEPLAY Perfect Shot! Aim your bomb at the right spot and watch everything collapse! Search for your imprisoned friends and rescue them one by one! Enjoy a pure physics-destruction experience! Features 7 unique bombs to destroy your enemies. Advanced physics simulation  where every block behaves naturally. Explore a world of adventure and rescue your friends! Over 70 levels of mayhem and destruction. TNT, confetti and fireworks for more spectacular explosions. Steamworks integration to share and play creations from other players. Creator Mode  where you can build your own levels! Blow it up is the ultimate explosive experience!!

name: The Making of Karateka
tags: Action,2D Fighter,2D Platformer,Documentary,Singleplayer,Pixel Graphics,Cinematic,Combat,2D,Game Development,Education,1980s,Historical,Old School,Story Rich,Controller,Classic,Linear
about_the_game: Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

name: Tsuki ni Yorisou Otome no Sahou 2
tags: Casual,Adventure,Interactive Fiction,Dating Sim,Visual Novel,2D Platformer,Immersive Sim,2D,Anime,Cute,LGBTQ+,Drama,Comedy,Emotional,Funny,Romance,Story Rich,Multiple Endings,Female Protagonist,Singleplayer
about_the_game: 《近月少女的礼仪2》是由日本美少女游戏资深大厂 Navel 制作的超人气女装系列作品的第三部。国际中文版除收录游戏本篇中的内容外，也将包括Limited Edition追加的『樱小路露娜接后日谈的后日谈《对好答案后是美妙的问候》以及『堂兄妹理论及其中心』两个特别篇内容以及全角色语音内容。此外，游戏将拥有超越原版的1920X1080的高清画质，内置简繁日三版本，预定支持Steam成就、集换卡牌、云存储等功能，并将支持大量额外内容。本作也将同期推出中文版特典活动。 《近月少女的礼仪2》由铃平广与西又葵继续联袂负责原画与角色设计；由系列前作《近月1》、《少女理论》的核心剧本家东之助独立执笔；遥空、奏雨、桐谷华、川岛莉乃等人气声优为本作新角色献声。主题曲《Glitter》由知名歌姬美乡秋演唱。 《近月少女的礼仪2》曾于美少女游戏大赏中荣获综合第1、剧本第1、系统第8、作画第3、音乐第4、影片第6，角色樱小路露娜第1、八日堂朔莉第2名、艾斯特第5、大藏瑠美音第8等诸多奖项。并曾于萌系游戏大赏中荣获纯爱系作品金奖。 故事与角色介绍 游戏玩法 《近月少女的礼仪2》是一部恋爱题材的视觉小说，玩家在其中扮演小仓朝阳。它的大部分游戏玩法都花在阅读屏幕上出现的文本上，这些文本代表了故事的叙述和对话。文本伴随着角色立绘，这些立绘代表了小仓朝阳正在与谁交谈。同时画面上会显示作为故事发生地点的背景图像。在游戏中，玩家会在故事的某些情景下遇到特别剧情CG，这些CG显示的时候画面将不再显示背景与立绘。 玩家将有机会体验4条故事线，每条故事线都围绕着一位女主角展开。在整个游戏过程中，玩家有多个分歧点可供选择，在游戏进程中遇到分歧点会暂停，直到玩家做出选择。一些决定可能导致游戏过早结束。要完整查看所有的故事线，玩家需要反复重玩游戏并选择不同的选项以将情节推进到另一个故事线中。

name: Matter
about_the_game: Dive into a strange and mesmerizing world where gravity is unpredictable and the laws of physics are constantly defied. Out of this world Matter is a first-person parkour game that will plunge you into an unknown and mysterious dimension. You will need to use your agility and wits to overcome obstacles and discover the secrets of a strange reality. The action takes place in a world that is both fascinating and strange. You will need to explore this universe in search of answers, but be careful not to get lost in its twists and turns. Altered senses Gravity is a central element of Matter. It is unpredictable and can change at any moment. You will need to adapt to these changes to avoid falling into the void... Matter is an intense and fast-paced action-adventure game. You will need to overcome increasingly difficult obstacles to progress. The adventure is interspersed with short puzzles that will require you to use several of your senses. Don't worry, the journey remains very accessible, anyone can make it through. Features - A thrilling 30-minute adventure - A platform game with a pleasant and serene atmosphere - Disorienting and exotic landscapes - A relaxing, dynamic, and disorienting soundtrack - No violence - No competition - Just fun! Important note: Please be advised that due to camera rotations and constantly altered perception, details may appear rapidly on screen and your sense of balance may be severely disrupted. For anyone who has ever experienced photosensitive epilepsy or motion sickness, it is not recommended to purchase or play this game as the risk of causing these episodes is real. Credits Game Design, Programming & Publishing by @MatoLabu Music, Sound & Tech Art by @Tomavatars member of Concrete Games 2D & 3D Graphics by Monf Game Design, Level Building, VFX & Programming by Paul Vaillé Publishing & Community Management by Le Mauvais Joueur

name: Eternum EX
about_the_game: Eternum Ex is a retro platform video game with the look and feel of the ’80s arcade cabinet games. Titles that have inspired and most influenced its creation are: Bomb Jack (Tehkan, 1984), Ghosts’n Goblins (Capcom, 1985), Baluba-louk no Densetsu (Able, 1986) and Psychic 5 (Jaleco, 1987). Story Sir Arthur has gotten old... too old. He has lost everything he had and loved, and with nothing more to lose he leaves for Samarnath, an evil subterranean kingdom (which no knight has ever returned alive) in search of treasures, adventures and the most important: five magical orbs that together provide: the Eternal youth. Thanks to its progressive difficulty curve, and with a path divided into “worlds” of 5 levels each one, Eternum Ex is challenging, addictive and an ode to the nostalgia of the golden age of arcade games. Easy to play, hard to master With a very simple core gameplay mechanics, an increasing difficulty, an exciting and addictive gameplay, and with a very precise control, Eternum Ex is perfect for retro hardcore gamers but also for those who want to start in retro games, and even for those who want to show children how games were when game industry was taking its first steps and gameplay was the most important factor in a video game. Key Features • Awesome gameplay (may cause addiction). • Retro, arcade and platformer 100% • 16-bit aesthetics • Memorable soundtrack • Plenty of different enemies • 25 Levels • Special levels with final bosses • Secrets bonus on each level • Worldwide “High Score” leaderboard

name: PENGUIN HOTEL -Chapter 1-
about_the_game: Synopsis. Many people have been invited to celebrate the Penguin Hotel's 18th anniversary. You are one of them. But no one could have predicted it. No one expected it to turn out that way... Freeze Camera This camera is a wonder. It can trap the subject inside the picture. Use this camera to solve mysteries and fight threats. Of course, you can also use it normally. Big Pen One of the characters in this hotel. He is a robot, so he doesn't move at night... Not a fan of horror? Want to enjoy the world and the story! We try to create games that both those who are good at horror games and those who are not good at horror games can enjoy. Series There is no ending branch. This game is Chapter 1. Chapter 2 will be available in the future. About video production and distribution Please include the name of this game in the distribution and video title. Please put a link to SETAM in the summary section. Other than the above, we do not specify anything else. Please use common sense. We want many people to know this game. So videos and distribution are welcome.

name: Nurikabe World
about_the_game: Nurikabe World is a relaxing logic puzzle game where you solve puzzles by creating islands and connecting rivers to create beautiful sceneries. Nurikabe World reimagines the classic Japanese pen-and-paper puzzle Nurikabe as a 3D game, where islands spring to life with trees and structures. Either play handcrafted puzzles, immerse yourself in the flow of infinitely generated maps or create and share your own puzzles with the integrated level editor. In Nurikabe World, you create islands by placing water tiles. Each number must be separated into its own island with the indicated number of tiles. Completed islands will grow trees and other structures. Getting started is easy, you only need to know a few rules to start playing! All islands must be separated by water The water must form one connected river 2x2 water squares, called 'pools' , are not allowed Nurikabe World has puzzles of all sizes and difficulty levels. The crafted puzzles will take you through breezy 5x5 levels to 15x15 endurance-testing experiences and more. There are also a bunch of difficult smaller puzzles for bite-sized challenges. Solving harder puzzles will require you to learn advanced solving techniques, which you'll learn along the way. Nurikabe World has: Hundreds of hand-crafted puzzles Different environments, seasons and times of day Relaxing visuals and music Infinitely generated puzzles Intuitive level editor Daily challenges Nurikabe World does not have: City building Simulation Multiplayer Crafting Hand-crafted puzzle campaign Journey through a hand-crafted campaign with thematic sets of puzzles. The campaign is split into various difficulty levels and puzzle styles, ranging from simple tutorial maps to mind-bending puzzles. This mode offers a guided tour through Nurikabe World, teaching you valuable solving techniques on the way! Infinite generation Attain a flow state while solving an infinite stream of procedurally generated puzzles. Choose from a variety of puzzle generation algorithms and settings, either speeding through simple puzzles or embracing the chaotic difficulty spikes of unpredictable generation. Even though the hardest puzzles may feel impossible, every puzzle is guaranteed to have a unique solution! Daily challenges Not sure what to do? Solve the daily Nurikabe World puzzles. Each day there are three hand-curated puzzles with varying difficulty levels. Nurikabe World is under active development by a few passionate individuals in Finland!

name: [International] AbsentedAge: Squarebound
tags: Action,RPG,Action RPG,2D,Action Roguelike,Cute,Fantasy,Grid-Based Movement,Modern,Female Protagonist,Turn-Based Tactics,Nudity,Sexual Content,Singleplayer,Anime,RPGMaker
about_the_game: You awaken as a girl with no memories, left alone in the corner of a sinking world... Absented Age is a fresh mix of genres: an action RPG outside of combat that becomes a roguelike-style strategy RPG during combat. If you touch a foe, get an advance attack in, or get jumped yourself, you'll transition directly to turn-based combat, with any surrounding enemies joining the fray. 【New Features in the International Version】 ・Arcade Mode A mode separate from the main game, where you advance through a dungeon you can't bring anything into, and aim for a high score. You can also link your main game save data to control characters other than the protagonist. Features four stages, including stages for two guest characters: Iris from Soaring Machinariae, and Astrake from Reality Minds. ・Bonus Playable Characters Iris from Soaring Machinariae and Astrake from Reality Minds can played as, or made into allies, in Arcade Mode. Iris boasts overwhelmingly powerful three-stage combos, during which adjacent foes can't act. The third hit depends on her current Core, so it's important to change it out to suit the situation. Stopping the combo early at the second hit, utilizing the fact she can strike up to 4 times before engaging combat, can also be an effective strategy. Like in RealityMinds, Astrake can activate a variety of chain skills by combining component skills. Strong followups and a well-balanced lineup of skills makes for a highly adaptable fighter. Be sure to use both the normal and charge variations of the pre-emptive strike for maximum effectiveness. ・Seamless Language Switching You can instantly swap between Japanese and English at any time during the game by pressing the @ key or L3 Button (can be changed). If you're keen to do language study by playing a game, or just find yourself wondering 'how would they say this in another language?', it's yours with the press of a button. (* Existing battle log text will not be retroactively affected by language switching.) The English translation was provided by vgperson. From scenes packed with emotion to humorous wordplay in item descriptions, may you enjoy the intricacies of each translation. ・Secret Boss After beating the game and obtaining gems from four powerful Arc Monsters, try heading back to the location of Squarebound's final showdown... Manage hundreds of skills and items strategically, practice high-level techniques like counters, perfect guards, and hitstop shifting, and put it all together to make short work of powerful monsters! With quick dungeon progression and smooth music transitions, it aims to be fast-paced, free-flowing, and stress-free. Save, of course, for the despair of finding yourself in a hopeless battle, or the emotional turmoil the story may induce. And that is precisely what you, our protagonist, must confront. May you overcome with wisdom, bravery, and kindness, and be left with the best of memories. ・Your dependable partner, Tart Using Enchant skills, you can instantly swap the fighting style of the spirit who fights alongside you, Tart. Enchant Light: Makes him less sturdy, but allows him to fly and excel at support healing. Enchant Fire: Lets him take the brunt of enemy attacks, protecting you with nimble moves and a solid defense. Each time you obtain a Heart Fragment holding a lost memory, you will awaken to a new power... 　　　　―――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――― ・A myriad of skills, items, and ways to dress up As demonstrated in the screenshots, this game is abundant with exchangeable pieces of clothing, as well as status effect overlays. Equipment will break when it gets worn down, so always consider what you should be wearing at any given time. If you obtain multiples of the same piece of equipment, that equipment's Mastery (and value) goes up. Unlike more punishing roguelikes of yesteryear, the Mastery you earn is permanent across all instances of that equipment, so that progress won't be lost even if you lose the equipment. In fact, if you re-obtain a piece of equipment you lost to a defeat, you'll get a big boost to its Mastery. So when you fall in battle, consider it a chance to reclaim your lost belongings stronger than before and take your revenge. This game, Absented Age: Squarebound, is the first part of the larger Absented Age series. Though this first part can be considered a complete story in its own right, there remain elements yet to appear in this game (such as assist summons and real-world embodiment actions), as well as unexplained mysteries. I plan to make updates to the game based on players' feedback while also developing the next game in the series, Absented Age: Ghostbound (tentative title). I'm prepared to improve anything that might be improved upon in this game, so I would appreciate anyone contacting me on my Twitter or elsewhere with their opinions. I hope this game can reach as many people as possible. ◆ Guidelines for Derivative Works 1. Non-profit hobby creations and fanworks (Let's Plays, fanart, etc.) are welcome, but please be sure not to infringe on the copyrights of terunon's Lab or any third parties. name: Radiant Silvergun
about_the_game: ＜Story＞ July 14, 2520 AD. The light emitted by a 'stone-like object' excavated from the strata of B.C. enveloped the earth, destroying the human race. Only the four crew members of the space cruiser TETRA and one robonoid barely escaped into satellite orbit. ...... One year later. The TETRA is forced to re-enter the atmosphere because the ship's supplies have finally been depleted. The battle for the survival of the TETRA begins. ＜A highly strategic shooting game＞ The battlefield is a stage with various terrains, including intricate crevices and moving containers, where enemies attack from all directions, up, down, left, and right. Twenty-three bosses await in six highly strategic stages. There are also secret bonuses that occur when enemies are defeated in a specific order, as well as hidden score items. The key to obtaining a score is to cover all of these items, build your own original attack pattern, and accurately destroy the targeted enemies. Use weapons that level up in accordance with your score to update your high score! ＜Game Features＞ Score system specialized for the origin of shooting games. Weapons that level up as you defeat enemies. 5 difficulty levels for beginners to enjoy. Story mode with a strong message. Beautiful 3D graphics. Sound that colors the game world by Hitoshi Sakimoto, who is highly acclaimed both in Japan and overseas. Game mode with the rules of 'Ikaruga,' the second installment of Project RS. CLASSIC / MODERN mode that can be enjoyed with different viewing angles for SegaSaturn version and XboxLiveArcade version. Compatible with keyboard operation. Online ranking to compete with rivals from around the world. ＜New Function＞ Compatible with all Xbox / Nintendo Switch / PlayStation controllers CLASSIC / MODERN mode that can be enjoyed with the aspect ratio of the Sega Saturn version and Xbox Live Arcade version Compatible with keyboard operation. One keyboard can be used by two people, and can also be used in conjunction with a controller. ＜Notes on controllers＞ When playing with a SWITCH controller, be sure to set 'Nintendo Button Layout' to 'OFF'. ＜Notes on play environment＞ If you are using a PC with the minimum system requirements, you may experience processing delays while playing. We recommend playing on a PC that meets the recommended system requirements, including a graphics board.

name: HyperBowl
about_the_game: Be the ball! This remake of the classic arcade bowling game brings you the original six HyperBowl lanes and some new ones. Enjoy the scenery, but remember to head for the pins before time runs out! Play 1-4 players in the original Arcade Mode or quick-play in single-player mode. Roll the ball forward, left, right, even backwards by pushing the mouse, swiping the trackpad, or pressing the AWSD keys. Special thanks to the HyperBowl Facebook fans, especially localization, testing, and bug-squashing help from Ischa Bijl, Raymond Chow, Frank Lin, Lien Luong, Adam Pavlakos, Ian Schwabe, Harrison Sotoloff and Elijah Taylor. This version of HyperBowl by Technicat LLC is built with the original HyperBowl art and sound assets licensed from Absolute Certainty Inc., the Unity game engine, Lens Flare and Simple Particle Pack from Unity Technologies, Selected U3D Japanese Font from Masashi Wada, Particle Scaler by Roel Ezendam, Real Flames by BlackFire FX, FontLibrary from MacXWare, iTween by Pixel Placement, Flocks package from soodaq, Lean Localization from Carlos Wilkes, Finger Gestures from Fatal Frog Software, and Steamworks.NET by Riley Labreque. New lanes are made with the Penelope sample from Unity Technologies, Cartoon Snowboard Funpark from Stefan M., Mushroom Land from Manufactura4K, Grass Road Race from Sugar Assets, and the Campfire Pack from Dreamdev Studios. HyperBowl is a trademark of Absolute Certainty Inc.

name: Elixir
about_the_game: Step into the worn shoes of an ancient alchemist, awakened within a mysterious house shrouded with secrets. Explore your surroundings to uncover forgotten alchemy techniques and recipes, while damned souls beg for your assistance with their ailments and boons. Each lost soul has unique conditions that you’ll need to identify to create the right Elixir to help them on their journey. Every action you take, every Elixir you create is a piece to unlocking the mysterious story. As an alchemist, your craft is a double-edged sword, where the line between salvation and damnation blurs. Every Elixir created can cure an ailment, but tread cautiously, for they may also bring unforeseen consequences. Can you decipher properly and find your salvation? With an array of materials waiting for you to discover and unlock, you’ll learn to craft over 700 Elixirs to help solve over 10 million situations – each soul encounter is randomized with its own unique attributes. And each journey through the game is a new and unique experience. Embark on a dark journey, where strategic thinking and experimentation are your greatest allies. Solve puzzles, unlock the story, and unearth the secrets hidden in this world. Welcome to Elixir!

name: Fish-Click Squad!
about_the_game: Fish-Click Squad! is a casual multiplayer idler where you purchase various aquatic creatures and nurture them to maturity with your friends through clicking and touching earning coins and rewards to unlock more fish and idle features! There is nothing happier than slacking with friends! Game Features Team up and slack together with your friend! You may join a friend's room or a stranger's room, and enjoy touching your fish in spare time! Buy some fish fry or some strange young aquatic creatures to start your fish-farming. Every click can gradually make your fish grow bigger and become more visible(+1s) After touching the fish to fully-visible, remember to use the fishnet to get what you nurtured. The fully-touched fish got by fishnet will swim freely in the viewing area. If you are too busy at work don't have time to slack, you may hire our cute cat divers to nurture your cute fish. Welcome to freely explore more features in game.

name: Playable Mockup
about_the_game: Explore an infinite loop corridor and get to 0 PM to 0 AM by building a 'Time manipulation deck'. Playable Mockup is a first person horror exploration game where you will be challenged with a life threatening test. Wander the “Dead Soul Corridor” created from a ghost photo. Find a way to get to the soul of the dead. Corridor’s will always start at 0 PM. Your objective is to capture the soul of the dead awaiting at 0 AM Advance the corridor time by obtaining abilities through taking photos. Key factors of the game Proceed in an infinite looping corridor Strategize how to escape the loop Think deeply in a silent and eerie atmosphere Luck will be a big factor determining the outcome, which requires you to challenge multiple times “Investigate” the ghost’s identity and the culprit that has taken it’s life

name: Exorcist: Reviewer of Minds
about_the_game: Do You Like Exorcism? Calling the name of the demon. That is the essence of exorcism. What is the identity of the demon possessing the child? Using information about the demon's origin and rank from the list of demons recorded in the holy texts, combine logical reasoning with a bit of luck to choose the demon's name. If you get it right, you win. If you get it wrong, you'll be cornered. Exorcist Seeking Names V.S. Demon Seeking Sins Up to 10 demons can invade your house, approaching to learn about your greatest sins. You must identify which demon is possessing the child while avoiding interference. Each play session lasts about 30 minutes, but you can enjoy the strategic back-and-forth multiple times. Challenge Fate with Everything Given With over 20 different 'holy verses' that can be randomly obtained, you can gain various pieces of information and advantages. Using the gathered information, identify the demon in front of you. Even if you throw all your saved holy verses into the fight, there aren't many moments where you can be 100% sure. There will be times when you must challenge with a success rate of 50%, 30%, or even 10%. Pray that you're right. This is a slightly complex game of chance and a battle spiced up with some 'divine intervention.' Do you like games of chance? Holy Verses Carved as the Last Weapon Each time you save a child, you can carve a holy verse into the cross. This allows you to control which holy verses you can obtain to some extent, supporting your gameplay against luck. If you save 5 children and exorcise what lies beyond the 6th door, you can leave the house of demons. 【Streaming and Broadcasting Guidelines】 We welcome game play videos from individuals and corporations, but please make sure to read and comply with the following guidelines: ・Include the game title 'Exorcist: Reviewer of Minds' in the title of your videos or live streams. ・Provide a link to the store page in accessible places such as the description section. ・Monetization through features provided by video sites (advertising revenue, donations, etc.) is allowed. ・Do not include content that defames or slanders others, or that is contrary to public order and morals in your game commentary or broadcasts. ・727 NOT HOUND is not responsible for any damages or issues that arise from the commentary or broadcasting of the game. ・These guidelines may be changed without notice, and the revised guidelines will apply to videos created after the change.

name: Cute Dogs
about_the_game: Do you like dogs? Dogs are our loyal friends. It doesn't matter for them are you smart or not, rich or poor, handsome or ordinary. Dogs don't need expensive cars, big houses, or a lot of money. They require only your love. Give them your love, and they will do the same for you! Play with our dogs, a puzzle game. Find all differences in two almost identical pictures, and test your watchfulness. Ten cute little puppies are waiting for you! And they challenge you to play a game! Features: * 10 levels. * Cute arts. * Relaxing music. * Casual gameplay. * Simple control (you will only need a mouse). * Suitable for all ages.

name: Duriano
about_the_game: Duriano: Epic Durian Heros A thrilling 3D top-down action roguelite adventure into the world of Norse Mythology, where you become the unlikely hero… a Durian ! Prepare yourself, grab mighty weapons, unleash divine powers, and vanquish the Gods of Asgard! Durian Hero Variants Diverse Durian Heroes… Unleash the Power of Gods! Choose your Durian hero! Each variant embodies unique powers and abilities inspired by Norse Gods and mythical creatures. Tailor your playstyle, harness their divine essence, and embark on your epic quest! Fate's Favors & God Path Choose Your God Path… Unlock Ultimate Power! Empower your Durian Hero with 'Fate's Favors,' granting powerful buffs and unique abilities! Select a 'God Path' to unlock spectacular combat skills and customize your hero to perfection! Mythic Weapons Mythical Arsenal Awaits… Unleash Devastating Power! Discover and collect hundreds of 'Mythic Weapons,' each with unique attributes and game-changing effects! Fuse weapon power with your Durian Hero's abilities to create unstoppable combos! Synergistic Combos Master Combos… Unleash Limitless Potential! Experiment and combine everything! Durian Hero variants, Fate's Favors, and weapons – discover synergistic combos to unleash devastating power and obliterate your foes! Adaptive Strategy Every Run Unique… Conquer the Ever-Changing Challenge! Experience the thrill of Roguelite gameplay where every run is different! New environments, new enemies, new challenges await! Adapt your strategy on the fly and overcome every obstacle! Progression and Customization Endless Upgrades… Evolve Your Hero to Godlike Status! Keep playing to unlock new Durian Hero variants, Fate's Favors, and weapons! Collect and upgrade your arsenal to make your hero stronger and face even greater challenges! Prepare for Battle Get Ready to Rumble! Dive into the mystical Norse realms, embark on an epic action-packed adventure, master devastating combos, and lead your Durian Hero to victory over the Gods of Asgard! Are you ready to become the ultimate Durian Hero? Join the fight in Duriano and etch your legend into the annals of Asgardian history!

name: Bao Bao's™ Cozy Laundromat
about_the_game: Step into the warm and welcoming world of Bao Bao's Cozy Laundromat, where our lovable panda, Bao Bao, is eager to share her dream with you. Starting with just 500💰, you'll help Bao Bao transform a humble beginning into a bustling haven of cleanliness and charm. Picture rows of vibrant, colorful washing machines humming gently, alongside dryers that turn laundry day into a soothing ritual. But it’s not just about washing clothes—it's about creating a space that feels like home. As you and Bao Bao work together, you'll have the chance to add all sorts of delightful touches: cozy furniture where customers can relax with a good book, snack-filled vending machines that bring joy to those waiting, and lush, leafy plants that breathe life into every corner. And because no great venture is ever truly solo, you'll soon be able to welcome other panda friends to join the fun, each bringing their own special touch to the laundromat. What's even more relaxing is that Bao Bao's Cozy Laundromat is an idle game, meaning you can let it run peacefully in the background without needing too much interaction. Your laundromat will keep thriving, even when you're off doing other things, allowing you to return to a bustling, cozy environment whenever you're ready. To make the experience even more serene, you'll be surrounded by the gentle sounds of 10 beautiful lo-fi soundtracks, creating the perfect atmosphere for a cozy, laid-back experience. Let the music soothe your soul as you help Bao Bao build her dream. So come on in, take a deep breath, and feel the warmth of Bao Bao's Cozy Laundromat wrap around you like a favorite blanket. Together, you'll create a place that’s not just about doing laundry—it’s about finding a little bit of peace, happiness, and sweet melodies in the everyday. Dock mode and window mode  Unlock different washing machines and dryers, and earn money per wash cycle.  Unlock a variety of Pandas to help you run the Laundromat Buy more land to expand your laundromat.  Pandas do need to rest, so help them by placing Benches and feed them by adding Vending Machines to the laundromat  Decorate your laundromat with a variety of plants and other props.  Let your Twitch audience chat directly through pandas in the game Let your Twitch chat control cats at the laundromat. Because reasons.  Includes a Focus Timer to assist with study or work sessions. Dedicated discord community.

name: Sly Slime
about_the_game: You are helping little slime that accidentally fell into a pit trying to eat a mushroom. Navigate him through all levels while overcoming obstacles and solving puzzles that are too hard for him. Features: • More than 60 handcrafted levels • Low poly visual style • Meditative Acoustic Guitar Tracks
