name: The Rise
about_the_game: A journey to the top Sam and Elicy have the same goal, to reach the top. Both need to understand each other on this journey through the Abyss as they face various challenges and creatures that hinder their path. What is The Rise The Rise is a precision platformer game focusing on the adventure of two characters seeking to escape the terrifying Abyss where they find themselves. Who are Sam and Elicy Sam is the older rabbit wearing a cloak with a pendant that seems to have some kind of power, apparently he relies on it. Elicy is the youngest bunny who woke up in a place she doesn't remember after a strange dream. Something is calling her to the top, could it be the way back home? Explore the abyss and survive the challenges Over 60 levels Battles against big enemies Challenging Gameplay Environmental Diversity Carrot It's now or never. Breathe and climb once again.

God of Time smashes the ground & sends everyone into 2nd battlefield - battles upgrade so exciting! ⚔️Rich Weapons Throw shields like Captain America! Slash with Wolverine’s claws! Shoot like Hawkeye! Katana, wands ... melee or ranged attacks, so many weapons to pick! Weapon Upgrade : refresh weapon stats to upgrade. Turn single hits into combos & power up! See a treasure box? Open for random rare weapon! Use BOSS Weapons to fight bosses and feel boss-level power! Light Up Talent Tree : Focus on quick dodges or strong attacks? Both offer unique battle experiences! 👑Create Your Hero The Witcher, Black Knight, Bird Man...classic & creative heroes to choose!

name: ATTA -Spot the Oddities in the Strange Hotel-
about_the_game: Notes: This attraction contains elements of fear, anxiety, and violent events. Only those who have acknowledged this are allowed to enter, so we appreciate your understanding and cooperation. If you feel unwell, we strongly recommend taking a break or interrupting your experience. Photography and video recording within the attraction are permitted. The latest information on attractions and information about other attractions can be found on Twitter (formerly X), so if you are interested, please try searching for IDEA_FRUITION. ~ Welcome to Desper Hotel Room 1028 ~ First, please remember the details of the paintings, lamps, door colors, etc., on the first floor. Take the elevator to the next floor, and something will change. Count the differences from the first floor. Input the number of mistakes into the elevator, and when you reach the first floor, you will reach the goal. During the journey, bizarre and mysterious events will occur, but there's no need to worry. Even if you sustain injuries that would normally be fatal, it's okay! You'll find yourself waking up in Room 1028 before you know it. [------ Backstory ------] People vanish without a trace. In such cases, it's usually due to some intentional human action with criminal implications. However, there are incidents where no leads can be found no matter how much investigation is conducted, events so enigmatic they're labeled as 'mysterious disappearances.' Enter the Paranormal Investigations Consortium, known as 'PIC,' specializing in such supernatural phenomena investigations. Room 1028 of the Desper Hotel. Rumors spread online about guests staying in this room suddenly vanishing. Police started investigating due to the frequency of reports, but found nothing. The scene resembled someone vanishing in an instant, leaving behind belongings and half-eaten meals. Seemingly devoid of clues, we, with our specialized knowledge and experience in paranormal phenomena, can assert confidently: 'Every supernatural phenomenon has a trigger.' Detailed examination of the times and circumstances of the disappearances revealed a pattern. It coincided with a night wedding in the hotel's event hall, accompanied by the playing of Bach's famous 'Air on the G String.' Sending two investigators to stay under the same conditions in the room, we recorded startling events. One investigator, while asleep, vanished in an instant, leaving the other, who was awake, unaffected. Given that the room was originally a single occupancy, the lack of observers likely contributed to the mystery. Further investigation revealed anomalies occurring only under identical conditions to the disappearances: magnetic disturbances, slight decreases in gravity, and the like. Our primary task became analyzing these phenomena and developing technologies to handle them. One week after the investigator's disappearance, As we progressed in analyzing the phenomenon for rescue efforts, astonishingly, the missing investigator returned. When questioned about their whereabouts and return, they recounted: 'It was like the hotel but not the hotel, somewhere else entirely. Elevators and corridors, rooms that wouldn't open, and strange occurrences. You'd think you were dead until you woke up in Room 1028. Initially unsure what to do, I noticed a pattern. It began with altering the number of a specific object in the elevator to descend a floor. Descending with the wrong number, finally reaching the first floor, I was enveloped in a blinding light... and found myself outside.' [This incident marks its tenth year this year] For an occult enthusiast like me, this event left a profound impact. Subsequent analysis revealed the phenomenon's minimal danger. Those who went missing were typically found within two weeks at most. Today, Room 1028 of the Desper Hotel stands as a unique attraction. The hotel and PIC established a mutually beneficial relationship: the hotel providing full cooperation to PIC, while PIC ensures technological support and safety for the attraction. Though reservations were full for years, today is finally my turn. Heart pounding, thoughts entangled, body uncooperative, I still manage to prepare and leave home. My destination? Of course, Room 1028 of the Desper Hotel. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Eremidia - Archivist's Curse
tags: RPG,Adventure,RPGMaker,Anime,Dungeon Crawler,Party-Based RPG,JRPG,Turn-Based Strategy,Exploration,2D,Pixel Graphics,Fantasy,Magic,Combat,Singleplayer,Cute,Free to Play,Dark,Turn-Based Combat
about_the_game: Archivist's Curse brings you into an otherworldly harbor of knowledge: The Great Library, although unfortunately, you ended up in the dangerous section of the complex called Hall of Pawnsmoor. To escape from the Hall, you have to take the test from The Chessmaster, Hall's current proprietor. Before you face The Chessmaster, you need to find companions who, fortunately, may come from Hall's own collection. Enter the Library's murky Dark Alleys to find companions, items, and clues on Hall's history as well as its owner. Fight against numerous intruders from within the Library as well as from the outside realm, and ultimately, defeat The Chessmaster to obtain your freedom and escape from Hall of Pawnsmoor. Synopsis: The 'Chessmaster of Pars Mythos' has invited you to play his game of chess--or that's what he wants you to believe. His game is not mere chess, however; you're required to find your own chess pieces, as he will also bring his own pieces. In order to find your own pieces, you need to delve into the murky, once-forbidden Hall of Pawnsmoor. Luckily, you will be assisted by another unexpected guest--one of the Scribes who happens to have knowledge about what the Hall has to offer. Know your pieces, learn about his game's rules, and best the Chessmaster in his own game, for it's the only way to release yourself from the Hall's succumbing imprisonment. Features: Two game modes: Chessmaster Match, where your mettle is tested; and Dark Alley, where you explore the Great Library for resources and unlockable companion pieces. It has its own tutorial segments, separated from the main game modes, too. Grid Battle System; fight various enemies on a chess-like battlefield. A slow tactic-like battle mechanics that emphasize position and proper abilities usage, since the battlefield can be affected by any present pieces. Dozens of unique, playable companions; each can be promoted to unlock their potentials to the fullest. Each comes with its share of lore that explains their backgrounds, abilities, and characteristics. Dozens of enemies to take on, including hidden bosses and a series of enemy compilations present in the Chessmaster Match. Crafting equipment, with unlockable recipes either from Dark Alley and every match you win against the Chessmaster.

name: HOLEHOLE
about_the_game: 'HOLEHOLE' is an adventure game where players collect scattered objects on the map, engage in conversations and assist residents, and prepare for the next exploration by performing various actions. One day, the player accidentally falls into a certain hole and freely explores the dungeon to find objects and search for residents. However, it is also a player's choice to not engage in exploration. Even inside this hole, there is no specific purpose to each day. Progress through a combination of visual novel-style storytelling and interactions with residents. There are no markers for objects or quests, allowing players to freely play as they wish. There are few pressured tasks, allowing for a relaxed gameplay experience. ───────────────────── ◆How to achieve the true ending Eat to increase your status. Win the one and only battle. Give items to three people. ───────────────────── ◆Video Streaming Guidelines ・Regardless of whether you are an individual or a business entity, streaming is allowed without the need for permission.

name: Saviorless
tags: 2D Platformer,Indie,Action-Adventure,Dark Fantasy,Hand-drawn,Story Rich,Puzzle-Platformer,Hack and Slash,Stylized,Atmospheric,Narration,Surreal,Conversation,Adventure,Platformer,Controller,Multiple Endings,2D,Action,Comic Book
about_the_game: Saviorless presents a captivating 2D platformer set in a stylish dark fantasy world. The game features exquisite hand-drawn artwork and animations that enhance the visual experience. Players take on the role of Antar, a determined child aspiring to become a Savior. Embark on a journey through the treacherous path to the forbidden land, the Smiling Islands, overcoming a multitude of obstacles along the way. A strange world to explore Dive into a captivating narrative-driven platformer featuring distinctive scenarios, enemy designs, and a variety of characters, all crafted in a complete hand-drawn animation style. Experience an atmospheric and mesmerizing soundtrack, enhancing your journey through enigmatic and visually breathtaking landscapes. Three playable protagonist Engage in dynamic gameplay that seamlessly transitions between diverse characters, each possessing distinctive abilities and facing specific challenges. Antar Embark on a journey as a recklessly curious child, determined to unveil the secrets of the islands through exploration and puzzle-solving. Explore ancient ruins, all while evading the lurking dangers that threaten your path. Savior Embody Antar's fierce masked avatar and face hordes of bizarre enemies and formidable bosses that haunt the realm of the Saviors. Brace yourself for high-speed, unforgiving battles against all obstacles standing between you and your destiny. Nento A merciless hunter obsessed with control, who will do whatever it takes to become the unexpected protagonist of this story, even if this means annihilating everything that stands before him, even his followers. Game Features Unravel a mystery : Can you unearth the secret behind the Smiling Islands? Fight nightmarish monsters : Kill the aberrations that try to stop you from becoming a Savior. Collect the pages : Your story won't be completed if you leave some mementos behind. Explore the islands : Feel the melancholy irradiated by the glooming landscapes and crumbling ruins scattered around the Smiling Islands. A broken narrative : Unravel what keeps Antar from reaching the Smiling Islands and face an unexpected twist of events.

name: Anopek
about_the_game: Anopek is a groundbreaking mashup of genres, mixing shooter and metroidvania elements, with a stylized look right from the consoles of your childhood. Begin your journey to a dying planet and discover the relics of the past. Reconnect with the ancient lore, and explore the labyrinthine temple grounds to learn it’s secrets. Unlock a variety of weapons with unique abilities to aid your exploration, allowing you to delve deeper into the mysteries of the past, and empower yourself with ancient relics. Seek out and challenge the pantheon of gods to reclaim the lost parts of your soul. Battle horrifying monsters and duel the divine to prove yourself worthy. Fulfill the ancient prophecy that Anopek has foretold… Or deny it, and choose your own path. Retro shooter sensibilities coupled with traditional metroidvania action. Blast your way through a variety of monsters and enemies. Defeat clever and difficult bosses! Explore a massive tomb resplendent with many different areas ranging from ancient tombs to flying temples! Features an amazing and dynamic soundtrack, one of the most important staples of exploration. Unlock unique weapons to combat the creatures you have awoken. Use abilities to explore the temple, unlocking new areas with unique aesthetics. Support for key rebinding and modern controllers. Change the game to play using only a keyboard, just like retro shooters! Or, use it for enhanced accessibility. After completing the game, seek out the Gauntlet of the Gods for an additional challenge! For further replayability, enable the “Mirror Mode” option in the game for a unique perspective. Manual included with concept art!

name: Lazriel: The Demon's Fall
tags: Card Battler,Turn-Based Tactics,Mystery Dungeon,Rogue-lite,Dungeon Crawler,RPG,Turn-Based,Strategy RPG,Turn-Based Strategy,Card Game,Rogue-like,Female Protagonist,Strategy,2.5D,Cute,Isometric,Controller,Deckbuilding,Procedural Generation,Pixel Graphics
about_the_game: ABOUT 'Lazriel: the Demon's Fall' is a roguelike deckbuilding game. Depending on the cards you select, Lazriel will evolve into either an angel or fall victim to the influence of demons. To survive, you'll need to utilize the powerful Demon Cards from time to time. But be wary—overusing these evil powers may lead to Lazriel's physical and mental decline. Do you have what it takes to resist the demons' temptation and continue on the path of holiness? STORY Lazriel is a star pupil at the school in the sky, in the heavenly world ruled by goddess Emelia. One fateful day, however, on her way back from a school ceremony, Lazriel is thrown down into the demon world. There is only one way to return: by climbing the demon-infested tower. Can Lazriel successfully climb the tower and return safely to the heavenly world? HOW TO PLAY This game uses a turn-based system in which you and your enemy take turns. Lazriel can use two types of cards to inflict damage on enemies: Angel Cards and Demon Cards. However, overusing the Demon Cards' evil powers may lead to Lazriel's physical and mental decline.

name: Manifest Destiny
about_the_game: When reality becomes too much to bear, the only escape is the utopia you built with millions of lines of code. In this world, you are not a hero bound by rules. You are the Creator. The laws of physics, logic, and morality? They are yours to rewrite. Dive into this retro top-down pixel adventure, use your 'Developer Tools' to hack the system, and uncover the glitchy, cruel truth behind 'Destiny.' Hack, Paint, & Compose Forget swords and shields. As the architect of this world, your professional skills are your deadliest arsenal: Code: Reprogram enemy logic, trigger fatal traps, or simply delete the bugs that stand in your way. Art: Hit a dead end? Redraw the map! Create bridges from thin air or warp the terrain to trap your foes on an isolated island. Music: Manipulate the BGM to control the flow of battle. Drive enemies into a chaotic panic or boost your own focus with an adrenaline-pumping rhythm. These tools aren't just for killing—they are the keys to the world. Break the conventional puzzle logic and reconstruct the levels. The solution is limited only by your imagination. God or Devil? In a world governed by your will, there is no law but yours. The 'Karma System' watches your every move. Every line of code you change leads to a different ending: The Benevolent God: Help NPCs, fix their problems, and find a peaceful path through the chaos. The Living Nightmare: Don't like an NPC's attitude? Wipe them out. Leave a trail of digital blood wherever you go. But be warned: Every 'gift' you grant comes with a price tag written in the source code. Some costs will elevate you to divinity, while others may corrupt your soul beyond repair. Reality vs. Fiction This is more than a game; it is an interrogation of Dreams vs. Reality . When the virtual characters show emotions more real than the humans outside, can you still bring yourself to press 'Delete'? When your bank account hits zero and your family begs you to quit, will you seek salvation inside your own creation? Every choice triggers a butterfly effect. Rewrite the story—for them, or for yourself.

name: Soccering
tags: Multiplayer,Online Co-Op,Local Co-Op,Character Customization,3D,Physics,Arcade,Co-op,Football (Soccer),Indie,Funny,Family Friendly,Casual,Sports,e-sports,Minimalist,Local Multiplayer,Third Person,Early Access,Cute
about_the_game: Soccering is a physics-based game where the objective is to control a sphere throughout the field and make the ball go inside of your opponent goal. While jumping, you can use a small dash in either direction, or up. But remember it takes 5 seconds to load again. In the arcade mode, there are items you can collect to temporarily change the behavior of the players , bringing funny situations to the game. Play with your friends You can play 1 x 1, 1 x 2 or 2 x 2. There's also a coop mode where you can test your skills against CPU with a friend. Press the square brackets ( '[' and ']' ) to navigate between the sound tracks. How to customize Field and Players? Soccering allows you to customize the Field and the Players skins . The instructions for this are following: Open the Steam Client > Right click on Soccering > Properties > Local Files > BROWSE LOCAL FILES Look inside the 'conf' directory. There are the template files (player_.png and field_.png) for Players and the Field, as well the instructions of how to save the images... Pick your favorite image editor, create your images and play with your own artwork. Please feel free to share your images at Artwork tab in the Soccering Community Thanks for your support!

name: CANINE
about_the_game: CANINE is a horror game about a boy looking for his dog, kidnapped by an evil corporation that runs experiments with pets. ◼ Rescue your dog Tomy in a PSX style game with a class B horror film narrative. ◼ In CANINE there are no weapons, you only have Tomy's ball to survive. ◼ Two possible endings depending on your actions. ◼ HARDCORE mode unlockable with a 4-star score. ◼ Score system with stars and timer ◼ Use stealth to avoid a humanoid dog, or throw your ball strategically to distract him. ◼ Inmerse yourself in a survival horror game inspired by games like Resident Evil, Silent Hill and Alien Isolation. ◼ Multi language: English, Spanish, Chinese (simplified), Japanese, Russian, Portuguese, German. Friend games

name: Yukar From The Abyss
tags: Choose Your Own Adventure,Otome,Interactive Fiction,Visual Novel,Female Protagonist,Dating Sim,Romance,2D,Multiple Endings,Story Rich,Choices Matter,Singleplayer,Anime,Colorful,Stylized,Casual,Fantasy,Demons,Mythology,Drama
about_the_game: Tired and disillusioned with her busy life in Tokyo, Kurumi Oki decides to slow down and move to Hokkaido for a fresh start. One night, on the train home from meeting up with her friends, she dozes off and realizes she has missed her stop. Panicked, she gets off the train and finds herself at an unfamiliar station called Kamuy Mosir. Seeking help she walks toward some nearby lights, where she sees a group of people dressed in unfamiliar costumes having a party. Without warning, she is chased by the group and is captured by a young man. Her captor tells her that she is dead, and he will take her to the underworld, the land of the dead. Still being pursued by other mysterious beings, Kurumi unexpectedly opens the door to the world of the Gods, where she must overcome fierce trials, explore the mysterious new world, and perhaps even discover what happens to forbidden love with the Gods.. Your choices matter - Each decision you make will affect the story and the ending, will you live happily ever after or suffer eternal damnation? [Kurumi Oki] The protagonist. Leaving her hectic life in Tokyo behind, she moves to Hokkaido where a mysterious fate awaits.. [Pewrep] The brave young leader of the mountain Gods. 'Don't resist or I'll bite your throat out!' [Kyril Sasayama] A trader from Esashi. As CEO of Sasayama Far East Trading, he has business interests across the globe. Always smiling, he is calm and sociable. 'You're not on the right footing. Shall I hold your hand?' [Li Huaisu] The God of the wetlands. He is graceful, elegant, and loves the arts, but his biggest flaw is his ego. 'We are not in human form. This is a God's original form, and humans are imitating ours.' [Moshirechik] A giant demon God, who is feared for his brutish manner. But, it seems that his original form long ago wasn't a demon at all. 'Mother Klyuchevskaya, how are you doing now?' 4 main story routes to explore - Each with three unique endings. Collectible CGs - Six amazing art scenes to collect for each character. Dictionary feature - Learn more about the ancient Ainu language, and quickly reference the definition of words. Choose the name of the protagonist - For those who like to immerse themselves in the story, you can choose a custom name for the protagonist. Playtime - Around 2 hours per route.

name: Cake Invaders
about_the_game: Bright and cute! Pixel art shooting defense! The hungry invaders are approaching one after another, wanting the important Baumkuchen Cake carried by the spaceship for themselves. Defend and Shoot the invaders with your Minigun to protect the Baumkuchen! Don't miss the rainbow-colored Baumkuchen! If you keep defeating the invaders with your minigun, a mysterious Baumkuchen will appear, glowing in rainbow colors! If you shoot and destroy it, you will gain exploding bullets, increase your crew, and more. Baumkuchen are meant to be eaten... The number of hungry invaders is unfathomable, and they keep attacking the Baumkuchen in waves one after another. The further we progress, the more numerous and powerful they become, and the more Baumkuchen will eventually be consumed... But! The crew that takes on the task to defeat the invaders will be scored, and their achievements in protecting the Baumkuchen will be remembered on our high score board! Use the rankings to show off your skills to players from around the world!

name: ViSP - Virtual Space Port
about_the_game: The core feature of ViSP is the unrestricted building mechanic. By dragging blocks out of one another, you can freely create complex, intertwined structures filling the whole room! Your goal is to connect your space port to all the monuments floating around you in space, to gather their energy and find other cores scattered in the galaxy. In order to do that, you need to manage your resources, form patterns out of blocks to create special modules and build defensive structures to protect your station against enemies. ViSP is a fresh approach for a VR building game, with all game mechanics tailored towards a unique roomscale VR experience. The game is simple and intuitive at its core, but gets increasingly complex the further the player advances and offers a large creative freedom. Lose yourself in the calm and fascinating atmosphere and let your creativity flow while constructing an aesthetic and complex spaceport spanning the whole room! On the other hand, you need to react quickly and build up your station strategically to defend it against incoming threats, while always keeping an eye on your resource counter! ViSP is developed by Visper Games, a team of two Game Design students from Berlin. It started off about two years ago, as a small game jam project at university. The development was an exciting ride for us since and now we‘re glad to finally release our first commercial game! We‘re happy to receive any kind of feedback, so feel free to contact us! We’ll do our best to respond to your messages quickly and to fix any problems that may occur. :)

name: Online Sparkler
about_the_game: Online sparkler is a game to share the time to watch the same fire . Enjoy the communication between you and someone else through the sparklers, which light up differently depending on the weather at that moment! ▼Real-time weather conditions reflect real-world weather conditions The weather in the game reflects the weather in the real world. The sparklers glow differently depending on the sky conditions and temperature at the time. (The weather may differ from the real world weather if the data was not taken properly.) ▼1~20 Players You can enjoy the healing power of staring into the fire quietly by yourself, chatting with family and friends with fireworks in hand, or spending time next to someone you don't know who just happened to show up. ▼take A Picture Of Your Memories. Fireworks will disappear, but you can take pictures to preserve your memories. Keep them in a safe place or share them on SNS.

name: Trapped: Family Vacation
tags: Psychological Horror,Walking Simulator,Horror,First-Person,Puzzle,Exploration,Adventure,Simulation,Atmospheric,Psychological,Mystery,Surreal,Female Protagonist,Survival Horror,Realistic,3D,Immersive Sim,Singleplayer,Choose Your Own Adventure,Dark
about_the_game: An anomaly-finding horror game, but the rules of survival constantly change. Average Play Time: 120-240 minutes Mark five differences from the camera footage in each room to complete it. Survive your stepfamily members and toys by figuring out their patterns and rules.

name: Antivine
about_the_game: Antivine is like a delicate album and a peaceful composition. Describing a young boy seeking for the reason of his uniqueness, and step on his journey. With your wisdom can help him to pursue and reveal the truth. ▼ For the truth of Treeman Some say once you get order, branches will start to sprout out of the body and become a plant. Find the mountain God at the other side of the land, and you will find the cure. ▼ Change the way of thinking Change the scenes with a simple click. One of the core of Antivine is to change viewpoints, and clear all the puzzles with it. ▼ A beautiful self-discovery story 'Who am I? 'Why am I different?' In this game, you can enjoy solving puzzles in a relaxing pace and together with a young girl meet on the journey. Put yourself in a teeming world and find the answer of life. ▼ Reviews and recognitions Antivine has won many awards, including Merit Award of Bahamut ACG Creation Contest Game, Special Award of Rayark Vision Get Wild Award, Gold Award of Youth Innovation Design Festival Tech and Game Design, and Gold Award of K.T. Creativity Award Digital Game. What is the fate and the truth waiting in front of the boy? An invitation to you for the beautiful journey.

name: ToriDori
tags: Casual,Adventure,Hidden Object,Puzzle,Nature,3D,Cute,Split Screen,Point & Click,Indie,Family Friendly,Singleplayer,Mystery,Creature Collector,Relaxing
about_the_game: ToriDori is designed for a leisurely search for differences accompanied by specially selected music, which will help you relax and free yourself from negative thoughts. The hint system also contributes to this. It will direct your attention in the right direction without leading you by the hand, only helping you focus on the necessary part of the space. To expand the gaming experience, there are 40 adorable achievements in the game. Collect them all! The 3D graphics take the search to a new level and open up additional search planes. Use all the game space! But time doesn't stand still either. After completing one timeline, you will have access to another, allowing you to delve deeper into the game's stories. Don't forget to return to the captain's cabin. As you progress through the game, it will fill up with trophies from different worlds. Game Features: Finding differences Dioramas with different stories and their continuations 40 dioramas (94 segments) Dioramas consisting of different numbers of segments. After completing a task, you can examine the presented landscape in more detail. There is a hint system Interactive captain's cabin. Relaxing music will calm and immerse you in the game. Expanded graphics settings will help find a balance between quality and performance. Flexible display settings for differences A cat.

name: Tails of Trainspot
about_the_game: Tails of Trainspot is a relaxing logic puzzle game set on the peaceful Packan Islands. Lay railway tracks to connect numbered stations, uncover the island’s secrets, and meet charming animal residents. With a gentle pace, cozy art style, and delightful mini-games, it's a thoughtful escape into a world of whimsy and wonder. Logic Puzzle Gameplay Solve grid-based puzzles where each station’s number tells you how many rails must connect to it. Plan your routes carefully—rails can’t cross or overlap, and every station must be part of a single connected network. Simple to learn, deeply satisfying to master. A World Full of Stories As you explore the islands, you'll meet curious animal residents and uncover hidden myths buried in ruins. The Packan Islands are more than just a puzzle board—they’re a living world filled with character and charm. Mini-Games for Variety Take a break from rail building with cozy side activities. Assemble bento boxes, run a drink bar, or roll sausage dice with the locals. These mini-games add warmth and variety to your island journey. Relaxing Yet Rewarding With its soft, industrial-age aesthetic and calming soundscape, Tails of Trainspot is designed to soothe while still offering satisfying challenges. Perfect for puzzle lovers looking to unwind without sacrificing depth. Let the tracks guide you through tales, tea, and tranquility.

name: Chessarama
about_the_game: Chessarama is a collection of original puzzle and strategy games inspired by Chess. It reimagines chess rules and tactics using many different themes. Each game has its own set of rules, visual theme and original handcrafted challenges for you to play! Key Features: Play 8 exclusive chess-inspired games available in Chessarama; Puzzle campaigns featuring 100+ levels plus 100+ unique challenges; 24 exclusive Chess Figures to unlock and collect; Unique art style, with beautiful dioramas; Daily and Weekly Challenges; Compete against each other on the leaderboards; Learn chess movements, tactics and strategies through a modern video game experience; Also includes “Classic Chess” for you to put your learnings into practice! Many Chess Worlds for You to Explore! Here are all the original games you will find in Chessarama: (1) Farm Life; (2) Dragon Slayers; (3) Street Soccer; (4) Lady Ronin; (5) Last Stand; (6) Knight Supreme; (7) Pawn Mania; (8) Soccer Chess. Take a look at some of the Chessarama games: In Dragon Slayer , you need to push your pawn to the end of a path in order to kill the mighty dragon. But it will not be that easy! The dragon attacks the board every time the pawn moves and every undefended piece will die. In Lady Ronin , Chess meets Sokoban. You play with a Ronin (a chess queen) and you need to eliminate the other pieces in order to get close to the Shogun and kill it. Pieces move like in chess, but push each other like in sokoban. In Soccer Chess you will play a soccer match using chess pieces. You will need to think a few moves ahead if you want to break through the adversary's defenses to score a goal. This is just some examples about how Chess can be reinvented. Welcome to Chessarama!

name: DriveCrazy
tags: Spectacle fighter,3D Platformer,Combat Racing,Racing,Driving,Parkour,Sports,Automobile Sim,Platformer,Arcade,Third Person,Parody,Mechs,Early Access,Funny,Surreal,Vehicular Combat,Story Rich,Action,Singleplayer
about_the_game: Drive a Kei Truck through a collapsing Japan! You are being chased by aliens! Dodge attacks! Dodge attacks with wall-riding! It is very dangerous to actually run in this way, so please do not imitate it! Recover the nitro by destruction! I don't know why nitro is recovered. Counterattack on enemies! Battle with giant creatures! Game progression is based on a stage-by-stage system. There are stages where smaller enemies appear and stages where you fight giant bosses. There are stages where no enemies appear. Compete with other players on online leaderboards The game implements online leaderboards, where scores and times are recorded for each stage so that you can compete with other players.

name: Genotype
about_the_game: In this Metroidvania FPS adventure, you explore an abandoned lab in Antarctica overrun by monstrous beasts. Print living creatures to use as weapons and survival tools, and take part in a fully voice-acted story as the facility’s sole survivor guides you through an alien ecosystem… but what role did he play in the research station’s downfall? 🔫 5 radically different weaponized creatures 💪 Diverse upgrade system giving you multiple play style options 🚧 Adrenaline-fueled combat spaces ready to test your mettle 👾 Unique enemies with fine-tuned behaviors and intense boss fights 🥵 Four difficulty settings 💰 Balanced loot amounts and ammo costs according to the chosen difficulty 🦾 Multiple accessibility options 📝 Fleshed out lore available to find within the facility ➕ Atmospheric synth-scapes, immersive voice acting, and much more Morph into a tiny creature to go into narrow vents by using the Brainlink, or rip obstacles apart with the Grubber. The open world lets you move freely across interconnected maps. Open up new paths by unlocking new creatures to print or find new items. Slay enemies, then upgrade your weaponized creatures and the gloves that wield them. When the alien ecosystem fights back, the weapon creatures you print with your gloves will determine your survival!

name: Zero-Sum Heart
tags: Female Protagonist,Story Rich,Choices Matter,Multiple Endings,Choose Your Own Adventure,Romance,Emotional,Atmospheric,Philosophical,Drama,Adventure,Stylized,Magic,Supernatural,Visual Novel,Surreal,Interactive Fiction,Casual,LGBTQ+,Simulation
about_the_game: Romantic, fantastical, and eerie, Zero-Sum Heart is a coming-of-age story about love. Enter a magical boarding school on our protagonist's eighteenth birthday as she makes a monumental decision and derails her life. A ritual sacrifice got her everything she ever wanted: an adoring crowd (faceless), a newfound power (dangerous), and a whirlwind romance (one-sided). But without a heart in her chest, how could she love anyone back? Does she even need to? A short 2-hour story with multiple endings, blending genres of romance, teen drama, thriller/horror, and magical realism. Vibrant and psychedelic hand-drawn illustrations that blur the lines between reality and fantasy. A witchy, sinister, and groovy original soundtrack. Zero-Sum Heart contains visual depictions of self-mutilation, violence, and gore, although not particularly graphic due to the non-realistic art style. The story also contains limited depictions of stalking, harrassment, abuse, toxic familial and romantic relationships, murder, and suicide. Please note that due to the premise of the story, any romantic interaction the protagonist initiates with characters under the influence of magic might involve dubious consent. If any of the above might be triggering for you, caution is advised while playing the game.

name: 国際指定怪異124号 東京廃村
about_the_game: 国際指定怪異124号：東京廃村は、 特殊部隊全滅ホラー・４人ザッピング操作アクションです。 貴方だけの15分を、ください。 プレイヤーは１人。操作すべきキャラクターは４人。切り替えはいつでも自由。 制限時間は15分。 全てがリアルタイムに進行する中で、極限のストレスが狂乱のアドレナリンに進化するまで戦いましょう。 一部のハードコアゲーマーに強く支持された「国際指定怪異123号　廃村」の続編は、少しだけ優しく、後は全て恐ろしく、総じて楽しくパワーアップしました。 滅亡する地球から逃げろ。壮絶な撤退戦、血溜まり地獄の消化試合。 「廃村」と呼ばれる怪異に地球が破壊され尽くし、人類は宇宙に脱出するしかなくなりました。 ごく一部の幸運な者たちを乗せた宇宙船を発進させるため、30日と244分の時間稼ぎをする必要があります。 「廃村」に囚われた戦力を奪還しながら、怪異の根城である東京を特殊爆弾で消滅させて下さい。 「東京水葬作戦」の始まりです。 特徴 ランダムに生成される異常化した東京で、囚われた仲間を救出する ４人のキャラクターを切り替えながら並行操作、高い難易度とここにしかないプレイ感覚 心折れるまで挑む、１ラウンドが短くリプレイ性の高いハードコアなゲーム性 ミッションで助けた仲間を戦力に組み込み、固有パークのシナジーを考案する新たな攻略ギミック 順番にステージクリアを目指す「東海」モードと、チャレンジを続け自分の部隊を強化する「山手」モードの２種類を用意

name: Atlantis: Pearls of the Deep
about_the_game: An All-New Pearl Popping Physics Adventure! With 500+ brand new levels, all-new 3D graphics, refreshing and challenging game modes, exciting mysteries.... Atlantis is back! In our brand-new 2022 reboot, Pearls of Atlantis: The Cove discover everything you loved about Atlantis: Pearls of the Deep ... and more! Play Pearls of Atlantis: The Cove now for free on mobile at Google Play, the Apple App Store, or on PC on the Microsoft Store. And, coming soon to Steam! Atlantis: Pearls of the Deep is an award winning physics-based, Match-3 puzzler. Drop colorful orbs and let gravity do the rest, as the pearls crash and clink their way through ramps, platforms, and spinning gears. Match 3 or more pearls of the same color and watch them disappear while surrounding pearls fill the void! Earn Achievements and Stars depending on how fast and efficiently you clear the screen, then use those Stars to purchase awesome and explosive power-ups! Play through 100+ regular levels to unlock the bonus levels for extra challenge! Then unlock Zen Mode to play again and again at your own pace! Enjoy over 120 levels of a unique blend of physics and Match-3 gameplay! Collect 7 awesome power-ups, like the Bomb Pearl, the Lightning Pearl, or the Ghost Pearl! Includes bonus challenge levels, mini-games, and Zen Mode with unlimited replayability! Find all the Power Crystals and save Atlantis from disaster once again!

name: Murder on the Marine Express
about_the_game: Murder on the Marine Express is a kinetic novel (linear, no choices) and the first installment of The Mysteries of Ranko Togawa series. The St. Joachim Academy for elite girls booked the maiden voyage of the new Marine Express submarine train, which runs along the ocean floor from California all the way to the Japanese coast. The journey seems like the perfect opportunity to enjoy the beautiful underwater scenery, learn about marine biology and, ultimately, relax from regular school life. However, the idyllic travel turns into a nightmare when one of the teachers is found dead in his room. Who could have killed the most popular and beloved professor in the academy? Ranko Togawa, accompanied by her friend Astrid, takes it upon herself to investigate the events and clear the name of the main suspect. Of course, it won't be that simple. As the number of victims grows, the possibility of facing a serial killer becomes more real and panic slowly sets in. Ranko will have to make the most of the time left to find out the truth and prevent the mysterious murderer from killing again, although not all the answers will be to her liking. Learn the secrets hidden in the Marine Express and discover the culprit in this story of tragedy, surprises and lots of humor! [FEATURES] ► A mystery visual novel with classic locked-space whodunit development following the style of popular detective fiction. ► A story in 5 chapters offering 3-4 hours of reading. ► Retro-feel graphics with pixel art in the style of old text adventure games. ► Large cast of charismatic characters with humorous dialogues. ► Side conversations on Ranko's phone which help to understand the situation on the train and know more about the students of St. Joachim. ► Texts in English, French, Spanish and Japanese.
