about_the_game: Lost For Swords is a Roguelike Deckbuilder, where the cards in your deck shape the rooms you’re exploring. Make your way up the tower, equip weapons and armor, cast spells and scrolls, activate auras, collect loot and fight the monsters on each floor. The clue: the equipment you pick up can only be used once! Plan ahead how you spend your resources. Are your cards strong enough? Can you make it to the next dungeon floor? Your equipment cards and the cards of the dungeon are shuffled together and placed on the board, creating a unique challenge every time! Between dungeon floors, you can upgrade your equipment to build the strongest deck possible. Can you find synergies between the cards? Key Features: Deck Building and Playstyles: build and refine your deck as you fight your way up the towers. Choose wisely and craft the best deck from 100+ available cards. Play offensive or defensive, sneaky or powerful, deliberate or reckless. You decide! Simple UI, Complex Strategy: every single one of your actions is a simple click. No inventory management, no menus, no card dragging, no busywork. Just pure turn based strategy and tactics! Roguelike Runs: choose a hero and ascend the floors of a tower that is ever-changing. No two runs are the same. How far can you make it? Additional Facts: 3 playable characters , each with 100+ cards multiple unlockable alternative starter decks for each character 6 distinct towers with unique monsters, traps and bosses quests and random encounters , which can change the course of a run level editor with the ability to share and play other's levels lots of difficulty modifiers to challenge all kinds of players

name: Ravva and the Cyclops Curse
about_the_game: Ravva and the Cyclops Curse is a short 8-bit platform adventure inspired by classic NES games, both in art style and gameplay. You’ll meet Ravva, a young summoner apprentice who is now in a desperate situation. The child’s mother is a powerful summoner, but then a terrible foe emerged: the Cyclops Lord. After an intense fight, he stole the summoner's powers and cast a terrible curse upon her! Now little Ravva must gather all courage available to face a dangerous journey to face the Cyclops and end the curse. The game will take you through various stages with challenging designs, all of them aiming to test your skills and courage. Use 4 different types of summons to defeat foes and overcome obstacles, each minion being better suited for specific tasks. Find power-ups, scores and secrets around the stages while facing unique enemies and hazards. The game is inspired by classic NES games, including charming art style and fair challenges.

name: Pixelorama
about_the_game: Unleash your creativity with Pixelorama, a powerful and accessible open-source pixel art multitool. Whether you want to create sprites, tiles, animations, or just express yourself in the language of pixel art, this software will realize your pixel-perfect dreams with a vast toolbox of features. Features: Wide Range of Tools: Customize your workflow by dynamically mapping tools to the left and right mouse buttons, making your creation process faster and more intuitive. Advanced Animation Support: Create animations with a timeline composed of layers and frames, including features like onion skinning, audio synchronization, frame tags, and the ability to draw while the animation is playing. Pixel Art Focused: Perfect pixel lines, indexed mode, and rotation and scaling algorithms tailored specifically to pixel art, like cleanEdge, OmniScale, and rotxel. Seamless Tilemap Creation: Use Pixelorama's tilemap layers to create rectangular, isometric or hexagonal tiles for your games. Powerful Layer System: Utilize clipping masks and non-destructive visual effects like outlines, gradient maps, drop shadows, and more. Perfect for experimenting with styles and compositions, as changes can be applied without altering your original artwork. Palette Management: Bring color into your canvas by choosing from pre-made palettes, importing your own, or creating custom ones inside the software to suit your unique style. Visual Effects: Multiple image effects for fine-tuning your artwork. Advanced Canvas Options: Utilize guides, rectangular and isometric grids, and tile mode to ensure seamless and precise pattern creation. Automatic Backups: Stay safe with auto-saved backups to recover your work in case of unexpected software crashes. Highly Customizable UI: Tailor the interface to your needs for maximum efficiency and a smooth workflow. Export & Import: Support for various formats such as PNG, animated PNG, spritesheets, GIFs and even videos. 3D Layer Support: Break the barrier between dimensions by bringing 3D models and shapes into your 2D canvas for unlimited creative possibilities. Command Line Automation: Automate file exports using the command line interface for bulk exporting and streamlining workflows. Project Metadata: Attach custom user data to layers, frames, and cels, making it easy to integrate with game development and other creative processes. Extension Support: Benefit from free, community-made extensions, such as tools that convert your 2D pixels into 3D voxels. Fully Open-Source: Pixelorama is open-source, licensed under the MIT license, guaranteeing free updates forever!

name: Gregory Horror Show: Soul of Roses
tags: Early Access,Action Roguelike,Rogue-lite,Cute,Rogue-like,Action,Dark Humor,Singleplayer,Story Rich,Atmospheric,Hack and Slash,Platformer,Cartoony,Indie,Colorful,Funny,Dark Comedy,Adventure,2D,Difficult
about_the_game: Soul of Roses is a 2D rogue light action game. Absorb the abilities of your enemies, fight, die, revive, and repeat as you progress through the story. What is Gregory House? It is a hotel in another dimension where souls who have not been satisfied in the real world arrive. The inhabitants of this world all release their desires and live their lives as they please. At Gregory House, “strength of thought” is everything. Even if your body perishes, you can reject death as long as your heart is not broken. It is the same for the other residents. Therefore, it is safe to beat up the residents. The Battle to Regain Memory. Gregory House is in trouble when it is attacked by runaway zombies. You awoke as one of the zombies, unable to remember even your own name. Gregory, the caretaker of Gregory House, offers you a contract. If you will restore peace to Gregory House, I will help you regain your memory. Your battle to restore peace to Gregory House and to regain your own memories begins. Transform with the Soul Taker! Take the souls of your enemies with the Soul Taker, a mysterious device embedded in your hand. By eating the souls you take, you can transform into a soul style that reflects your opponent's abilities! There are as many souls as there are enemies, so you are sure to find the perfect soul style for you. Diverse battle styles! Find your own way of fighting by combining “Memory” and “Soul Style” to strengthen yourself! LOCAL CO-OP! Play with a friend in the two-player co-op mode! Fight your enemies together in local co-op or online using the Steam's Remote Play Together feature. Lots of fun inhabitants! Many colorful, cute, and slightly funny inhabitants appear! Have fun chatting with them and eating their souls.

name: Cafeteria Nipponica
tags: Cooking,RPG,Simulation,Life Sim,City Builder,2D Platformer,Pixel Graphics,2.5D,2D,Cute,Building,Colorful,Management,Modern,Singleplayer,Colony Sim,Indie,Isometric,Adventure,Female Protagonist
about_the_game: Don your chef's hat and hit the kitchen! You're the chef de cuisine in this scrumptious simulation that'll have you coming back for seconds... and more! Run your own restaurant, find ingredients, research recipes and spice up your culinary repertoire! Only you can bring your establishment sweet success! Decide every detail of the floor from tables to TVs and do whatever it takes to make your customers happy! After all, their ratings determine whether you're chef...or sap. Score enough points and you'll be able to host a variety of fun events from eating contests to cooking classes, further boosting your popularity! But of course, what's a cook without a crew? Recruit eager faces to build your own five-star team. Play your cards right and you might find yourself running multiple restaurants at once! The sky's the limit in this sizzling new take on restaurant management, incorporating a uniquely Japanese spread that will train your brain and tantalize your taste buds! ▼Game Flow First you need to set up your furnishings and other appointments. Select an area of the restaurant framed in orange to place tables and increase your clientele. As you get more customers, your staff members will get busier, so you'll want to hire new employees. You can do this starting in the fifth month of your first year. You will also want to develop new dishes. You can charge more for popular dishes, making it easier to make ends meet, so try to cultivate a menu that will attract customers. As sales increase, your restaurant can rise in the regional rankings. Open new locations and expand them, and aim for the #1 ranking in all regions! Try searching for 'Kairosoft' to see all of our games!!

name: ZAKESTA-Z
about_the_game: Shootung fights on all 5 sides with normal shots that power up by 5 stages and sub-weapons that power up by 3 stages. You can consume a gauge to generate a circle called 'Z-ZONE', and items captured within that range can be turned into high-scoring items. *Select from 3 modes: 'NORMAL', 'ZOGEN' where the game rank changes, and 'ZUTTOZ' where the highest rank is fixed. *6 types of sub-weapons [0] Fires a bullet that attacks in the opposite direction of your aircraft's movement. [1] Emits a huge laser. [2] Damages enemies and enemy bullets with a barrier. [3] A ball rotating around your aircraft deals damage to enemies and enemy bullets. [4] Fires a bullet that explodes when it hits an enemy. [5] Fires a bullet that guides the enemy. *Detailed explanation can be found in the Community Hub guide. *Depending on the contents of the version update, the replay may differ from the actual play. Please record important replays on video as soon as possible.

name: The Sea Hotel☆Umineko Tei
about_the_game: 老朽化が進む海猫亭…今は限られた部屋とスタッフだけで運営していますが、一にも二にもまずは部屋を改築していく必要があります。 部屋の改築に使う素材は冒険者に依頼し、探索で取ってきてもらいましょう。 改築費用は宿泊代やアイテムをホテルの売店で販売することで稼ぐことができます。 そしてホテルの評価を上げるにはＶＩＰと呼ばれるお得意様を接待する必要があります。 お酒、食べ物、お土産、要求されたアイテムを駆使し、貴方なりの「おもてなし」をしてあげましょう。 評判が上がればイヴの発言力も高まります。必要に感じたことを仲間に伝え、より効率よくホテルを管理すれば、そのうち優秀なスタッフが集い経営は軌道に乗るはずです。 そうやって少しずつ育て集めた資産を上手に使い、やがては栄光の五つ星… そして海洋都市イシュワルド一のホテルを目指しましょう！ ストーリー 海洋都市イシュワルドの海沿いにある老舗ホテル『海猫亭』― 親に経営を任されていたはずのイヴは姉妹店であるレストランの経営に勤しんでいました。 ホテルの運営を放置気味にしたことで老朽化が進み、客は離れ、毎日続く赤字経営… 加えて海猫亭買収の話まで出てきてしまったのです。 このことがママにバレたらマズい… 世界一わがままな女の子イヴでもさすがにこの状況に危機感を持ちました。 経営を上向きにし、かつて栄えていた『ホテル海猫亭』を取り戻す― わがままだけど美少女で超天才。本気になったイヴは意気揚々と、ホテルのドアを開放するのでした（久々に）

name: Wind Story
tags: Early Access,Simulation,Adventure,RPG,Pixel Graphics,Farming Sim,Casual,Action RPG,City Builder,Life Sim,Hand-drawn,3D Platformer,Stylized,Exploration,Immersive Sim,Cartoon,Cute,Comic Book,Third Person,Isometric
about_the_game: 'Wind Story' is a simulation game. Upon arriving at Wind Chime Ranch, players can immerse themselves in rural lifestyles, including farming, breeding, and fishing. During the day, they can freely roam the Ranch's flower fields, while at night, they can enjoy drinking and dancing by the lakeside bonfire. Players can attract more visitors to the ranch, gradually building their own accommodations, windmills, power houses, and restaurants. They can cultivate a variety of vegetables, flowers, and fruits, and raise diverse animals. Furthermore, they can install various amusement facilities on the ranch to earn more money and create their own recreational oasis. The game offers extensive freedom; players can cultivate different crops, care for adorable animals, gather mushrooms and various flowers, fish, and mine. They can collect materials, prepare delectable meals, and interact with characters throughout the ranch. To draw more visitors to the ranch, players can progressively construct windmills, power houses, ranch accommodations, restaurants, hospitals, and amusement parks. These facilities, along with the diverse attractions within, transform the ranch into a resort paradise. You can also freely explore the world, capture or cultivate your pets, and let them participate in the construction of the ranch. You can also bring your pets to fight against monsters outside and maintain the safety of the ranch. Build the ranch into a world you love. This is an indie game developed by two people. Thank you very much for supporting our game.

name: QUALIA ~The Path of Promise~
about_the_game: STORY “Machina” is the world’s first android to pass the Turing Test. She’s attracted worldwide attention for her human-like qualities though there’s still some part of her that is not fully complete which shows that she still has room to grow. Incidentally, she is also dressed like a maid. At the suggestion of his colleague, Dr. Hiro Koshino ends up taking Machina home and has her work as a maid. As Machina continues to learn and grow through her interactions with Hiro, he also begins to develop certain feelings towards her… An android heroine and the genius hermit. This is a story of pure love where the two learn to grow together, overcome fate and find happiness. FEATURES Art by Suzushiro Atsushi English, Japanese and Simplified Chinese language options Japanese voice acting Kinetic story An android maid girl!

name: Obscurite Magie: The Blood of Kings
about_the_game: Fifteen years ago, the ruler of the Giselian Empire was deposed in a coup d'etat. The current ruler, Valon, imposes heavy taxes on the people, but the imperial army is strong and the nation is secure. The people suffer from the steep taxes, but very few dare speak out. Lietta Fane is a girl who works as an adventurer in the Giselian Empire. She was raised by her swordmaster Negel for as long as she can remember. She never knew her parents. In addition to her adventurer work, she's also searching for the person who killed Negel. One day she receives a request from the guild to escort a nobleman. On the way to their destination, she is attacked, and must now confront her destiny... Take off for adventure through the Giselian Empire while uncovering the truth behind Negel's murder in this timeless turn-based RPG. Face off against a diverse set of enemies and bosses, discover and gain a wide variety of loot, and level up to overpower your foes!

name: Soaring Machinariae
about_the_game: A girls' adventure story, told through a traditional action RPG! Control Iris the Machinariae to explore fields and dungeons, and fight against monsters with sword combos, items, and special moves! Story: Iris, a special Automaton known as a Machinariae, and her master, Automaton Handler Maria. Together, they set out for a remote island in distant seas, seeking a treasure said to grant any wish. Awaiting them there is a woman asking their assistance, a fateful reunion with a rival, and a mysterious, hostile girl... Can Iris and Maria overcome the powerful forces standing in their way, and unravel the mystery of the tower to obtain the treasure? Features: ・Action-Packed Gameplay An action RPG with simple yet in-depth controls! Alongside analog movement, you can jump, dash, guard, counter, and unleash special moves! Items can also be assigned to shortcut keys. ・An Adventurous Original Soundtrack 31 songs + 2 jingles composed by Kensei, the game's creator! ・Full Japanese Voice Acting All characters' lines are fully voiced in Japanese by professional voice actors. This includes not only scenes, but shouts in battle as well.

name: Noah's Dilemma
tags: Strategy,Rogue-lite,Management,Turn-Based Strategy,Auto Battler,Resource Management,Turn-Based Tactics,Turn-Based Combat,Deckbuilding,Roguelike Deckbuilder,Rogue-like,Inventory Management,Mythology,Procedural Generation,Atmospheric,Replay Value,Survival,Simulation,Hand-drawn,Adventure
about_the_game: Strategy Roguelike x Noah's Ark Noah's Dilemma is a crew-building strategy roguelike set in a reinvented mythology of Noah's Ark inspired by Magical Realism, featuring unique placement-centric gameplay inspired by sudoku and autochess. Playtime A successful run typically takes around 2 to 5 hours to complete, with 5 to 10 attempts expected before beating the game for the first time. Build Your Animal Crew Embark on a journey to gather animals who will also serve as your sailors. Harness their abilities, ignite synergies, and turn your ark into a swift vessel. Explore Wild Islands Sail through a procedurally generated map, venturing to untamed islands filled with hidden treasures, hot springs, altars, villages, and more. Battle the Coral-Born The Coral-Born are hostile creatures that emerged after the Great Flood. Command your animal crew to defend the ark from their relentless assaults. Conquer the Four Seas Each of the Four Seas is ruled by a formidable boss. Defeat them all, bring every animal onboard to the promised land, and claim your title as the conqueror of the Four Seas. More Challenges Await After victory, unlock 2 new playable characters, face 6 tougher quests, and activate a 10-level challenge mode designed for veteran players. Play First, Lore Later Noah’s Dilemma emphasizes gameplay first, presenting its story in a minimalist style. Still, every element in the game is carefully crafted to fit into a rich, coherent world, leaving room for lore-seekers to uncover its deeper mysteries. Features Four sea areas to conquer, each with its own traits and governing boss. Three playable characters, each with their own strengths and weaknesses. 50+ creatures, ranging from familiar mammals to deep-sea inhabitants. 50+ encounters and events randomly woven into your adventure. 50+ animal natures and abnormalities to trigger risks and thrills. 50+ animal effects with abundant variations and synergies. 150+ items and relics designed for strategic play. 1 core mission, 6 extra quests and a 10-level challenge mode. A fresh and engaging 10-hour experience for all players, with many more hours for those looking to complete the game and master every detail.

name: Marron's Day
about_the_game: Save the town festival in Marron's Day , a silly pocket-sized adventure where you're a bunny! Play as Marron, a young bunny, and help the cute animal friends in town so that they'll sign up for stalls at the town festival! Enjoy the cosy and retro pixel art graphics as you explore the town. Features: A top-down town to explore and adorable animal friends to help Cosy minigames to go with a heartwarming story! Cute pixel art and beepy chiptune music Authentic retro gameplay - it can practically* run on the handheld game console of your childhood! *(It really will run!) name: Star Farmer: Warlock of the Universe
about_the_game: As a Warlock, fund your expedition to discover rare and powerful flora through the lucrative profession of star farming. Build the ultimate space farm as you explore the galaxy and stumble onto the mystery of a dead planet. Cultivate exotic plant life, trade your harvests for credits, and customize your runs with unique powers in this roguelite adventure. Harvest the Cosmos Venture into uncharted territories and gather an array of seeds and rare materials. Cultivate Your Bounty Onboard your trusty spaceship, transform your harvested resources into flourishing crops. Create the ultimate interstellar farm. Warlock Life On your travels, find rare and powerful flora you can bring back to your den. These plants can then be utilised to give you powerful boons on your runs. Trade Among the Stars Encounter wandering traders during your galactic escapades and strike deals to sell your produce for credits. Decorate Your Ship Find furniture on your expeditions and bring them back to spice up your farm. Upgrade Your Cosmic Expedition Spend your hard-earned credits to enhance yourself and your spaceship. Unravel the Secrets Immerse yourself in a story that unravels the mysteries of a long-dead planet. The fate of this forgotten world lies in your hands. Features Auto-firing weapons Fast runs (under 15 minutes) Over 200 unique powers available to customise your runs Find furniture and cuddly companions on your runs to take back to your ship Expand your farm, recruit drones to aid you in the busy work, and use your profits to increase the power of your character Each run takes you to many different planets, survive waves lasting 20-40 seconds and harvest as much as you can in that time

about_the_game: Open a long forgotten, dusty suitcase in your grandpa’s attic, rediscover your old toys and even older memories. As soon as you start playing, it’s both rails and memories that start to click together. In that creative space, where all depends on you, you can feel child-like joy and fulfillment of building tracks, solving brain teasers and creating your own dioramas. There is something for everybody here. Relaxing main story. Devious challenges for those who like it tough. Sandbox board for people who love tinkering and expressing themselves. Toy Trains land is yours to shape. The challenges are open-ended and each board has multiple possible solutions, so you can let your imagination loose and never feel stuck. After you solve a board, get creative with decorating it, progress with every step and set up more and more complex routes each time! The warm, colorful world keeps you nice and cozy throughout the journey. There is no timer, no score, no rush. Play at your own pace and take time to step back and admire your work. Toy Trains brings nothing but satisfaction and pleasure. In Toy Trains you can: Be creative - try various options to solve open-ended challenges Express yourself - decorate the land in your individual style Play with the world itself - splash some water, move the trees or melt over the cuteness of little Railies! Go back in time - experience child-like joy and live through a nostalgic storyline Relax - there is no rush and no stress in the Toy Trains land Immerse - feel all that and more in the most captivating way - VR! CONTROLS: WASD/Left analog : Movement Left CTRL , LT / RT (L2 / R2) → Hold to crouch Lef Shift ,  R1 / RB → Hold to walk faster Right Click, L1 / LB → Toggle zoom (press again to zoom in/out while held) Left Click, A / X → Interact

name: RPG Developer Bakin
about_the_game: Zero programming required! A tool for anyone to create RPGs 'RPG Developer Bakin' (hereafter 'Bakin') is a tool that makes it easy to create various types of RPGs, adventure games and action games without any programming knowledge. Create a 'world' as if you were playing a game! Fun and highly functional map editor Maps, which are the stages of games, are easy to create, just like drawing a picture with a pen. Simply raise or lower the ground and place plants, trees, houses and furniture. You can freely change the position, scale and rotation of the placed objects! You can also customize models by combining objects such as houses, windows, and balconies to create your own unique world. Create stunning scenes quickly and easily! Advanced visual expression Advanced visual expressions such as blurring distant scenery or changing the lighting of an entire screen are easily achieved with Bakin's post-effects capabilities. Other tools include a toon shader for creating a cartoon-like look, a mask function for hiding parts of an image, and a decal function for applying 2D assets like stickers. We encourage you to pursue your own visual image to the fullest! Simply arrange the panels! Event editor without programming Creating games with Bakin requires zero programming knowledge. By simply combining various 'event panels' such as 'have a conversation,' 'change character position,' and 'branch by choice,' you can easily create events and control the game. In addition, common events such as 'join a group,' 'receive an item,' and 'move between maps' can be used immediately with just a few modifications to the included templates. Screen designs are also customizable! Various tools to support game creation Bakin's layout tool allows you to freely customize the game screen interface. Various tools support your game creation, such as a database for detailed character and item settings and a camera tool for dynamic game play. Assets & Samples to start creating games immediately Various assets to enhance the game setting and storyline, such as 2D/3D graphical assets for characters and buildings, particle effects, sound data, etc., are available as bundled or exclusive free DLCs. In addition, you can create a richer world by installing DLCs sold separately. Of course, you can also import and use your own 3D models, pixel characters, illustrations and sounds. It's also possible to write plug-ins in C# to extend the functionality of the tool. You can distribute your games royalty-free, whether they are paid or free. Now turn 'your idea of the world' into a game with Bakin!

name: Lotte

Explore a beautiful and lovingly crafted world in a low poly art style. Befriend a cast of charming animal characters. Complete fun and silly side quests at your own pace. name: 冬眠（hibernation）
tags: Adventure,Philosophical,RPG,Dark Fantasy,Loot,Medieval,3D Fighter,Action RPG,Looter Shooter,Runner,Indie,3D,Survival Horror,Perma Death,Singleplayer
about_the_game: If the computer configuration is too poor, the dream is easily affected by lag interference, and it may even be forced to leave the dream midway or unable to enter the dream at all. Attention: Due to personal abilities, some parts of the English and Japanese versions of the interface cannot be translated correctly, while the Chinese version is fine. Please purchase with caution. What kind of work is this? “Dormancy” is a unique survival game where players are summoned to a frozen dream. In this dormant realm, mysteries and challenges abound, and only by bravely confronting them can one hope to uncover the truth. The player is summoned to the frozen dreamlike space by a mysterious force. It is desolate and cold, with ruins all around. The player encounters enigmatic stone statues and is informed that they were brought to this place by mistake. The statues express the hope that the player will leave quickly, as the place is very dangerous for them and it’s not where they belong. If the player insists on exploring this dreamlike space, they need to constantly monitor attributes such as health, stamina, hunger, coldness, and magic power. Players can maintain their survival by collecting supplies, cooking food, or purchasing medicine. When the player’s hunger reaches a critical level, they will be unable to automatically regenerate health and magic. In extreme hunger, stamina will not be sufficient for running or launching attacks, and their health will continuously deplete until death. Additionally, in extremely cold environments, the player needs to consume warming medicine or stay close to a bonfire for warmth, or else they will freeze, movement will be restricted, hunger will worsen, stamina will rapidly decrease, eventually leading to death. Jumping from a high place is also very likely to be fatal (I often die this way too). Players can obtain equipment in the wilderness or enhance various attributes through forging, thereby better adapting to the current environment, aiding them in surviving and exploring in this world, uncovering hidden truths. Players can also learn various magic spells to combat the creatures in the dreamlike world. These magical skills have proficiency levels, and their power increases with more usage. Players can piece together the truth of this world by conversing with stone statues or examining items to gather fragmented information. In the Chinese version, dialogues mostly employ classical literary language, requiring players to read carefully. The archaic language imbues the game with a profound and ancient atmosphere, enhancing player immersion. It should be specially noted that this game cannot be saved! Saying it three times, this game cannot be saved! Cannot be saved! Cannot be saved!” Most games wouldn’t adopt such a crazy design, and major companies wouldn’t dare take this risk. However, I have a reason to design it this way. Furthermore, this game is positioned as an indie game, so we can try out this idea and take the risk. It’s okay to fail. The title of this game is “Hibernation - Frozen Dreams,” which brings players into a frozen dream. In reality, when we dream, everything in the dream appears very real, but upon waking up, everything in the dream immediately disappears. Life is also as illusory as a dream; when one departs, everything will vanish, leaving behind only the rich experiences within the dream. This game attempts to convey this idea. It can be said that it is not just a game, but more like a real and accessible dream, a frozen, tangible dream. Due to the inability to save, many features in the game have been adjusted accordingly. For example, players do not necessarily have to defeat the BOSS to progress. Why must one defeat the BOSS to proceed? In certain areas, specific attributes are required to advance. Players can enhance their attributes by forging equipment or find special gear nearby, usually not far away, which can be worn to progress. You can choose to speedrun… It’s easy to complete, but understanding the game deeply is more challenging. Players don’t have to fight to quickly finish, but you can also gradually level up and challenge various BOSSes. However, doing so will bring immense pressure to players because if they die, all their efforts will be in vain, and this is the important experience we want to convey to players. When players first enter the game, they will see a passage in classical Chinese, which can be translated into vernacular Chinese as: “When I doubt the existence of all things, I do not need to doubt the existence of my own thoughts, because at this moment the only thing I can confirm is the existence of my thoughts.” This is actually a famous quote by Descartes (“I think, therefore I am”), which is the only valid proof of human existence to date. Therefore, I want to introduce this concept into the game to guide players to contemplate and experience issues related to dreams and existence. Thus, this game can also be described as a philosophical game. How to play the work more economically? You can purchase it when it’s on sale. Most of the revenue generated from PC sales will be reinvested into the development of our next project. Thank you for reading my story.

name: This Grand Life 2
tags: Simulation,Capitalism,Economy,Time Management,Life Sim,Tactical RPG,Sandbox,Character Customization,Moddable,Management,Choices Matter,RPG,Strategy,Text-Based,Colony Sim,Survival,Strategy RPG,Resource Management,2D,Early Access
about_the_game: This Grand Life 2 seeks to answer the question, 'What would life be like as a ____ living in ____?' With a unique character preferences system and an inflation-driven economy, the game simulates the financial experience of different people in the modern world. Features Colony Sim-Style Management - Set priorities for your characters and watch them fulfill their desires. You make the important decisions like where to work, live and study. Character Preferences - Be an ambitious investment banker with a paperwork allergy, or a struggling single parent with a shopping addiction. The unique preferences system offers a variety of 'what-ifs' to play out. Multi-Person Household - Manage multiple characters in one household. Run a bachelor pad, nuclear family, student share house or hobo camp. Multi-Generational - Your characters will age from birth to death and accumulate status conditions as they go through life. Skills and Education - Multiple organic routes to qualify for a job, whether through experience, education or a combination of both. Cycles within cycles - Industries will go through their own booms and busts so consider your options carefully. Manufacturing jobs might pay higher wages while electricity prices are decreasing at the same time. Be A Business Owner - Start your own small businesses. Hire workers, run it as a family enterprise, or do all the jobs yourself. Real Estate - Purchase residential or commercial property and rent it out, live in it, or use it for one of your businesses. Stock Market - Research stocks. Consider industry trends, management competency, price/earnings ratios and other factors before investing. Passions - Embrace a variety of passions like painting, thievery, home building or child adoption. Rivals and Influence - Endgame competitors will support government policy changes in their own interests. Generate your own influence to do the same. Real City Pathfinding - Maps are based on real cities. Travel time depends on actual road and rail networks, as well as obstacles like rivers and mountains. Moddability - Create your own careers, courses, locations, possessions and more. All content designed to be highly moddable.

name: FORGE SIMULATOR
about_the_game: As a blacksmith, you find yourself trapped in a never-ending labyrinth. To escape, you will need to find a weapon powerful enough to destroy the maze. Fortunately, the labyrinth's endlessness extends to its resources as well. Utilize all your blacksmithing skills to craft a legendary weapon and make your escape! The labyrinth is endless. Only a weapon with great power can be the key to escaping this labyrinth. A repetitive forging process is necessary to create a good weapon. Hammering iron at high temperatures makes the weapon more resistant to strong impacts. Stretching, cutting, and rejoining the iron increases the weapon's flexibility, making it less likely to break. Quenching the heated iron in water ensures the blade remains sharp for longer. Fortunately, this labyrinth is rich in resources. Chop wood to make charcoal and use it as fuel for the furnace. Mining stone may yield ore that can be smelted into fine iron bars. Discovering ore with good properties allows you to smelt it into iron bars, which can then be forged into more powerful weapons. You can't always be working. Even in a labyrinth, you have the right to enjoy your leisure time. You can race with animals, test the performance of your crafted weapons, or even make some pretty friends in the labyrinth.

However, on his way back home, Donald Barnes begins to be stalked by a powerful and horrifying creature that perfectly matches the physical descriptions of Mortisomem. name: Yokai Landlord: Monster Mystery!
tags: Adventure,Indie,Mystery,Visual Novel,Story Rich,Choose Your Own Adventure,Emotional,Psychological,Detective,2D,Controller,Hand-drawn,Cartoon,Singleplayer,Modern,2D Platformer,Retro,Anime,Social Deduction,Cute
about_the_game: Story After your father’s passing, you inherit the apartment he left behind. Then one day, a mysterious man appears with a warning for you—the new landlord: 'There are Yokai living among the residents in your apartment building.' From that moment on, your journey to uncover the cleverly disguised Yokai begins. Overview 'Yokai Landlord: Monster Mystery!' A social deduction adventure where monsters wear human faces. This is a social deduction adventure game where you, as the landlord, must uncover Yokai who are blending in among your apartment’s tenants by gathering clues and presenting evidence. The game is a single narrative divided into multiple chapters. As you progress, the seasons change, and new tenants—including more Yokai—move in to replace those who were evicted. In each chapter, you’ll need to identify the Yokai in disguise, gather convincing evidence, and evict them. The overarching goal of the game is to uncover why Yokai are infiltrating your apartment—and what motives lie behind the warnings of the mysterious man who appeared before you. Gameplay 🔍Gather information from tenants Talk to your tenants—they’ll come to you, the new landlord, with complaints, requests, or simply to chat. These conversations may contain clues that help you identify the Yokai among them. If something sounds off or strange, that might be a hint. Be sure to take notes. Use the apartment’s security cameras (Available from Chapter Two) Yokai are clever. Even with surveillance cameras, they won’t reveal themselves easily. But if you’re observant, you might catch them doing something not quite human—when they think no one’s watching. Even behavior that seems ordinary at first might hold hidden meaning. Keep your eyes open and leave no clue unexplored. Evict the Yokai once discovered After gathering enough evidence and identifying a tenant as a Yokai, you can proceed with their eviction. However, simply pointing out the suspicious tenant won’t be enough to make them leave. You must present evidence—such as proof that the other tenants are human—to convince the Yokai to reveal their true identity. Be cautious: if you wrongly evict a human tenant, the remaining residents will become even more suspicious of one another—exactly what the yokai want. Interview tenants carefully, uncover subtle 'suspicious', and connect the dots to build your case. When you finally corner a yokai after rounds of deduction, you’ll experience a unique sense of accomplishment that only this game can deliver. If you don't evict them in time... On the night of the new moon, the Yokai will unleash their true power. When that happens, there’s nothing us powerless humans can do. Not just a mystery game—a heartwarming story of personal growth awaits. Estimated Total Playtime About 10 hours . If you're new to “mystery games”, it may take longer. If you're curious about the gameplay, we recommend trying the free demo version first. It includes the full first chapter and tutorial elements. Streaming Guidelines Streaming guidelines are available on the official website. Please check them before streaming. For those playing on Steam Deck Please enable Proton through Compatibility settings to run the game.

Starting as an intern, you will have the chance to climb the corporate ladder and build your own company. CAREER JOURNEY Begin your career as an intern. Complete various office tasks such as organizing files, scheduling meetings, delivering documents, and responding to emails to gain experience, improve your performance, and get promoted to higher positions. OFFICE UPGRADES Purchase new office items to increase productivity and capacity, gaining advantages that enhance your employees' performance. But remember, happy employees are more productive. ASSISTANT MANAGEMENT As you advance in your career, you can hire an assistant and delegate some of your responsibilities. Hire new employees, expand your business, and secure a strong position in the corporate world. BID AND PROJECT MANAGEMENT Take on projects by bidding in the market and assign tasks to your employees. The more contracts you win and successfully complete, the faster your company will grow, advancing toward industry leadership. Changing the way you shoot, jump, and kick will help you get better scores and defeat other players RETRO STYLE • Retro graphics and a synthwave soundtrack across 6 different worlds COLORFUL CAST OF CHARACTERS • Meet several eccentric characters when you progress the single player campaign. name: Dark Strokes: The Legend of the Snow Kingdom Collector’s Edition

From its breathtaking opening scene, in which a hunter saves a princess from an uncertain fate at the hands of a Snow Knight, to its stunning conclusion, 'Dark Strokes 2' will captivate you with a world abounding in beauty and detail, puzzles and mini-games unlike any you have solved, and a story of unprecedented depth. Guide the hunter as he seeks to save his beloved from a warlock who's kidnapped her and cast an icy spell over a once glorious kingdom, search for and find cleverly hidden clues and objects, and uncover the truth about a tree with leaves of gold that holds a startling secret! Once you complete the main scenario, your adventure will be far from over, as you'll unlock a bonus episode that delves even deeper into the mystery of the Snow Kingdom, desktop wallpapers, production sketches, character art, a downloadable soundtrack, and more! Enter the enchanted realm of the Snow Kingdom and begin your journey today! Key features: • Hand-drawn fairytale locations • Challenging puzzles and mini-games • Captivating story about love and magic • Strategy guide, tutorial, and unlimited hints • Bonus chapter that expands the adventure

name: Crawl Tactics
tags: Casual,RPG,Strategy,Turn-Based Tactics,Turn-Based,Tactical RPG,Turn-Based Combat,Indie,Party-Based RPG,Strategy RPG,Pixel Graphics,Turn-Based Strategy,Isometric,Fantasy,Grid-Based Movement,Rogue-like,Difficult,Rogue-lite,2D,Tactical
about_the_game: Crawl Tactics combines classic turn-based tactics with roguelike progression. In Dungeon Mode, face challenging, ever-changing encounters as you explore procedurally generated maps. In Quest Mode, develop your village, train your mercenaries, and defend against growing enemy invasions. More of a fully fledged Tactical RPG battle than a puzzle game! Crawl Tactics is not a puzzle-like tactical game focused on finding one correct solution, but a turn-based strategy RPG forfans of classic, orthodox SRPGs. You can enjoy deep tactical gameplay that considers height differences, unit facing, weather, terrain, and more. Combat that uses the environment and traps Traps and terrain affect both you and your enemies. Set grass on fire, electrocute enemies standing on water, or ignite poison clouds. Various interactions are possible through pushing/throwing objects and units. Push enemies off high ground or into blade traps, or roll boulders to hit them. You can also activate cannons or crossbow traps to damage distant enemies, and all traps can trigger in chains for satisfying results. Growth, customization, and building the party you want You can freely customize skills, equipment, classes, techniques, and appearance. Even after clearing the main dungeon, you can continue developing your characters through New Game Plus and Reverse, which allows you to reset classes even after advancing to higher tiers. From a solo party to an 8-member battle party, you can build any party composition you want. Challenging and ever-changing Dungeon Mode Dungeon Mode lets you explore dungeons composed of multiple rooms. Both the dungeons and the battlefields within them are procedurally generated, providing challenging and varied experiences. Ruins, caves, catacombs, forests—each features unique climates, monsters, and environments. Every dungeon may include hostile or friendly NPCs, special mercenaries or valuable items, and unique events such as siege battles or defense missions. Quest Mode focused on village building and character development In Quest Mode, you expand your village by constructing buildings each turn and hire multiple mercenaries, sending whichever ones you choose on the quests you want. Rewards differ depending on the type of quest you undertake each turn, and you can also choose higher difficulties, allowing as much grinding as you prefer. Through village events where monsters invade at set intervals, you can engage in larger-scale battles than in standard quests.

name: ENTITY: THE BLACK DAY
about_the_game: A third-person survival horror action game set in dark, atmospheric underground environments, blending psychological suspense with intense combat. The story follows Adam, a former special forces operative assigned a top-secret mission: investigate a supposedly abandoned underground bio-research facility and extract evidence proving the government’s involvement in funding a viral development program—one that spiraled out of control and killed thousands. What begins as a simple data retrieval job quickly turns into a dangerous search for answers. Most of the facility’s personnel are dead—casualties of brutal emergency protocols. Two scientists are missing, and Adam must track them through dark, hazardous corridors and storm-drain tunnels. As Adam follows their trail, unsettling signs and unexplained events make him question the true nature of his mission—and his own connection to the facility. Gameplay: Combat: Attack enemies directly with firearms, melee strikes, and evasive maneuvers in fast-paced encounters. Executions: Crush and smash weakened enemies with brutal takedowns for maximum impact. Weapons: Unlock new weapons as you progress. Health: Restore your strength using limited medical injections found along the way. Boss Battles: Confront powerful bosses, each with distinct attack patterns and strategies. Resources & Crafting: Ammunition can become low at times, You can explore your surroundings to gather some extra ammo and materials that allow you to craft additional rounds and health injections whenever supplies begin to run out. Key Features: AI-Driven Protagonist & True Companion: Adam is brought to life with an advanced AI system, making him feel and act like a real companion throughout your journey. He reacts to situations, shares his thoughts, engages you directly as the player, and sometimes even breaks the fourth wall. Every conversation, reaction, and decision adds depth to the adventure—and you can customize how much Adam interacts with you, tailoring the experience to your preference. Original Story & Atmosphere: Unravel a unique, unpredictable narrative filled with psychological horror and mystery. Stunning Visuals: Explore atmospheric environments with high-quality graphics and immersive effects. Diverse & Challenging Levels: Encounter new hazards, puzzles, and enemies in every area for a consistently fresh experience. Blending Real and Virtual Worlds: The game creatively mixes real-world interaction with the virtual environment, requiring you to think beyond the screen to solve certain puzzles and challenges. Some enigmas can only be solved by combining clues from both realities, offering a truly unique gameplay twist. Not an Imitation: Enjoy innovative ideas and mechanics—ENTITY: THE BLACK DAY is not another clone.      Supported Languages 🌍: English, العربية, Русский, 中文（简体）, 日本語, Deutsch, Español (España), 한국어, Português (Brasil), Polski, Français, Italiano, Español (Latinoamérica), 中文（繁體）, Nederlands, Bahasa Melayu, Čeština, Dansk, Suomi, Magyar, Norsk, Português (Portugal), Română, Svenska, Türkçe

name: Tacape
about_the_game: Tacape is a deck-builder card game with roguelite elements for those who love a tactical challenge. Take part in a series of combats, build your strategy, upgrade your cards and face folkloric creatures along the way! Be careful! Enemies can switch between positions and will be intent on hindering you in various ways during combat. You will have to manipulate the battlefield, understand the behavior of each enemy, and make smart moves to win every battle: there are countless strategies' opportunities! Buy and upgrade your cards at the shop, get new abilities with the artifact, heal yourself at the campfire and fight bosses in a Brazilian folk universe! STORY: How far would you go to face your fears? Follow the journey of Lorena, who, after having her little brother taken away by a mysterious creature must venture into the forest and face various folk figures. In Tacape fear and courage go hand in hand, it's up to you to decide which is stronger. Discover also the adventure of Lucas, the little brother of Lorena who will try everything to get out of the forest to get back to her big sister. Do you have what it takes to save them from the creatures? Play now and help them to go through this mysterious forest! Download Tacape and discover: • 2 different characters with unique abilities • More than 100 cards • More than 25 enemies • 4 playable areas

name: Love is...
about_the_game: Immerse yourself in the heartwarming world of Emotional Art Hidden Objects Game. 'Love is...' is an emotional art hidden objects game created with hand-drawn illustrations by the global star artist 'Puuung.' Experience the beauty of watercolor spreading and filling the artwork as you find hidden objects. Discover new hidden objects along with heartwarming stories. Find hidden objects to fully color and complete beautiful paintings. As you find hidden objects, colors will spread, beautifully filling the artwork. Complete over 280 heartfelt hand-drawn watercolor illustrations. The unique coloring engine of 'Love is...' offers you an emotional and intense experience. Immerse Yourself In A Warm and Lovely story. Dive into a heartwarming animation with a sometimes serene, sometimes comic love story. Over an hour of high-quality story animation is prepared for you. Keep Beautiful Wallpapers. With each chapter you clear in 'Love is...', you will receive beautiful wallpapers. Keep 34 stunning high-quality wallpapers on your PC forever. Enjoy the Sweet Ost Of 'Love Is...' Enjoy the unplugged OST with its sweet melodies of piano and acoustic guitar.

name: Fujii - A Magical Gardening Adventure
about_the_game: Fujii is a meditative and magical journey through dreamlike landscapes filled with light and wonder. An adorable gnome companion welcomes you home. It’s the beautiful garden of your dreams, ready to come to life through the mystical power that lies at your fingertips. Rejuvenate your soul as you affectionately nurture bountiful seeds, solve gentle puzzles, and explore otherworldly biomes eager to surprise and delight you. Take a breath, allow yourself to forget the troubles of the real world, and bask in this serene and uplifting experience about caring and cultivating. 🌿 FEATURES 🌿 Explore three organic biomes filled with magic, enchanted flowers, and beautiful plants Nurture your own unique garden by collecting seeds to harvest colorful landscapes Introduce gentle critters to your garden and solve puzzles with your adorable gnome companion by your side Embark on a peaceful and whimsical adventure set to a meditative soundscape composed by French artist and composer Norman Bambi

about_the_game: Game Background I am just an ordinary, sunny and handsome young man, but unexpectedly met two charming and beautiful sisters at the corner of life - Kello and Cammy. name: 召しませ！レミリアお嬢様！
tags: Casual,Interactive Fiction,Puzzle,2D Platformer,Choose Your Own Adventure,2D,Cute,Anime,Comedy,Fantasy,Female Protagonist,Choices Matter,Singleplayer
about_the_game: 「召しませ！レミリアお嬢様！」は 使える文字を並び替えて当てはめ、お題に沿ったアイテムを作り出し 完成したアイテムをプレゼントしてその反応を見て遊ぶ言葉遊びのパズル・シミュレーションゲームです。 メイド「十六夜咲夜」が当主である「レミリア・スカーレット」を喜ばせるために頑張ります。 ☆本ゲームは東方Projectの二次創作作品です。 ・ゲーム概要： 最初に使える文字、例えば「さしすせそ」が提示され、 その後プレゼントのお題、例えば「○○な食べ物」が提示されます。 使用できる文字を自由に並び替えて○○の部分に当て込み、 例えば「すし（寿司）」のようなお題に沿ったアイテムを作り出します。 完成したアイテムをプレゼントして、喜んでもらったり またはとんでもないものを渡してその反応を楽しんだりしましょう。 お題はプレゼントごとに変わり 「○○○な飾る物」「○ー○なプレゼント」といったトリッキーなものも出現します。 お題にマッチしたものを渡さないと話が進みませんが、 その場合も二人のやり取りを楽しむことができます。 変なものを渡してもいいリアクションを取ってもらえたらOKです。

name: Thirsty Suitors
tags: Adventure,RPG,Action,Action-Adventure,Dating Sim,Action RPG,LGBTQ+,Female Protagonist,3D,Funny,Choices Matter,Skateboarding,Combat,Turn-Based Combat,3D Platformer,Story Rich,Singleplayer,Cooking,Stylized,Indie
about_the_game: Battle Your Exes. Disappoint Your Parents. Find Yourself. The year is 199X. The power fantasy is BEING A ROMANTIC TRASHFIRE IN HUMAN FORM. The final boss? Your TERRIFYING GRANDMOTHER. It's about to get MESSY. Outerloop Games presents Thirsty Suitors - a stylish, chaotic, heartfelt interactive drama about first loves, family, friendship and forgiveness. It will make you laugh. It will make you cry. It will make you want to text that one ex... Yes. You know the one. Confront your hot but toxic exes in spicy fully-voiced PSYCHODRAMA BATTLES. Reveal your messy break-ups through NARRATIVE COMBAT mechanics which put a new twist on the turn-based RPG. Taunt opponents to discover their emotional weaknesses, and exploit them! Enrage, shock and impress your exes, or flirt with them to throw them off… Try to win your parents' approval and AVOID EMOTIONAL TRAPS in over-the-top cooking segments full of delicious South Asian recipes. Skate, grind and wall-run away your COMPLICATED FEELINGS. Find yourself as you return home to the small town of Timber Hills - full of gossiping aunties, parental expectations and the consequences of your past mistakes. As JALA - choose to be a HEARTBREAKER, STAR or BOHEMIAN - your THIRSTSONA affects your combat build and shapes narrative outcomes. Each battle in Thirsty Suitors is a chance for growth and reconciliation - but how you get there? That's up to you.

name: Otokonoko Fishing
about_the_game: Catch Fish! Catch Men! Overview Otokonoko Fishing is a unique double fishing action game where you can enjoy two types of fishing in one game! Fish in rivers and seas, and 'fish' for men on land by cross-dressing. Enhance your fishing gear and outfits to aim for fishing grounds where the strongest monster fish dwell! Game System ①: Fishing Experience high-speed fishing action as you race through fishing grounds! Spot your prey and aim with your hookshot! Push or pull? Outsmart the fish in a battle of wits and reel them in! Be careful of jump ramps and spiked clubs that are common in fishing grounds! Game System ②: Crafting Collect materials by stripping caught fish or picking them up in fishing grounds! The residents of the port town will craft useful items for you! Craft powerful fishing gear, snacks for the fishing grounds, rainbow coffee, self-affirmation, and more to progress advantageously in the game! Game System ③: Catching Men Having trouble collecting crafting materials? Time to cross-dress! We have a full range of outfits like maid costumes, Chinese dresses, cheerleader outfits, and more. Charm those who propose outrageous rates and haggle, haggle, haggle! 95% off! Game System ④: Expanding Fishing Grounds Crafting fishing gear expands your range of action. Eventually, you’ll be able to fish at night and even head out to sea! Defeat fish that release poison, fish that emit electric shocks, and fish that release both poison and electric shocks, and aim for fishing grounds where the strongest monster fish dwell! Playtime Approximately 3 hours Video Distribution Guidelines You may stream without permission. You may stream all areas of the game. Individuals and those affiliated with corporations can stream. Monetized content is allowed. We would appreciate it if you mention the game title in your video title. We would appreciate it if you include a link to the store page in the description (or equivalent). We are not responsible for any damages resulting from the posting or streaming of content. These guidelines are subject to change without notice.

name: Bottle Can Float
tags: Casual,Idler,Relaxing,Nature,Hidden Object,Top-Down,Creature Collector,Underwater,Puzzle,Point & Click,3D,Third Person,3D Platformer,Nonlinear,Realistic,Family Friendly,Atmospheric,Singleplayer,Early Access,Indie
about_the_game: 🎮 Game Overview Bottle Can Float  is a relaxing drifting game where you can truly unwind. No goals, no pressure—just choose your favorite bottle or paper boat, gently set it on the water, and let the gentle current carry you through ever-changing scenery on a soothing, go-with-the-flow journey. ✨  Core Features 🌿  An Immersive & Free Drifting Experience Pick your traveling companion from a variety of bottles and paper boats, each with its own unique floating feel and style. Let the water guide you through forests, valleys, villages, and moonlit nights—every scene is crafted with care, featuring rich ambient sounds and beautiful visuals. The game supports laid-back idle play: you can sit back and watch your bottle drift, or interact lightly with the river to add a touch of playful engagement. 🦋  A Lively & Living River Ecosystem Observe and collect the little creatures living along the riverbanks and in the water: butterflies, dragonflies, damselflies, and fireflies may land softly on your vessel, while crabs, crayfish, frogs, and lizards hide among the stones, waiting to be discovered. Each map features three unique types of fish to catch—complete your aquatic collection! Lift larger rocks in the river to uncover hidden surprises and little secrets. 🎣  Relaxing & Engaging Interactions Use stones you find along the way to skip them across the water—challenge yourself to beat your highest bounce count and enjoy the satisfaction of watching ripples spread. Or simply toss pebbles into the water or toward your floating bottle, savoring the calm ripples and nostalgic joy of playing by a river in simpler times. 🗺️  Four Beautifully Distinct Routes The base game includes three themed rivers: a sun-dappled stream, an autumn riverbank glowing with red leaves, and a serene night scene lit by fireflies. The free DLC  Paper Boat Drift  adds a brand-new environment: become a folded paper boat and drift through a poetic origami-inspired world, experiencing a uniquely lightweight journey. 🏆  Rich Collection & Achievement System Unlock over 20 collection-based achievements, from catching animals and fish to mastering stone-skipping and discovering hidden content. Perfect for players who enjoy gentle progression and the quiet satisfaction of completing small goals as they drift along. 🛶  A Peaceful Moment Just for You Bottle Can Float  is more than just a game—it's a quiet corner you can return to whenever you need a moment of calm. Whether you want to unwind for a few minutes or lose yourself in a longer float, you'll always find the gentle sound of flowing water, shifting light, and the warmth of life along the banks. Pick a bottle, or set a paper boat free… and let the river carry you somewhere you don’t need to rush.

name: Chessplosion
about_the_game: Chessplosion is an arcade action puzzle game where you drop chess piece bombs to create chain reactions and trap opponents. Defeat enemies and bosses in Adventure Mode and the roguelike-inspired Dungeon Mode, break targets with limited bombs in Puzzle Mode, or fight friends and AI in Battle Mode. Defeat a variety of enemy types and boss fights in Adventure Mode, inspired by the movement patterns of chess pieces. Avoid charging Rooks, don't get shot by Bishops' diagonal projectiles, and watch out for stomping Knights. Venture into randomized dungeons in Dungeon Mode, defeating enemies and collecting money on your search for the Grandblaster Crown. A wide array of powerful upgrades and weapons mean that no two runs are the same! Solve over 100 puzzles in Puzzle Mode, by using limited bombs to cause a chain reaction and break the targets. Or use the Puzzle Editor to create your own puzzles and share them with friends! Dodge explosions in Survival Mode, where you're pitted against waves of tricky bomb patterns. It starts simple enough, but by the end you'll be dodging bullet hell Queen explosions and solving chess puzzles in real-time. Go head to head in Battle Mode, either fighting against the AI or against other players in online or local multiplayer. If you want a change from the regular Free For All Battles or Team Battles, the Tennis Battle mode lets you throw bombs over the center line to create bomb patterns for your opponent to dodge. Features Fight through 8 bosses and over 90 stages in Adventure Mode. Explore randomized dungeons in Dungeon Mode. Solve over 100 target-breaking puzzles in Puzzle Mode, or create your own puzzles and share them with friends. Survive over 10 stages of explosion-dodging challenges in Survival Mode. Battle your friends in 20 different arenas in Battle Mode, with up to 4 players in online or local multiplayer. Use the comprehensive Assist Mode to adjust the game to your liking by tweaking health, lives, game speed, or outright skipping troublesome stages.

name: Underworld Overseer
tags: Villain Protagonist,God Game,Real Time Tactics,Strategy,Old School,Tower Defense,Base-Building,Action RPG,VR,Dark Fantasy,Dark Humor,Demons,Management,Medieval,Underground,Dark,Resource Management,Singleplayer,Simulation,Indie
about_the_game: Become the dungeon master in virtual reality! Take on the role of a powerful demon tasked with building and managing your own underground lair. Unleash your evil genius by designing complex dungeons, summoning a wide range of demonic servants, placing traps, and casting powerful spells to defend your domain against adventurers who dare to enter. Build your own dungeon Command your imps to dig tunnels and build rooms that attract creatures with different needs and abilities, populating your dungeon. Careful planning is essential to keep them productive and satisfied, while protecting your underground fortress. Place deadly traps Design dungeons where every corridor becomes a deadly trial thanks to your arsenal of traps, including spikes, poison, and flames. You have many tools at your disposal. Cast powerful spells Master devastating spells, such as fireballs or lightning, and summon an army of skeletons to crush your enemies. Enjoy many levels with a wide variety of challenges Progress through many levels featuring varied challenges that demand strategy and careful planning to achieve victory. Are you ready to embrace the darkness and rule your own underground kingdom?
