about_the_game: Story A super popular fitness YouTuber with over 5 million subscribers... The protagonist, Beom- tae, is happily running a YouTube channel, receiving tremendous love from fans. Can it be this intense?!! This is... dangerous!! Survive from the fans...! Youtuber Survivors is a BEAT 'EM UP + Rogue-like action game. A unique 'One button combo system' makes complex technical movements in a breeze. Key features: 2D BEAT 'EM UP + Rogue-like! A cartoon-like story filled with humor! Easy One button combo system! Unlock permanent trait for your character!

name: SEARCH ALL - BIRDS
about_the_game: SEARCH ALL - BIRDS is a hidden object game in which you need to find all the birds in a large location. The birds will be located in a variety of places, from the most prominent to barely noticeable places. The whole game location looks lively because of the animation elements. Find all the birds! Don't let them go unnoticed :) Key Features: - Animation elements on location; - 100 birds to find; - Pleasant soundtrack; - The gameplay can be interrupted at any time, and the game will automatically save the result; - Implemented hints! If you find it difficult to find an item, use the hint!

name: World for Two
about_the_game: A sudden catastrophe has led life on Earth to the verge of extinction. The Professor, the only survivor, spent years performing research in an underground laboratory trying to recreate life to no avail. The resources he needs to do this can only be harvested outdoors, where he himself cannot go. He therefore created an android to help him: you. Plants are the only living things left in this world where human civilization is no more. It is cruel, but beautiful. The Professor and the android embark on a quest to bring animals back to the planet. EXPLORE A STUNNING PIXEL-ART WORLD Experience the highly emotive journey of an android created to bring back life, and change desolate wastelands into lush, populated habitats. Bask in breathtaking visual spectacles; from the Sun rising across an increasingly vibrant landscape, to the clouds gently rolling across the night sky, everything is reflected in the glistening water below. HARVEST RESOURCES TO FUEL CREATION Gather natural energy from Starflames, and the DNA from living creatures (once you’ve solved puzzles to understand their genetic patterns) to continue your creation. Upgrade the lab's technology with Starflames to unlock new biomes and resources. Be prepared for the emotional burdens that creating life brings, as all things must have their end. CREATE THEM ALL! Through trial and error, discover and create unique 60 creatures. Start with the lowly amoeba, and end with brightly coloured whales and manta ray. Perhaps there are creatures beyond? Mix and match to complete the genetic tree and retrace evolution. Travel across the four uniquely coloured and distinctive biomes - Bog, Forest, Dunes and Ruins; each with their own creatures and soundtrack. CHAPTER 0 Once you have completed the main storyline, enjoy access to “Chapter 0”; a special story that includes new art and music. Learn what happened before you were created, and understand the Professor’s past and what led to the events surrounding the game’s plot and the near-destruction of our world. As an added bonus, unlock the main soundtrack remastered, played by a piano quintet - taking the soundtrack to new, beautiful heights.

name: Freedom Finger
tags: Rhythm,Funny,Shoot 'Em Up,Side Scroller,Bullet Hell,Comedy,Music,Story Rich,2D,Hand-drawn,Cartoony,Indie,Dark Humor,Action,Space,Shooter,Adventure,Arcade,Fast-Paced,Dark Comedy
about_the_game: Classic shmup gameplay blended with melee combat! You're flying a ship shaped like a giant hand, so use it! Punch, grab, and shoot enemies to smithereens! The unique grab attack allows you to capture enemies and use their guns as power-ups! A fully voiced, fully animated Story Mode featuring Nolan North (Uncharted), John DiMaggio (Futurama, Adventure Time, Gears of War), Sam Riegel (Critical Role), and Eric Bauza (Rick & Morty). A unique soundtrack including original music by Aesop Rock and licensed tracks from Red Fang, METZ, Power Trip, Com Truise, White Fence, Ty Segall, Makeup and Vanity Set, True Widow, The Radio Dept., Drab Majesty, John Maus, Vektroid, Danimal Cannon, Cleaners from Venus, Male Gaze, Ezee Tiger, The Mall , and many more! Fight your way through 40 handcrafted levels, spread out over 13 worlds! Each world features new enemies, power-ups, and challenges! A wide selection of difficulty settings. Whether you want to chill and enjoy the story or crank the difficulty for a butt-blasting ridiculous challenge, we've got you covered! A highly satirical storyline that explores hot-button topics such as communism, US foreign policy, sriracha sauce, and crafting in video games.

name: ROLLING STAR
tags: Action,Platformer,Metroidvania,2D Platformer,Collectathon,2D,Cute,Cartoony,Pixel Graphics,Sci-fi,Aliens,Comic Book,Comedy,Robots,Space,Futuristic,Dark Humor,Funny,Female Protagonist,Story Rich
about_the_game: 2301, Medium Earth Orbit. 21-year-old Laurie's hikikomori life in her one-person space pod was peaceful. Tinkering with her bionic arms day in and day out was all she could ever ask for. But now that's all over... Aliens have launched an all-out attack on Earth! Laurie's pod is shot down and collides with 'Colony 102', rumored to harbor a secret weapon that can destroy the aliens. Now the fate of humanity rests in her cold, metal hands... Metroidvania action: Explore the colony and unlock new skills and equipment, eventually gaining the ability to traverse the cold vacuum of space! It's a Metroidvania on a whole 'nother scale! Face off against huge bosses: Fight bosses that take up nearly the entire screen as they unleash merciless attacks against Laurie. Take 'em down and get that sense of accomplishment. Craft your own equipment: Defeated enemies will drop materials. Use them to craft new equipment and combine them with your skills to create a unique combat experience. Into outer space: Once you have your vehicle, you can leave the colony and explore outer space. A new combat style awaits, free from the shackles of gravity! The vast expanse of space holds treasures for those willing to find them. The vehicle can also be used inside the colony. Show your enemies no mercy!

name: Knightin'+
about_the_game: Join brave sir Lootalot on his epic quest in this little Zelda-lite adventure. Explore and fight your way through the dangerous dungeons filled with traps, puzzles and magical artifacts. And, of course, show the evil bosses who is the real boss here. Knightin'+ is a classic adventure game made by one person (yep, it's me) inspired by the amazing masterpieces from 90s. So what can you expect from this game? Let's sum up. Classic adventure gameplay (i.e. explore the dungeon, fight monsters, solve puzzles, collect loot, unlock new abilities, proceed to the next dungeon) Tongue-in-cheek story (that shouldn't be taken seriously by any means) Stylish pixel art graphics Catchy soundtrack Full controller support

name: Urayama
about_the_game: Urayama | ウラヤマ is a psychological J-horror game featuring students on summer vacation. Story A student on summer vacation heads to Urayama, which is rumored to be haunted. He senses the presence of someone in Urayama. Game Features ・Mainly a first person walking simulator. ・VHS effects (can be turned off in settings) ・Two endings About the distribution of the game Welcome. No prior notice is required. If you would like, we would appreciate it if you could include this store page URL in the summary section of the distribution page, etc.

name: Cursed Deal
about_the_game: Cursed Deal is a Co-Op horror game like nothing you've ever experienced before. The game focuses on a dark vampire cult and features a villain who becomes cursed by betraying his cult on the night of the ritual and turns into a dark creature. The player who made a deal with the devil to get rid of the curse, must hunt down cult members and curse them into his side. Meanwhile, the cultists must complete the ritual and gain vampire powers on this challenging night. But beware! When humans turn into vampires, the roles will change and the creature hunt will begin. You never know who will win in this game where teams and roles will change, where the hunter can be the prey and the prey can be the hunter. Hide in the dark, use your special powers, and survive. Most importantly, don't trust anyone. If your friend is cursed, he will turn into a creature and come after you. HIGHLIGHTS SWITCH ROLES BECOME THE HUNTER In this game, the balance can change at any moment. Focus on your goal and complete the ritual. As you turn into the vampire, you will see those who were trying to hunt you just ran away. OLD FRIEND NEW ENEMY There is no getting bored in this game. The new dynamics and objectives that are unlocked when you are cursed and turned into the creature will offer you new experiences until the end of the match. WELL OPTIMIZED NEXT GEN GRAPHICS The best graphics you've ever seen in a Co-Op Horror game. Developed with Unreal Engine 5. Enhanced by Ray Tracing, DLSS, and FSR. EQUIP SPECIAL POWERS AND BECOME UNPREDICTABLE Level up and unlock new powers. But Beware! In each game, you will encounter rival players with different powers. FEATURES Fully online thriller and horror PvP experience for up to 5 players Various jump scares (New jump scares on the way) Loot, trapping, and survival dynamics Character Customization Different types of special powers and passive abilities (New special powers on the way) Level up system In-game 3D voice communication Optimized next-gen graphics (New optimizations on the way)

name: LOUD: My Road to Fame
about_the_game: LOUD: My Road to Fame is a music arcade rhythm game in which a teenage girl embarks on a heartwarming journey of self-discovery through music. Grab your gamepad and get ready to rock with new approachable and immersive arcade guitar controls. Keep your eyes sharp and fingers primed as each note has a good way to play it and a perfect one that requires additional input. Every track in LOUD has been produced by Hyperstrange’s own band. Each out of the 21 tunes crafted with care for your auditory pleasure. Growing up generally sucks and it certainly isn’t easy for the main protagonist - Astrid. Embark with her on a wholesome and heartwarming journey of self-discovery through music - from pretend play on an air guitar to a real stage! Master the songs to unlock cool new outfits and guitars. Get decked out and rock on with class and style! There is only one road to fame: Go LOUD or Go Home!

name: Hamster Scramble
about_the_game: Help twins Kaden and Quinn rescue their hamster friends in this wholesome puzzle adventure. Enjoy a cast of colorful characters, mess with your friends in competitive mode, and have hours of fun with delightful platform-hopping, bubble-popping action! Hamster Scramble takes the versus puzzle game genre to the next level. A fusion between the puzzle and platformer genres, Hamster Scramble gives players the ability to swap into their opponent's area to attack their puzzle board directly! ➤ A Fusion of Familiarity Puzzle and platforming meet to create a brand new style of versus game! Chase down colored hamsters as they run about the stage, catch them, then throw them at the board to make matches! Play on 8 unique stages, each with different themes, layouts, and hazards. ➤ Swapping, a new level of interactivity The Swap ability introduces a level of interactivity never before seen in the versus puzzle genre. By swapping, players can invade their opponent's space to interfere with them directly! Steal the hamsters you need, mess up their board, or attack them to slow them down! ➤ A Wholesome Hamster Adventure Watch the hamster village grow and evolve as hamsters return. Overcome 60+ levels of unique platforming and matching gameplay, either solo or coop! Join us on Discord for monthly playtest builds, developer updates, community events, and more!

name: Crypto: Against All Odds - Tower Defense
about_the_game: Wishlist, up above ☝ A tower defense game on Steam Crypto: Against All Odds is a tower defense game , that explores the rise of crypto culture by fusing blockchain security concepts into a stylish gameplay. Discover the world of cryptocurrencies while battling against bugs, hackers, ransomware and other deadly cybersecurity attacks. One of the best hacking meets tower defense game on Steam . Tip: Keep calm and HODL the line . A Cypherpunk interactive story You are a blockchain security expert and hacker doing bounties jobs in the early days of Bitcoin . When hacking activities begin to surge, you sense a looming threat trying to bring down the entire crypto space. As you interact with other forum users, read terminal chats and message board, you slowly piece together a big conspiracy. At the same time, the people behind it are also on to your true identity, something you have been trying to keep as a secret. Defend your towers as a red hat! Roleplay as a Security Expert In this crypto game , you take the role of a cybersecurity and hacking expert. Visit a virtual forum, take on bounties jobs, read terminal chat messages and uncover a huge conspiracy in the crypto space. Side activities Between missions, player can partake in various activities: chat with your crypto squad, trade cryptocurrencies, play arcade mini games, read inbox messages from strangers and use your wit to determine an action. Choices have consequences. Squad customization Whether you want to slow down enemies attacking your towers with a plasma beam, blast them in an explosion, or teleport your crypto around, there will be a unit to cover your tactical need. Explore different synergies by combining crypto units/towers with various supporting powers, from zapping a single bug to calling airstrikes. Base building Visit and upgrade your central Hub between missions. Each Hub upgrade is not only cosmetic, but will grant additional features or even introduce an entirely new game mode! Crypto: Against all odds is inspired by Plants vs Zombies (PVZ) but in a new tower defense game format. Other features Mini arcade games In-game Encyclopedia Endless Survival mode On-demand music playlist Crypto memes Crypto: Against All Odds - Tower Defense aims to be one of the best tower defense games on desktop and PC.

name: Clea 2
about_the_game: Four years have passed since the Whitlock Mansion tragedy. Florine, a former maid, is determined to resurrect the person who means everything to her. To succeed, she must travel past the third dimension and into the realms beyond. Otherworldly horrors lie in wait, but Florine is determined to soldier on. This, after all, is her final chance at redemption. * * * Skill-focused horror: Clea 2 is primarily a test of skills. Enemies roam the halls dynamically in real-time, reacting to the players' every noise. Clea is a challenging title, rewarding those who have mastered its mechanics. No jump scares: Clea 1 was a jump scare free experience, and the tradition continues here in this sequel. Replayability: Unlockable costumes/galleries/difficulty modes, multiple endings and even an arcade feature. Plenty of reasons for Florine to revisit her journey. Fully voiced: Every cutscene is fully voiced. Please enjoy the cast’s performance as we sink deeper into Clea’s lore than ever before. * * * Thank you for all your support with Clea throughout 2019. I hope this sequel is everything you have dreamed of and more. Have fun!

name: Ereban: Shadow Legacy
about_the_game: Ereban: Shadow Legacy is a fast-paced stealth platformer game where you become Ayana, the last descendant of a forgotten race. Harness mystical shadow powers, high-tech gadgets and avoid or kill to uncover the truth about your past and the key to saving a dying, morally grey universe. What will your legacy be? Experience an unprecedented combination of stealth and shadows with the Shadow Merge ability. Dive into shadows and move freely through them to climb walls, reach inaccessible places, attack from cover or advance unseen. Absorb echoes to learn more lethal and non-lethal shadow powers, craft high-tech gadgets, and combine all this with your agility to infiltrate Helios lines and investigate what they are hiding. Avoid or kill. Spare or consume. The decision is yours: how far are you willing to go to uncover the truth? Approach each level with your own style of play. Use your powers to move like a ghost or strike as a deadly shadow in this sci-fi universe where actions go beyond good and evil. Discover the ruins of lifeless cities, infiltrate sci-fi facilities carved into ancient temples and forge alliances to unravel the mystery of who you are and what happened to your people.

name: VR Sailing
about_the_game: Did you go out to sea today. Everyone has a dream of sailing in their hearts, but due to geographical reasons, time constraints, economic reasons, and so on, it has been abandoned. Here are bays suitable for sailing competitions from all over the world, come and enjoy the fun of sailing to the fullest. The operation of sailboats in the game is not so complicated. Just control the rudder with your left hand and the sail with your right hand to flexibly control the sailboat and enjoy the pleasure of riding the wind and waves. Here, you can participate in sailing competitions along a fixed route, or embark on treasure hunting adventures at will. The wind direction is different every time, which can bring more fun and freshness. Highlights ■13 real bay maps from around the world to choose from ■You can choose between competition mode and treasure hunting mode ■There are simple mode and expert mode to choose from ■There are two operating habits to choose from: switching forward or reverse ■Each scene has 8 wind directions to choose from ■There are 10 randomly occurring weather conditions ■There are 50 patterns and 5 colors of sails that can be purchased with points ■Realistic ocean wave effects ■A fully physics based sailing experience ■Each competition route will go through stages of downwind, headwind, and crosswind ■According to the 9 levels that have been upgraded based on the voyage, there are 9 levels waiting for you to challenge ■Every game will match different opponents

name: Overtime Heroes Exit 8
tags: RPG,Simulation,Life Sim,Puzzle,Walking Simulator,Choose Your Own Adventure,Hidden Object,Tactical RPG,3D,First-Person,Realistic,Atmospheric,Comedy,Dark Humor,Detective,Drama,Funny,Horror,Linear,Multiple Endings
about_the_game: The entire internet has been caught in a loop of ghostly walls, and now it's your turn. You find yourself trapped in an endless cycle of overtime work, and your heart can barely take the strain. The company! A byword for terrifying places. An endless stream of deadlines (ddl), and the constant emergence of scapegoats. Carefully compare everything in the scene with your memories. If you find any discrepancies, turn back immediately! Perhaps then you can work a few less overtime hours. You must find the boss's office... Maybe you can grab him by the collar and threaten him to take you away from this dreadful place! But things might not be as simple as they seem... This game is a short walking simulation PC game that simulates the frantic rush of a corporate slave trying to get off work. Gameplay: Meticulously observe the differences between the current floor and the reference floor. If there are no anomalies, proceed to take the elevator B; if anomalies are found, return to the elevator A. Strive to reach the floor where the boss's office is located and put an end to the curse of being unable to leave work.[/list] Game Duration: Approximately 60-180 minutes. Players take on the role of a corporate slave trapped in the cyclical floors of the company, searching for a way out. As you search through each floor, humor and scapegoats fly side by side. Between laughter and tears, the corporate slaves may find a ray of sunlight at midnight. The ending you witness might only be the tip of the iceberg of reality; only the true corporate slave, daring to go through multiple rounds of trials, can discover the answer to their fate.

name: TransPlan
about_the_game: Deliver your payload from point A to point B with only a few simple tools and the laws of physics. Create ramps and catapults, watch objects tumble and fall, and someway... somehow reach the destination. Each project is a hand-drawn puzzle for you to interact with -- Devise a plan, experiment, and make it happen! TransPlan features dozens of projects to explore, starting simple and growing ever more complex. Unlock later puzzles and categories by completing earlier ones, and finish projects on-budget to earn hints to help you later on. TransPlan fully supports achievements and cloud saves so your progress will stay with you anywhere!

name: Hypnosis of Corruption
about_the_game: Something strange is going on around town. People are starting to disappear, and others are acting strange, with no memory of those who've gone missing. Hinata Yuzuzaka takes it upon herself to investigate the disappearances and find the truth behind the bizarre occurrences! But as she investigates around town, she falls prey to a mysterious phone application that has been wiping her memories! She would wake up, realizing that time has sped past, and she would have no recollection of what happened. Accompany Hinata on her mission to stop whatever is behind this malicious application and the hypnosis that is dominating her world! Over the span of 100 days, follow Hinata as she explores the town and meets the townsfolk. You'll find missions to complete while you train to improve your stats. Don't forget to rest, though! Uncover the mysteries of the academy and find the truth behind the application that has taken over the minds of this small town. The truth is never as simple as it seems... Numerous events to unlock! As you progress, Hinata will be able to explore various places and trigger events that will deepen your understanding of her world and the mysterious goings-on involving the hypnosis application. Multiple ways to play! Keep an eye on Hinata's stats to stay safe, or plunge into the dangers head-first! The player holds all the power over Hinata's day-to-day life.

name: Meiji Tokyo Renka  Full Moon
tags: Female Protagonist,Otome,Historical,Romance,Choose Your Own Adventure,Multiple Endings,Visual Novel,Dating Sim,Anime,2D,Singleplayer,Simulation,Colorful,Cute,Text-Based,Adventure,Drama,Story Rich,Choices Matter,Replay Value
about_the_game: Transcending time and opening the door to enthralling love affairs with handsome boys from the Meiji period. What is “Meikoi”? “Meiji Tokyo Renka Full Moon” (also known as “Meikoi”) is a historical romance fantasy game in which the main character travels back in time to the Meiji era and meets and falls in love with the great figures of history. With the addition of Tosuke Iwasaki’s (VA. Yoshimasa Hosoya) route, “Meiji Tokyo Renka Full Moon” (released in August 2016) is now available on Steam, featuring even more new elements! Added Content ・Addition of a newly written bonus scenario ・Multilingual 　Language: Japanese, English, Chinese (Simplified Chinese / Traditional Chinese) ※Voice in Japanese only Synopsis The main character, Mei Ayatsuki, an ordinary high-school girl, is transported back in time to the Meiji era by the self-proclaimed magician Charlie, whom she meets on the night of a red full moon. It was a slightly mysterious Meiji period “Tokyo” where the existence of Mononoke was recognized. With Charlie’s guidance, she arrived at the Rokumeikan. The protagonist sneaks into the party and is met by historical figures such as Ougai Mori, Syunso Hishida, Otojiro Kawakami, Kyoka Izumi, Gori Fujita, Yakumo Koizumi, and Tosuke Iwasaki. Through her interaction with them, the protagonist realizes that she is a “Tamayori” and has a highly prized ability in the Meiji period that allows her to see Mononoke. Having ability changes her relationship with them.... In this unfamiliar time, love affairs grow as she comes into contact with good-looking men during her daily life. Will the protagonist be able to return to her original time or...? Does love transcend time and space: ...... How does it end? PRODUCT Original ：MAGES. Genre：Otome Game（Text Adventure） Scenario Writer：Yukiko Uozumi Character Design：Karu VA：Daisuke Namikawa,KENN,Kosuke Toriumi,Nobuhiko Okamoto,Jun Fukuyama,Shinnosuke Tachibana,Yoshimasa Hosoya,Tomoyuki Morikawa and others

Locate the elusive Data Dog?

name: My Supermarket
tags: Third Person,Time Management,Online Co-Op,Family Friendly,Immersive Sim,Building,Sandbox,Capitalism,Economy,Management,Life Sim,Strategy,Simulation,Inventory Management,Resource Management,Co-op Campaign,Multiplayer,Co-op,Singleplayer,Early Access
about_the_game: My SuperMarket is a third-person simulation game in which you, as a member of a team of up to 4 people, own a supermarket in the middle of the city. It is your responsibility to manage the supermarket, organize and serve the customers while expanding and making the most profit you can. CUSTOMIZE YOUR SUPERMARKET Buy new objects, place them where you want, rotate, align, you name it. Your supermarket, your rules. Choose from a catalog of items ranging from the standard ones needed to sell products in your supermarket to slot machines, frames, plants, and more. ORDER PRODUCTS Order products and have them delivered to your store and placed on your shelves. Manage your warehouse products and get them whenever you need them. KEEP SHELVES FILLED After delivery, your job is to restock the shelves with enough products to keep your customers happy. Remember, a happy customer is a returning customer. SERVE YOUR CUSTOMERS Keep an eye on your cash register and don't keep customers waiting too long, they won't be very happy if you do. KEEP STORE CLEAN Some customers throw trash on the floor, others have dirty shoes. Try to keep your store as clean as possible because customers don't like dirty places. DIFFERENT EVENTS Deal with different types of events. From customers who steal or are in a hurry, to a bus that has several customers eager to get some products off the shelves and be served. UNLOCK PRODUCTS Get more reputation as you go. More reputation means more products to choose from. Try to keep your reputation and more importantly your bank balance positive! HIRE STAFF Need help with the store? No problem! Hire staff and make them work for you! PLAY WITH FRIENDS How would you manage your supermarket when it gets too big? Friends! Invite your friends to the lobby and play with them. Don't forget to hit each other :)

name: Grapple Dogs: Cosmic Canines
about_the_game: FEATURES 🪝 Pure platforming bliss - Fast-paced swinging action meets a whole host of fresh abilities, such as magnetic panels and fire-dashing, all coming together as a tight, fun platforming romp! 🌎 New worlds - Journey across dimensions in an epic quest to save... everything! Each unique world is bustling with vibrant, eye-catching pixel art and bubbling with personality! 🐶 Gameplay galore - Sail across the cosmos to explore multiple worlds filled with tons of levels. Hidden collectibles, secret areas, memorable boss battles, bonus levels, time trials, and more to sink those canines into 🎵 Exhilarating soundtrack - Jazz Mickle's catchy, killer soundtrack will have Grapple Dogs' beats stuck in your head forever, with level-by-level jams that are sure to get that tail waggin'! TWO DOGS ARE BETTER THAN ONE More dogs = more action! Mysterious newcomer Luna joins the adventure, with her weaponry adding exciting new gameplay features to the fray. Alternate between playing as the swingin' hero Pablo and the shoot-first-ask-questions-later anti-hero Luna. THE RETURN OF PABLO The pettable, adventurous, acrobatic pup Pablo returns, with his trusty grappling hook allowing him to zip across levels and worlds throughout the cosmos, completing tricky challenges and platforming tests, along with new powers and new friends. name: Dance of Cards

Cheat, bluff and build trust with others to survive until the end of the cruise – and don't forget that everything is up to chance. Features: A unique blend of poker and RPG 16 colourful characters you can form a team with – each with their distinct talents and playstyles A tale of chance and certainty A ship to explore, full of mysteries and unexpected findings Additional Death Gambles – for the brave ones and those who are out of luck Soundtrack teeming with danceable anxiety The feeling of hope amidst the dread Online Play mode where you can compete against other players

name: KAIKAN
tags: Shoot 'Em Up,Shooter,2D,Destruction,Top-Down Shooter,Action,Score Attack,Indie,Arcade,Pixel Graphics,Bullet Hell,Top-Down,Mechs,Singleplayer,Controller,Great Soundtrack,Retro
about_the_game: A vertically scrolling shooter where you mow down enemies that stand in your way. Aim for a high score with items that appear by destroying enemies and bonus items that can be obtained by using bombs. game description Destroying enemies releases bonus items. Collecting bonus items will increase the item rank and increase the item's score. If you miss it, your rank will go down one level [PENALTY] and your rank will not fluctuate up or down until you get the number according to your rank. Bonus items can be attracted to your aircraft by releasing the shot button, and if you press the shot button while being attracted, they will fall again. This item also increases the bomb gauge (purple), and when the bomb gauge is full, bombs will be stocked. (Only one stock) If you are hit with bombs stocked, your aircraft will be protected by an auto barrier, but you will lose your bomb stock. When you fire a bomb, enemy bullets on the screen will be converted into bomb bonus items, and enemies hit by the bomb will release bomb bonus items. This item has a higher score than normal items and also increases the counter on the right side, but does not increase the bomb gauge. The counter acts as a timer in boss battles and affects the score of bosses and boss parts. Items used when destroying a boss will restore the bomb gauge and will be counted as BOSSMEDAL, which will be used as a counter for the final boss battle. You can choose from 6 types of aircraft, and the characteristics and behavior of weapons change when moving at low speed. typeA: Napalm that explodes when it hits an enemy typeB: Wide shot that can attack in a wide range typeC: Homing that tracks the enemy typeD: Fire that attacks to cover the screen typeE: Blast that emits high power typeF: A ball that rotates around itself and erases enemy bullets Changes from the free version ・Correspondence to STEAM ranking by improving the function of the production tool ・Fixed the performance of own machine other than wide shot type ・Abolish left and right free scrolling, widen the screen, and remove the off-screen item radar ・Display the position of falling score items ・Display the position of your aircraft on the mini-map ・Changed the counter during true boss battles to 'total of boss destruction items (BOSS MEDAL) on each side' ・Changed to not being able to continue after entering the true boss battle (according to that, the no continue bonus has been abolished) ・Changed so that you can practice in practice mode as long as you enter the true boss battle (true boss achievements cannot be unlocked in practice mode) ・Changed 2 types of hidden aircraft that were unlockable to be usable from the beginning. ・Blur effect is used for production (parts related to game play can be turned off) ・Change all BGM ・Compatible with controller vibration function The latest free version was ver2.4, but I started over from 1 as (verS~)

name: Escape from Mutation Station
tags: Surreal,Mystery,Escape Room,Puzzle,Short,Psychological Horror,Silent Protagonist,Dark,Indie,Point & Click,Detective,Walking Simulator,Pixel Graphics,Psychological,Logic,Atmospheric,First-Person,Adventure,Investigation,3D
about_the_game: You are the candidate. You must find a way out of this room. Things are not as they seem. 'Escape from Mutation Station' is a short, surreal, and subversive escape room experience. Features: Investigate your surroundings in first-person as you uncover clues to help you exit the peculiar room you are locked in. Think outside the box, and solve puzzles to discover the truth behind this strange evaluation you are a part of. Operate a computer to input puzzle solutions, to gather information, and to play games. A short experience intended to be completed in about an hour or two (though unraveling all of the game's mysteries might take a bit longer). You may encounter occasional glitches in reality, but don't worry, it's all part of your evaluation.

name: Billy Bumbum: A Cheeky Puzzler
about_the_game: This cute puzzle game will kick your butt! Behind the sweet pastels of Billy Bumbum lie puzzles for the true thinky mind. Use seemingly simple mechanics in surprisingly deep and satisfying ways to rescue your friends in over 250 levels. Fart for Freedom! Recognition: 'A true staple of puzzle solving. Love a lighthearted brain buster!' - Aliensrock (big shot puzzle games streamer) 'A really enjoyable game, lots of puzzles, always introducing new twists and turns.' - Jan Willem Nijman (legendary indie developer) 'Excellent game. Honestly this is really really really good. Amazing puzzles.' - Joseph 'Joe Plays Puzzle Games' Mansfield (puzzle games streamer) 'The puzzles are incredible. They make me cry and think at the same time.' - GIZA (variety streamer) 'Colourful characters and a banging soundtrack! Now that’s something that can really blow your enemies’ minds!' - Thinky Games Features: Over 250 puzzles crafted by puzzle experts from the Thinky community Seemingly simple yet surprisingly deep mechanics that interact in satisfying ways An overworld map with branching paths to new worlds Fully animated 2D cutscenes and tons of narrative to uncover. The most solid soundtrack you’ll ever hear in a puzzle game. No joke. English, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, German, Japanese and Korean localization

name: Light Infantry
about_the_game: No matter how you look at it, you can't stand up to the evil army alone... but then the 'God of Glitch' reaches out to you. Light Infantry is a simple action game with nostalgic Game Boy style graphics. Fight against unique stages, enemy characters, and bosses to stop the evil empire from taking over the world. ...Well, you can't clear it. Strong enemies, difficult stages, boss characters you can't beat, weak shots... You can't play properly without cheating! Use the power given to you by the 'God of Glitch' to disrupt the behavior of the blocks that make up this world in order to beat the game. However, just because you cheat doesn't mean the game is kind and helpful. You're in a situation where one shot will take you down, and you'll have to start over and over again to get clear! Feature (also a caution) ・There are no multiple endings, just enjoy the way the blocks behave. ・There are no hidden messages or shocking truths, just a simple one-way scenario. ・There's a meta-conversation going on. ・Controller support ・ English not supported

name: Zooma VR
about_the_game: Zooma is a virtual adventure in which you will have to be smart, demonstrate your ability for rapid decision-making, and exhibit significant accuracy and coordination skills. Check out what happens if you mix shooting, puzzles, and classic match-three in virtual reality. Zooma is not a mere blast-as-many-as-you-can first-person shooter: strategy and speed are essential in this game, so you will have to carefully think your moves through and adjust tactics from level to level. How to play: Choose a level and shoot the rolling balls to match all the color sequences before they reach the snapdragon; once a ball reaches the snapdragon, the rest follow and a level is lost; Shoot with both hands which will help you match the colors faster Plan your actions, get bonus points by making combos, and finish the chapters on time to score for more Bonuses include: Rainbow ball - matches with any color Bomb - cleans all the balls in its explosion radius Paint bomb - paints balls with the bomb’s color in its explosion radius Time stop - pauses a line for a while

name: Security: The Horrible Nights
tags: Horror,Story Rich,Dark Comedy,Exploration,Mystery,Werewolves,Vampire,Zombies,Lore-Rich,Survival Horror,Investigation,Pixel Graphics,Creature Collector,Life Sim,Action-Adventure,Singleplayer,Hidden Object,Comedy,Supernatural,Psychological Horror
about_the_game: You are the security guard at a hospital. From your small office, you must watch the entire hospital through the security cameras. If you see a problem, you must run out and fix it! SO MANY STORIES! Every story is handwritten and designed. Some stories have multiple endings. Every story will be a unique experience. Nothing is randomly generated. SO MANY MONSTERS! Each story has its own monster, ghost, or other horrible being. SO MANY SECRETS! One big secret connects all the stories. Each story will have its own secrets for you to uncover. So many free extra stories! Free DLCs with stories by horror experts and fans. SO MUCH HORROR! Security: The Horrible Nights will be filled with horror goodies for true horror fans to enjoy.

name: The Quintessential Quintuplets OMOIDE VR ~ITSUKI~
tags: Adventure,VR,Anime,Cute,Casual,Romance,Visual Novel,Choose Your Own Adventure,Multiple Endings,Story Rich,Singleplayer
about_the_game: – About the Game Our time together... The Quintessential Quintuplets OMOIDE VR ~ITSUKI~ is the first official VR adventure game based on the popular manga series. Play as Futaro Uesugi and enjoy spending time with the youngest Quint, Itsuki, in this VR adventure game. Get closer to Itsuki by experiencing Futaro's daily life. [All Your Favorite Scenes From the Manga Recreated in VR] Enjoy a selection of scenes from the manga in fully-voiced VR. Listen out for all your favorite lines as you interact with Itsuki. [Experience Daily Life With Itsuki] Get closer than ever using VR. Make memories with Itsuki and watch as her expressions change right before your eyes! [Multiple Dialogue Options & Endings] Select from a variety of dialogue options as you play through the game. Keep Itsuki in mind and choose carefully! – Featured Characters Itsuki Nakano (Voiced by Inori Minase) Futaro Uesugi (Played by you!) ©Negi Haruba / Kodansha Ltd. ©NextNinja.Inc ©Blackc Inc.

name: Adventure of Rikka - The Cursed Kingdom
about_the_game: The Adventure of Rikka is a top down 2D action RPG with a focus on puzzles, exploration, secrets and collectibles. You must defeat the dark forces that has cursed the lands, fight enemies using your sword and an arsenal of items such as the bow and fire wand and save the kingdom! Fight Enemies! Solve Puzzles! Find all the secrets! 7 Dungeons with challenging boss-fights, and many smaller puzzle dungeons. 10 Unique player items such as the Bow, Bomb, Grappling hook, Pegasus boots and the Fire wand. Upgradeable items and weapons. Shards and Stones of Power scattered across the land which are used to upgrade your stats. A bunch of side quests. The kingdom of Delheed had been a peaceful land for a hundred years, lush forests, roaring mountains and pristine beaches. One day there was a storm... no villager had ever seen a storm before, they all huddled inside their homes in shear confusion. After the storm had passed the lands were no longer what they used to be... The volcano on the mountain had erupted, clouds of choking gas covered the woods, and the water in the old forest had been turned toxic! There were strange beasts and monsters roaming the outdoors and because of the 100 year peace, no one was ready for this. The kingdom had not always been a peaceful place, over a hundred years ago there was a forgotten event that took place to thwart the darkness and bring in prosperity and peace. The king called all willing to stand up for their kingdom to once again banish the curse which laid upon the land. This is where your story begins, you've been reclusively living in the forest your entire life, the adventure of Rikka starts now...

name: Demon Corporation: Onboarding
about_the_game: ​ ​Corporate Judge: Ctrl+Alt-Get Even!​ ​ This RPG Maker-crafted strategy game weaponizes your workplace trauma into cathartic combat. Experience the ultimate 'anti-hustle' fantasy of toppling toxic CEOs and yeeting unreasonable deadlines into the void. ​Warning to Under-35 Wage Slaves:​ ​ May cause accidental deployment of sass during performance reviews. Handle with care. GamePlay: Tower of Druaga + Persona Gameplay blends Tower of Druaga 's tactical battles with Persona 's social mechanics, remixed with puzzle-solving (imagine rearranging Jira tickets), match-3 stress relief (combo those TPS reports!), and roguelike office politics. Story: Rookie Programmer meets Mysterious Cat   Set in Cyber-Tokyo's corporate dystopia, you play as ​ ​Togawa Tsubasa​ ​ - a rookie programmer who accidentally sold her soul to Blackstone Corp. By day, she's a code monkey surviving micromanagement hell. By night, her consciousness rebels in the ​ ​Midnight World​ ​ after meeting Vita, a glitch-spewing cat who turns corporate jargon into combat spells. Recruit fellow broken souls from accounting purgatory and HR hellscape. Weaponize their burnout as special abilities. Storm the C-suite labyrinth where your manager's 'culture-building exercises' have literally summoned a KPI Demon.

name: Cento
about_the_game: Unique battle system | Enter commands in rhythm and activate skills. Play a clever beat according to the combination of cards in your hand and your opponent's attacks. Variety of stages | Fight on stages with different BGMs, from the city to ruins. The playing experience changes depending on the tempo and beat of the music. Customize your deck | Create your own deck by freely combining skills and gifts received from existing characters. Let's find the strongest combination. Endurance mode | Aim for consecutive battles while reinforcing your skills and obtaining gifts. Unleash a powerful attack with new skills. Characters, stages, and skills will continue to be added through free updates!

name: POPOPOSAN
about_the_game: 'POPOPOSAN' is an adventure game based on urban legends. Story A long time ago, on my way back from the convenience store, I saw 'her.' 'She' spoke 'something' and chased after me. Back then, running away was the only thing I was good at. At home and at school, I had no place where I belonged, and I always wanted someone to play with. 'She' chases me. I chase 'her.' I thought it would be nice if it could go on forever. Game Features A walking simulator where various events happen as you walk. Investigate objects to advance the story. No quest markers, allowing for a relaxed playstyle. The time spent with 'her' was the only joy for 'me.' Playtime: 20 to 50 minutes Video Streaming Guidelines Streaming is allowed without permission for both individuals and companies.

name: The Sinking Forest - 沈んだ森 -
about_the_game: Find Sayuri... or get lost in The Sinking Forest – 沈む森, the new Japanese survival horror game that blends folklore, exploration, and psychological terror in a forest steeped in tragedy. You play as a young man determined to find his missing sister in a remote Japanese village surrounded by ruined temples, flooded passageways, and fog-covered paths. What seemed like a simple family search turns into a brutal nightmare, full of drama, violence, and tough decisions. If you like games like Silent Hill, here you'll find an experience that combines exploration, challenging puzzles, and survival combat, with limited resources. Listen to the whispers of the forest and solve puzzles in an environment where Japanese folklore becomes pure horror. Explore abandoned houses, shrines overgrown with weeds, and withered cherry trees as an unsettling atmosphere—reinforced by torn taikos and tense strings—envelops your every step. A unique experience for those who enjoy the best survival horror, Japanese mysteries, and stories that keep you hooked until the very last heartbeat. The game has autosave system. My sister Sayuri is missing, and she hasn't answered the phone for days, I have to find her! The game has the texts translated with automatic translator. I'm sorry but I don't have the budget to pay for professionals, I hope to be able to do it in the future! Game Features: Spectacular graphics thanks to Unreal Engine 5 A tragic and macabre horror story Survival Horror where enemys can kill you (and defend your self!) Japanese forest and village setup with great ambience Enemys can kill you Game length about 2 hours.

name: HoneyLand
about_the_game: HoneyLand, a charming puzzle with turn-based strategy. Help Mr. Fluff to drink all the honey from HoneyLand! Discover HoneyLand, a wonderful and alive island. A paradise where the greatest honey worshipers seek to feel satisfied and happy. Who else could show up here? Yes, Mr. Fluff, a naive bear with a monstrous appetite. Help Mr.Fluff to drink all the honey, and of course, reach the fabulous honey volcano! Featuring: 30 hand-crafted levels with increasing complexity; Go through 3 different environments; Use 2 types of cards to put Mr. Fluff into action You will start each map with a fixed amount of cards that will target MR. Fluff the right way to the honey pot. When using a card, it will be consumed and direct the character to the desired path. Your cards will direct Mr. Fluff in the right direction. Run! Jump! Fall on your stomach!

name: Shotengai 10
about_the_game: You suddenly find yourself in an unfamiliar shopping district. All you can hear is your footsteps and the ticking of the second hand. If you notice anything unusual, immediately move left. If nothing unusual happens, move right. There is an exit on 10th Street. Nothing unusual will happen on 0th Street. Use the hints to help you escape from the shopping district. [About the features of this game] ・This is a game inspired by The Exit 8 (Like Exit 8) ・You can play with simple operations such as walking and moving your viewpoint. ・Contains mild horror elements ・There is a recurring element [About circulating elements] You can continue to enjoy the game even after escaping. ・New abnormalities will begin to appear. ・The situation in the shopping district will change slightly. [Play time] First escape: - 60 minutes Find all the abnormalities: - 120 minutes [Method of operation] Move: WASD + Mouse Cursor Run: Shift Open Menu: ESC Operate Menu: Left Click [Strategy Tips] ・Undiscovered anomalies will occur first (except under certain conditions) ・Pay attention to changes in sound as well. [Recommended options] 【Volume】 The sound of the clock can be heard softly from the start of the game 【Screen】 Full screen or 1920x1080 [About save] Auto-save will occur at the following times. ・When an abnormality is successfully discovered ・When you successfully escape [Video distribution guidelines] ■Basics ・Distribution is possible without permission, regardless of whether it is an individual or a corporation. ・Monetization is possible only by using the functions provided by the video distribution site. ・We would appreciate it if you could include the game name in the title of the video or distribution, or include a link to the Steam page in the summary section, etc. ・It is okay if you can find all the abnormalities within the broadcast or video. ・The in-game background music and sound effects are all royalty-free. ■Notes regarding video titles and thumbnails ・Please do not use expressions that remind people of Exit 8 or sequels of similar works. Examples of OK expressions: 'Like Exit 8' 'Like Exit 8' Examples of unacceptable expressions: “◯◯ version of The Exit 8” “Sequel to The Exit 8?” “Using images and characters from Exit 8” For distributing the video of this game We are not responsible for any damages. Additionally, the contents of these guidelines may change without notice.

name: Touhou : Shooting Star | 東方流星譚
about_the_game: !!!!About English Translation!!!! As for English, the system messages have been translated. For conversational text, machine translation is used, so there are some unnatural points in the translation. Also, parts of the conversation may appear in a different language. Please be aware of this. About Touhou:Shooting Star -Touhou Ryuseitan As a wizard 'Marisa Kirisame', Fly in the Gensokyo! This is fun game of 'Touhou Project'! Let's play 'Danmaku'! ３D Danmaku Battle Fly and fight in the Gensokyo. 3-directyional bullets is reaching to you. Avoid bullets and shot down enemys! Spell Card Boss enemys use 'Spell Card'. Defeat their beautiful danmaku and Get ther Spell Card! Analyze and avoid characteristical bullet patten. Develop your weapon Get materials from defeated enemys and develop more strong weapon, armor, and spell card. Make your own equipments set. Each weapon has parameters and bullet. Each Armor has parameters and skills and appearance. Quest This game includes more 30 quests! Enemy boss character is more than 10 ! And every quest has sub targets. Let's try 'No damage clear','Time attack','Get all spell cards' and so on. Talk in Gensokyo There are many characters of 'Touhou Project' in the village and can talk to them. Let's talk as Marisa! There is original illust of characters of Touhou Project. Boutique You can change Marisa's cloth. Find your favorite cloth and fly in Gensokyo.

name: The Robot Girl Meets The Human!
tags: Interactive Fiction,Story Rich,Robots,Cute,Fantasy,Multiple Endings,Post-apocalyptic,Adventure,2.5D,Emotional,Atmospheric,Visual Novel,Side Scroller,Indie,Anime,Choose Your Own Adventure,Colorful,Singleplayer,Free to Play
about_the_game: This is an adventure game in which you lead Scarlet, a robot girl, on a journey through a world after humans have disappeared. Story The day when humans disappeared, a shooting star shone in the sky. . In an empty laboratory, a robot girl, Scarlet, wakes up. She was created with the mission of 'make smile as much people as possible', and shortly after her awakening, she decides to embark on a journey to find any human she could. You will play the role of 'Mother', a computer that manages all the robots around the world, and guide her. Don't worry, though! Scarlet is a smart robot, so all you have to do is act according to what she needs. System Scarlet is a high-performance robot, so she can control machines remotely or use her sensors to find small objects. She'll be using these abilities through the story to search for clues to find the humans. Graphically speaking the game is comprised of a combination of 3D models for the environment and 2D illustrations for characters and relevant objects to create the feeling of depth while making the gameplay easy-to-operate. Like Undertale and Oneshot, this game is recommended for those who want to be moved by the story woven by the player's interactions with the characters and enjoy the mysterious but somehow gentle worldview.

name: Like Dreamer
about_the_game: A pop and cute bullet-hell shooting game by Cosmo Dreamer 'Outside'. The game is based on the theme of 'bullet-hell SNS,' and players can dodge through a barrage of bullets in a variety of virtual spaces. Increase the number of likes and followers with your nice playing. Bulletstorms may seem difficult, but don't worry. The game is designed for beginners, while advanced players can play more actively. Bulletalk the popular bullet-hell social network. If you play a shooting game well you will get likes from other users. The user with the most likes and followers is called The user who has the most likes and followers is called 'Queen' and is very popular. However some of the girls were jealous of the queen and posted bad words and false accusations. This angered the queens and they fought back! She made them the target of a barrage! In no time at all they were in flames! Enemies attacked from all over the community! Who will win the fierce clash of the barrage? ・Vanilla Alice 　A geeky cosplayer who posts selfies in sexy cosplay. 　Loves kawaii and shooting games. 　She has a strong need for approval. ・Yuricocoa 　A cool high school girl who calls herself a black cat type. 　She is very confident in her appearance, but her problem is that she has a bad mouth. 　She has a strong desire for approval. ・UJAKO 　She is a bullet-playing girl with a genius streak who plays with Bulletalk's program with a little modification. 　She has personal feelings for Queen and has jumped into the fierce Bulletalk competition. 　She has a little bit of desire for approval. ・You can choose! My own style 　・You can choose from 3 different girls and customize your shots and bombs to your liking! ・Don't worry if you can't avoid it! 'Mental gauge' system for offense and defense 　・The more shots you fire and the more you accumulate the gauge, the higher your mental level. 　・When the mental level is up, even if the player is hit by a bullet, the shield is activated and the player takes no damage. 　・The mental level can be used to launch powerful bombs. ・Get the SNS going! 'Buzz gauge' system 　・The more likes and followers you have, the more buzz gauge you have. 　・When it reaches the maximum, 'Buzz Fever' will be activated for a short while. 　・When it reaches the maximum, 'Buzz Fever' is triggered for a short period of time. The number of likes you get is also greatly increased! ・'Stage select system' to move on to the next stage slowly... 　・When a stage is cleared, stages are released one after another, and the game can be resumed from the previous stage even after the game is over. ・Challenge your weakest point! 'Practice Mode' 　・In the practice mode, the starting point and parameters can be freely set. ・Three difficulty levels can be selected to match your skill level. If you show your skill, you can play in a more difficult mode. ・Traditional arcade-style 'Trial Mode' and 　 Extra modes such as 'Boss Rush,' in which players fight a series of bosses, are also included. ・When you fulfill the conditions, you can add illustrations to the gallery and earn achievements. 　・Will you be able to collect them all?

name: Delicious - Emily's Christmas Carol
about_the_game: Enjoy Delicious, the award-winning cooking story game series! In this wonderful Christmas tale, Emily plans a family trip to a cute little cottage for the holidays. Everybody embarks northbound on the Miracle Express, excited for an amazing adventure. However, they soon discover someone else is already living in their cottage... What are you waiting for? Bake a big batch of cookies, nog an egg, and settle in with a hot drink to warm up your Christmas spirit! ENJOY THE 14TH SEASON of Delicious RUN YOUR DINERS and serve food in a variety of kitchens in 61 story levels and 31 extra challenge levels DASH THROUGH 6 wonderful Christmas locations, and cook many dazzling dishes in exciting time management levels COLLECT DIAMONDS to invite the entire family to Paige's school play ENJOY HIDDEN OBJECT ELEMENTS and see if you can find all mice More Gamehouse Original Stories: Delicious - Emily's Message in a Bottle Delicious - Emily's Hopes and Fears Delicious - Emily's Home Sweet Home Delicious - Emily's New Beginning Fabulous - Angela's Fashion Fever Fabulous - Angela's Sweet Revenge Heart's Medicine - Time to Heal

name: Fireside
about_the_game: Fireside is an uplifting narrative experience about a journey and the breaks that follow it. Make friends, trade and chat at the campfire, weave connections, and explore a serene magic-filled world. Connect With Fellow Travellers Your friends could always use your help! Chat with the folks you meet, learn their stories and while traveling on, be on the lookout for what your friends could need! Collect And Trade On your journey, you’ll collect an array of supplies, trinkets, and other stuff you or your friends could use. Trade with others to get what you need for your next steps, and provide your allies with the means to carry on! Build Your Community Use the materials you find or trade to build and improve your home and invite your new pals to visit! Serene, Non-Violent Experience Fireside will never want you to harm anyone. So kick back, make a cup of warm tea, turn up Fireside’s tranquil ambiance, and enjoy the calm of NOW.

name: Tropical Resort Story
about_the_game: Develop a lush island full of nature and aim to be the no. 1 resort! Build accommodation for your guests and get those tourists coming! Make the environment even nicer and discover great travel packages to give visitors the best vacation possible. Develop the resort to make your guests' dreams come true! On this ocean island, the sparkling sea is a huge attraction of itself. There's a huge variety of incredible fish waiting to be discovered! Try improving water quality by placing marine plants and rocks in the ocean, and releasing fish you've caught while fishing - you may attract new fishy residents! Once your resort starts drawing in more tourists, business partners will come asking to open stores and restaurants on your island, and you may even help them create new products! Make sure your resort meets their expectations and you'll both benefit! Got a juice stand on your island? Why not place a bench next to it? Some things work even better together, becoming feature spots. Discover such winning combinations and watch visitors pour in! Turn your tropical island into a vacation paradise! Try searching for 'Kairosoft' to see all of our games!!

name: Iron Village
about_the_game: Build houses to give your villagers homes. Clear farm fields to grow a variety of crops, from basic staples to exotic magical ingredients. Open shops that turn raw resources into valuable goods. Construct warehouses to store your resources and goods. Take the resources and goods your villagers make and turn them into gold! Trade for other resources that your villagers need. Invest your gold to expand your village. Refuel trains that stop by on their long journeys. Keep the railway happy and pour in gold to improve it. Unlock new types of goods and resources. Create opportunities to grow into a prospering town!

name: PROJECT TACHYON
tags: Action,Shoot 'Em Up,Rogue-like,Combat,Action Roguelike,Hack and Slash,Bullet Hell,Sci-fi,Futuristic,Time Travel,Female Protagonist,Singleplayer,Rogue-lite,Robots,Cyberpunk,Multiple Endings,Choices Matter,Platformer,2D Platformer,Side Scroller
about_the_game: When the Tamageria Republic faces a crisis with the rebellion of Mainframe OMEGA, an artificial intelligence, they turn to their last resort: a nuclear attack to stop Mainframe OMEGA. Countless casualties occur in the aftermath, and Commander Elina secretly activates 'Project Tachyon' to avoid the danger of a nuclear winter. Sigma, an agent of Project Tachyon, studies the future and travels back in time to solve problems based on their observations. However, they discover a shocking truth during their mission... Dynamic combat action using melee and ranged weapons Engage in combat filled with extravagant action scenes as you wield an array of weapons in diverse situations. Use melee weapons to block the enemy's barrage and use ranged weapons to subdue them from a distance. Roguelite gameplay system Choose from over 200 powerful genes in 10 different categories and upgrade according to your preferences. Unlock powerful synergistic effects by gathering various types of enhancement genes. Watch out for malicious genes, a key element in this Roguelite that thrives on the blend of luck and skill. As you equip more enhancement genes, your chances of manifesting a malicious gene will increase. Be wary as you'll sustain harsh penalties if you fail to meet the requirements. Switch up your combat style with an array of weapons that can be randomly obtained at certain stages. Deal with your enemies strategically by adapting to each situation–use an electric saw that slices incoming bullets or an acid sprayer to weaken the enemy’s defense. Find an efficient route to navigate the map that varies every time you play. You can save your stamina to challenge the boss, or take on more risks for a greater payout. It is your choice. Experience unique battles by upgrading weapons Unlock and upgrade various weapons through quests. More weapons will appear by unlocking them before each stage begins. Modify your weapons and enhance by battle experience. Giant boss raid Giant mutants, the followers of the artificial intelligence Mainframe OMEGA, lie in wait to interrupt Sigma's advance. Unlike normal enemies, the Giant Boss uses a variety of gimmick patterns to threaten you. Upgrade your enhancement genes and collect various weapons to effectively combat the boss in any situation! Engaging narration through Roguelite Every character, including the protagonist, has a hidden past, trauma, and unique personality traits. Only Sigma, who has the ability to retain memories, can continuously travel through time to understand and forge deeper relationships with these characters and successfully complete the project. An intriguing story through time-traveling Travel through time and gather clues from the future, then return to the past to unravel the truth. Seemingly insignificant details overlooked in the past will deeply impact the future. Collect the clues amidst an ever-changing landscape to successfully complete your mission!

name: Monarchy
about_the_game: Unleash your strategic brilliance in this 2D side-scrolling strategy game, where you must build a base, manage resources, explore the mysterious forest and conquer your enemies. Building System Place down your buildings anywhere you want using a dynamic building system to create a vibrant base! Hunting Use your follower archer to hunt down wild animals in the forest and protect yourself from danger! Military Unified military system that once trained it follows you around and engages in combat automatically. Cave Exploration Explore the numerous caves throughout the forest to find treasures, enemies and unexpected surprises! Unique Experiences Bandit Land : The bandits are hiding in caves, and you must clear them out in a summer setting. The Siege : Build a mighty trebuchet and siege the enemy castle walls in this autumn setting where enemies come only from one direction. Winter Knight The harsh winter has many secrets waiting to be discovered, find them and survive them in this winter setting where enemies attack randomly from one side each night. Cart and Monolith Use the cart to bring coins or people every to balance your playthrough and use the power of the monolith to acquire unique upgrades each playthrough. Traps Purchase spears traps and place them down to protect your base from any enemies that pass through your main defense. Cooperative Play together with your friends and family and build amazing memories!

name: Ufouria: The Saga 2
about_the_game: Upyo! How's everyone been? SUNSOFT's Ufouria is back! - An authentic evolution of the original 'Ufouria'! Rampage through the fluffy feltwork arts-and-crafts recreation of the world of Ufouria, with your trusty crew from the original game in this exploration-based action side-scroller. Of course, newcomers to Ufouria are welcome too! - Adventure in the lovingly crafted wacky world of Ufouria! Familar characters and stages of the original game are back, transformed from their formal pixel art to charming handmade feltwork. Iron bead artwork also plays homage to the nostalgic pixelated look of the original. Look for all the similarities and differences if you've played the original before! - Different courses each time you play!? The various stages from the original game now change randomly every time your enter, making for a fresh new challenge each time! New characters joining your crew let you reach more areas. You might even find areas that weren't in the original game at all... - Popoons are now a super powerful cleaning agent! A new threat, one that wasn't in the original...the icky Bumyon makes an appearance! The troublesome Bumyon sticks to everything and everyone and is quite the annoyance, but somehow Hebe and crews can counteract them perfectly with their Popoons. Clean up the Bumyons that litter the planet and thwart the Utsujin's evil plans! Visit the never before seen Hebe's house! Meet rare characters that were only ever seen before in Ufouria art books! A Collection feature lets you read up on enemies and their backgrounds!
