about_the_game: Operation STEEL is a roguelike shoot-em-up rendered in hand-drawn art. Find and upgrade weapons while combatting the electronic legion across the galaxy! Game features: Procedurally generated levels with randomised enemy waves and pickups Branching paths - select from 20+ levels 25+ weird and wonderful bosses 35+ unique weapons and items to find Upgrade your ship between levels at the shop Boss Rush mode Online leaderboards Awesome soundtrack by the amazing Dolphin!

name: Midnight Special
tags: Early Access,Retro,Pixel Graphics,Survival Horror,Female Protagonist,Exploration,Psychological Horror,1980s,Point & Click,Dark,Horror,Singleplayer,2D,Atmospheric,Adventure,Story Rich,Indie,Alternate History,Text-Based,Hand-drawn
about_the_game: Inspiration from... The gory thrills of giallo, the suspense of slashers, and the otherworldly charm of 70s and 80s sci-fi. We're thrilled to bring you a chilling adventure that blends cinematic horror with the nostalgic vibes of '90s 16-bit games. How to Save the Game? After waking from the nightmare and answering the mysterious phone call, Sarah can unlock manual saving by interacting with the cigarette pack in the kitchen. How to use it: In your inventory, drag the cigarette onto the lighter to bring up the save menu. Midnight Special is a point-and-click survival horror experience that echoes the spirit of '90s classics like Clock Tower and Resident Evil. Set in the late '80s at Boyd Manor, you step into the shoes of Sarah, a babysitter tasked with watching over Jon and Ellie Boyd for the night. What begins as an ordinary evening takes a sinister turn. The power goes out, plunging the house into pitch-black darkness. With each step, reality twists into something far more disturbing. Bizarre phone calls, a deranged stalker perhaps? Unpleasant odors seeping up from the floorboards. Objects moving on their own as if possessed. A life-sized plastic dinosaur that seems... alive. Has Sarah lost her mind? Or has something far more sinister taken root? Classic Point-and-Click Survival Horror Explore a foreboding environment filled with chilling surprises, puzzles to solve, and secrets to uncover. A Tribute to Retro Horror Influenced by '70s and '80s horror cinema and '90s gaming, Midnight Special blends nostalgia with heart-pounding suspense. Atmospheric 16-Bit Graphics Gorgeous handcrafted visuals capture the eerie, cinematic tone in stunning pixel art. Psychological Thrills Question everything as reality twists and warps around you. Can you trust what you see? Immersive Audio Design An immersive, spine-tingling soundtrack and unnerving audio cues heighten the tension with every step you take. With its carefully woven narrative, Midnight Special invites players to step into a story of psychological terror and mystery . Every corner holds a secret, and every clue leads you deeper into a horrifying truth. If you're a fan of: Classic survival horror Point-and-click adventures Atmospheric mysteries that keep you guessing ...then Midnight Special is ready to pull you into the darkness. Do you dare enter the manor?

name: Small Spaces
about_the_game: About this game Hi, I’m Niklas – the developer of Small Spaces. My goal is to make a game that puts you into a creative flow without you even noticing. And a lot of the player feedback has been exactly that. So, if you’re looking for a relaxing game to take your mind off stressful thoughts, Small Spaces might be just the creative escape you were looking for :) What can you expect? Shape the space your way Turn the small spaces fully upside down with your creativity! Modular kitchens? Loft apartments? Find smart solutions and design unique spaces that are functional and beautiful. Add indirect lighting, plants and more to decorate and personalize your space down to the smallest detail. Inspired by real places On Early Access start, you’ll design in 3 different locations: New York – raw industrial factories and warehouses turned into gorgeous loft apartments with high ceilings and expansive windows. Berlin – historic apartments with the typical 1900 european charm and beautiful bay windows. Think vintage charm meets quiet elegance. Tokyo – mid-century inspired simplistic apartments with sliding doors and sometimes warm concrete wall finishes. Together, these offer 9 apartments , each with a distinct layout and creative feel. More locations and styles will be added throughout Early Access. Stories that guide Every space has its own objectives, story and people who live there – ranging from a student in a shared flat to a couple sharing their first apartment together. The objectives inspire to design spaces that are not only pretty, but also practical and give you just enough inspiration to get started while not restricting your creativity. Carefully crafted high quality assets The game already features more than 500 furniture and decor items inspired by different styles – including comfy scandinavian beds, unique modern japanese lamps and decoration items from a record player to sewing utensils. I truly care about original art and all of the beautiful illustrations in the game are hand drawn from an illustrator. Walk through your creations in first person Switch to a first-person view to experience your design from the inside – like someone who actually lives there and view your creations as the sunlight shifts from crisp morning to warm golden hour to cozy nighttime with the glow of the indirect lighting you set up. Unlock new content as you play You start out with just a portion of tools and furniture at your hand and unlock new content as you complete objectives. Get new materials from stone terrazzo to various wood types and unlock new tools to build loft apartments, modular kitchens or wall panels. The more you create, the more options you gain. I recommend buying this game if: You play life sims mostly for home design You like relaxing games that spark your creativity You’re a design lover or architecture nerd It might not be for you if: You want to design floor plans from scratch – we’re building a creative mode where you can build your own layouts, but as of now you furnish existing apartments. You’re expecting to import your own models or textures – that kind of freedom isn’t in the game (yet!)

name: Victor's Test Night
about_the_game: ゲームの概要 ※開発の過程で予定されていたストーリー要素がカットされました。購入の際はご注意下さい 美術品を収めた小さなギャラリーを警備するゲームです。 目標として指定された部屋をチェックし、帰ることで１日が終了します。 ５日間、警備を行います。各日付は難易度として機能しています。基本的には最大難易度である５日目が本来の難易度となります。 異状が発生している部屋は扉が別の世界に接続されており、法則をうまく利用しないとギャラリーから出ることは出来ません。 【実況・配信規約】 個人、法人問わずゲームプレイ動画の配信は歓迎ですが、以下のガイドラインを必ずご確認いただき、遵守してください。 ・動画や生配信のタイトルにゲーム名を含めてください。 ・概要欄などの視聴者がアクセスできる場所にストアページのURLを記載してください。 ・動画サイトが提供する機能による収益化(広告収益・投げ銭など)を許可します。 ・誹謗中傷を含む内容や、公序良俗に反する内容のゲームの実況・配信は禁止します。 ・ゲームの実況・配信を通じて発生した損害や問題に関して、727 NOT HOUNDは一切の責任を負いかねます。 ・本規約は予告なく変更される場合があり、変更後に行われた動画には変更後の規約が適用されます。 起動ファイルの場所にロゴのPNGファイルを置いてあります。配信、動画のサムネイルに使用する目的でのみ、ご利用いただけます。 それ以外の目的でのいかなる利用も禁じます。 誰も来ない島なんだ 地図に載っていないし、 妙な装置で 「人が認識できない」ようになってる 島はアイシャドウと呼ばれてる アイシャドウには建物が一つあるだけで 他には何もないらしい よほど重要な建物だと思うじゃないか？ 美術品を収めた倉庫なんだ 小さなギャラリーだな そしてこのギャラリーは、ずっと監視されている おかしいだろ？ 誰にも見えない島に、何十人も警備を連れてきて 血まなこで海を見張った上で 飾った絵や彫刻をずーーーっと監視してるんだ ギャラリーの警備は１人 その絵を眺めてるだけの警備員は、５日すると死ぬ ５日で「何かをしくじって」 死ぬんだそうだ

name: 迷禁 Lost in Abyss
about_the_game: ABOUT THE GAME You are Landon — trapped in a twisted and terrifying dream, wondering a mysterious old house. Warm memories and terrible realities are intertwined and tragedy unfolds as you explore, find clues and solve puzzles in this long-forgotten nightmare. MAIN FEATURES ◼ A rich environment with atmospheric music and SFX for horror immersion ◼ Puzzles and hidden clues with moderate difficulty ◼ Terrifying animations and events; including some gore ◼ High-quality Chinese VO for an authentic Chinese horror experience ◼ Fully localised subtitles, UI and voiceovers STORY FEATURE Delve deep into your own inner world, confront the horrible truth about the tragic deaths of Lilith and her family. Your goal is to uncover a hidden conspiracy; the blood and sin that’s fuelled the success of an infamous cult known as Saint Cohen. A cruel sacrifice awaits you; the chains of flesh are foretelling your fate. With no way out, do you accept the fate or fight against it? VR FEATURES ◼ Supports HTC VIVE, Oculus Quest, Valve Index ◼ Improved VR movement with six degrees of freedom (6DOF) ◼ Full locomotion with snap-turning rotation ◼ Packed with interactive items; pick up, discard, knock or destroy

name: Pecker
about_the_game: You are Pecker, a birdlike creature with a bendable beak. Poke into a wall, bend your beak and catapult yourself upwards! Using this technique you climb through numerous levels filled with puzzles and some enemies. Alone or with up to 3 friends (local splitscreen), climb, puzzle and overcome enemies. Climb. Explore. Collect. Lots of destructible stuff! Ready for a challenge? Discover the secrets of this medieval world in different biomes: floating islands, castles, forest, snow/ice, beach/desert & more to come.

name: Novice Dungeon Master
tags: Simulation,Strategy,Management,Pixel Graphics,2D,Singleplayer,Multiple Endings,Top-Down,Turn-Based Strategy,Turn-Based Tactics,Early Access,Indie,Tactical,PvE,Fantasy,Medieval,Retro,Old School
about_the_game: Novice Dungeon Master is a turn-based strategy simulation management game. It's a game where the protagonist, who used to explore beginner dungeons, becomes the master of a dungeon due to a contract and manages the dungeon for 30 days, set in a fantasy world with dungeons, adventures, monsters, and guilds. Various types of adventurers visit the dungeon. And they visit the dungeon for different purposes. Herbs and minerals, battles and treasures, dreams and hopes... Anything is possible in the dungeon. So how do you send them back? There are various methods. For example, you can place facilities they desire... Or set up traps... Or you can place monsters. If they are satisfied in the dungeon, word will spread and the dungeon's popularity will increase, which means more adventurers will come! If they face danger in the dungeon, word will get out that the dungeon is dangerous, but that also becomes a reason for adventurers to visit. However, if they fail to obtain what they want, they will leave disappointed. This will directly lead to a decline in the dungeon's popularity. You must try to prevent this from happening. Because according to the contract, you must defend the dungeon while also increasing its rank! No matter what method you use, just grow and defend the dungeon! If you safely complete the 30-day contract... An ending based on your actions will await you! Head into the dungeon to find out what ending awaits you!

name: Weirdo
tags: Choose Your Own Adventure,Interactive Fiction,Visual Novel,Dating Sim,2D,Comic Book,First-Person,Noir,Text-Based,Horror,Lore-Rich,Psychological Horror,Surreal,Dark Humor,Romance,Choices Matter,Controller,Conversation,Narration,Nonlinear
about_the_game: Parallel-Weirdo is a black-and-white manga-style visual novel game set in a high school, adapted from the manga series Parallel(诡闻斋）. The story takes place at Di Yingling High School, where the protagonist, Wang Zhe, is a boy with great ambitions but ordinary looks and a troubled family background. He earned a spot at this elite school with his excellent grades, determined to complete his 'grand' research project. However, surrounded by talented peers and dazzling girls, can he maintain his composure? How will he choose between love and career, or can he have both? Can this bookworm stand out in the fierce competition? Through your choices, help him achieve a 'nobody's rise'! Players who have experienced the previous two games will recognize some familiar faces since everyone is in the same school. Includes 4 major chapters, each with interesting story developments and challenges. Over 100,000 words of rich script, providing a deep story experience. 4-8 hours of single playthrough, ideal for immersive short-term gameplay. More than 20 main characters, each with unique personalities and backstories. Multiple girls to pursue, each with different story routes and endings. 4 main endings and 2 hidden endings, offering diverse game experiences. Over 100 choices, each affecting the story's development and ending. More than 400 exquisite manga panels, enhance visual enjoyment. 12 BGM tracks, including 6 new compositions, enhancing the game's atmosphere. Compared to most visual novel games, the Parallel series extensively uses manga panels to carry the narrative instead of relying on narration and descriptive text. By perfectly integrating the essence of manga with traditional visual novel games, it provides players with a stronger visual experience and complete immersion in the exciting story. Each choice in the game brings different branches and butterfly effects, allowing players to enjoy the fun of personally advancing the story. We believe that this unique approach makes the integration of game and manga narrative more appealing, providing players with a brand-new gaming experience. CASCHA GAMES is composed of Cascha and Joey (the author of the Parallel (诡闻斋）manga series). We hope to present bizarre yet realistic stories that could happen around us from an objective and rational perspective, leaving it to the players to make their own judgments. As a niche game type, we sincerely look forward to more players who love the Parallel-Weirdo series joining our community (QQ group and DISCORD channel), helping us continuously improve and develop this series. We will actively listen to your opinions and suggestions and interact with you. May our joint efforts make the Parallel series a modern classic like “Strange Tales of Liaozhai”. We also hope to have volunteer players help us proofread more localized translations in languages such as Japanese, Korean, English, and others, allowing players from more regions to experience the charm of the Parallel series.

name: Hell Road VR
tags: Shooter,Arcade,Motorbike,Zombies,VR,FPS,First-Person,Action,Arena Shooter,Shoot 'Em Up,Driving,Bikes,Post-apocalyptic,Gun Customization,3D,Vehicular Combat,Procedural Generation,Singleplayer,Immersive Sim,Simulation
about_the_game: HELL ROAD VR POST-APOCALYPTIC WORLD An unknown event caused the apocalypse. You receive a mysterious radio transmission from a woman asking for help. Ready to risk your life, you grab your revolver, get on your bike and go for a VR RoadTrip through a post-apocalyptic world teeming with all kinds of zombies. KILL ZOMBIES Turn your motorcycle into a beast made for mass slaughter and equip yourself with an arsenal of varied weapons to make your way through the hordes of enemies that will cross your path! Throughout your experience, you will face increasingly intense challenges with Irene as your sole objective. UNLOCK NEW WEAPONS & UPGRADE THEM 8 unique weapons : 9mm pistol, revolver, SMG, spear, crossbow, grenade launcher, shotgun, zombie shredder. Upgrade your weapons, motorbike and character. Boost your speed, damage and accuracy to slaughter more and more zombies. WELCOME TO HELL A story mode with 7 levels with unique environments. 5 different types of zombies to discover that will test your shooting skills as well as your driving skills. Take up the challenge of the wave shooting mode and use your double gun to face the hordes of enemies coming towards you. Test your endurance in Survival mode and try to survive as long as possible in an infinite level using procedural generation . Your score is automatically added to the leaderboard . Will you be able to beat the High Score ? THREE DIFFERENT WAYS TO STEER YOUR BIKE By tilting your head. By grabbing the handlebars. Using the joystick on your controller. FOUR MODES OF DIFFICULTY Casual Normal Hardcore Real Hell Road

name: 🔴 Circles
about_the_game: Circles is a unique, intuitive puzzle game where everything responds to your mouse. It presents itself without any text and asks you to experiment. By simply moving the cursor, you’ll uncover the underlying rules of each circle. According to the movements you make, they grow, shrink or move around the screen. Experiment and find your way to the end point to complete each level. Content • 90 levels + extra challenges • 4 unique modes for replayability Features • Unique and intuitive gameplay • Does not contain a single word • Based completely on mouse movement • Atmospheric and interactive music • Lots and lots of circles

name: Poltergeist Watcher
about_the_game: The unique spot the difference game Poltergeist Watcher blends elements of hidden object, mindfulness puzzles, and psychological horror genres. It will evoke tension and fear in the most unconventional settings for these genres. Inspired by cult paranormal films, this game will immerse you in the ominous atmosphere of an ancient mansion consumed by poltergeist activity. To survive, you'll need keen observation, a good memory, and unwavering willpower, because ghost will do everything to scare who are watching him.

name: DEBUG DEADLINE
about_the_game: 《Debug DeadLine》 This is a first-person horror comedy game set in a Japanese debugging company. The player takes on the role of a part-time worker at a debugging company, tasked with testing a horror game brimming with terrifying elements. When you encounter suspicious objects or systems that don’t seem to belong in a horror game, report them as bugs immediately! Your intuition, powers of observation, and gaming sense will be the keys to uncovering hidden bugs! 《Story》 The protagonist is hired as a debugging staff member for a game company called 'Dokidoki Games.' Their assignment? Testing a horror game set for release! What awaits them is an overwhelming storm of bugs beyond imagination! Somehow, elements from other games have found their way into the testing stages, creating a chaotic atmosphere! With just one week on the clock, can the protagonist safely track down all the bugs? The debug work that will determine their fate starts now! 《Playtime》 Collecting all endings (multiple endings): Approximately 1 to 2 hours 《Voice Actor》 ■Player・Other Ve ■Takahashi Atusaki Yuma ■Sugimachi Setsugecka ■Yoko Kojyo Rin ■Secret Yurihara Kakuyu NasuAkio Suzuki Saya Sendo Tomori 《Streaming Guidelines》 Permission for Streaming : This game can be streamed freely by both individuals and organizations, without the need for prior permission. Monetization : Monetization through gameplay videos and streaming is allowed. Game Title and Description : Including the game title in your video or stream title would make the developer happy! If you’re willing, please also add the following information in your description: Debug DeadLine Steam Store URL We wholeheartedly support all your wonderful activities!

name: Squiggle Drop
about_the_game: Use your creativity and imagination to solve charming physics puzzles by drawing a single shape and watching what unfolds! Complete the objectives of 250 puzzles (with more on the way), each with multiple and often surprising solutions. How you draw your solution is up to you! Solve puzzles and earn rewards to build your very own Squiggletown! Unlock buildings, cosmetics and various upgrades as you expand your own personal city. Squiggle Drop Features: Over 250 levels Regular Content Updates Daily Challenges Challenging your friends to beat your scores Leaderboards and Achievements

name: Dungeon of Erotic Master Plus
about_the_game: They're back! The girls hailed as the Erotic Masters after solving the mystery behind the world's toughest dungeon are now living legends! But behind the accolades and fame, they blew all their money and ended up deep in debt. Sometime later, after they finally paid off their debts, a blacksmith's daughter named Hermetia came to visit them. She had been randomly selected to be allowed to explore a newly discovered dungeon, but it was too difficult for a novice. That's when she came to the DunEro Masters with a proposal: Will they explore the dungeon with her? Explore the dungeons and acquire maps with these beautiful warriors. Grow stronger in battle alongside all-new girls. Gain lots of experience and face powerful enemies! It's time to set off on your adventure! She grew up without a mother and sees her entire village as her family. Her master, Morissimo, is over 60 years old while the village chief San is even older. Although Martina's lifespan is longer than a normal human, she refuses to discuss her age. The Fire Tribe seemingly has a few secrets, and those will be uncovered throughout this story. After finding what looks like a bike helmet with a symbol in an ancient ruin, she has spent every day attaching armor to it and enhancing it in the smith. Her muscles and stamina make her as powerful an attacker as Donelia and a reliable ally in battle. This rumor started spreading after she got into a fight with a mercenary and won one day. She was discovered by King Morgaia and joined the Royal Knights, but she has since left them and now spends her days as a dungeon-crawling adventurer. She has a twin sister. While traveling in search of information about their birth and why they were orphaned, they passed through the Magical Kingdom of Tychlluina where her sister became one of the Royal Mages. During that time, she gained a certain degree of cultural knowledge as well as an improved salary, but the darkness in her heart remained. One day, Mercenary King Morgaia sent two powerful but inexperienced Royal Knights to fight Donelia, but she defeated them. That's how the Mercenary King came to ask Donelia to join the knights. This is a pseudo-3D dungeon/animation RPG. Fun even for players who struggle with dungeon crawlers. The automap and mini-map are displayed at all times. Estimated clear time: 12 hours Playable using a game pad. *Before purchasing this product, we highly recommend that you play the demo [Japanese only] to check if the game works properly on your computer in your region. *Rushimarudo is the licensor of this game. For inquiries about the product, please contact Tensei Games.

name: Frontline: World War II
tags: Turn-Based Tactics,Turn-Based Strategy,World War II,Turn-Based Combat,Strategy,Atmospheric,Tabletop,Wargame,Military,Board Game,Grand Strategy,Education,Sandbox,2.5D,War,Old School,Simulation,Naval Combat,Strategy RPG,Action
about_the_game: With its immersive gameplay and historically accurate setting, 'Frontline: World War II' offers players the opportunity to experience the challenges and triumphs of commanding the Allied forces during the Second World War. Take on the role of a strategic leader as you guide your troops through iconic battles across Europe, Africa, and the Pacific. Test your tactical skills in 23 intense Campaign missions / 20 dynamic Scenarios. Each mission presents unique challenges and objectives, requiring careful planning and execution. Choose your targets wisely, anticipate enemy movements, and coordinate your squads effectively to gain the upper hand. FEATURES: ✔23 Historical inspired missions ✔22 Hard Scenarios where you will face against the full force of the enemy but also get to recruit your custom army ✔30xUnit specializations [Perks] ✔Level up & active abilities for every unit ✔Massive weapon arsenal: 200+ unique units ✔More 12 hours of music & background radio shows ✔Reinforcements & supply ✔Multiple objectives ✔Zoom controls ✔HD graphics ✔Intuitive interface ✔All DLC's are free ✔Lean learning curve ✔Light Turn limit Success in 'Frontline: World War II' relies on a deep understanding of enemy tactics. Study your opponents' strategies, learn from their weaknesses, and adapt your own approach accordingly. Utilize the Special abilities at your disposal to gain tactical advantages and turn the tide of battle in your favor. In this captivating game, your progression through the campaign will grant you access to a multitude of new, exciting units. These units will adapt and enhance their capabilities as they gain experience, providing you with invaluable abilities on the battlefield. From the subtle tactics of Camouflage and Sabotage to the strategic advantages of Entrenchment and Over-watch, every skill can play a crucial role in your success. Prepare to utilize Smoke-screens and AT grenades to gain the upper hand, or rain down destruction with an Artillery barrage. Transport units will prove essential for maneuvering across treacherous terrain. Engage in lightning-fast combat with APCR rounds, or master the art of Armor Suppression to disable even the most formidable adversaries. Watch as the tide of battle shifts with Routed units and Infantry Charges, and rely on the precision of sharp-shooters to turn the tables. Employ the cunning strategies of encirclement and flanking to outmaneuver your opponents, while deflections, penetration, and critical hits add an extra layer of realism to the ever-changing battlefield. Not solely determined by brute force, but also by your strategic prowess and adaptability. You will need to plan your moves, considering the strengths and weaknesses of your units and the terrain they traverse. By studying historical battles and employing clever tactics, you can turn the tide of war in your favor. As a solo developer, I am always open to feedback and suggestions from players. Your input is invaluable to me, and I strive to create the best possible gaming experience. If you are a player of Turn-based Strategy & tactics Hex-grid WW2 Wargames, this game might be for you! Cheers!

about_the_game: This is a medieval fantasy game with coin pusher as its core gameplay, blending slot machine -like randomness with rogue-like card mechanics. In a medieval age shrouded in darkness, you are the last hope of the territory: a lord bearing heavy responsibilities. As night falls, deadly monsters emerge from the shadows, threatening the lives of the villagers. To lead everyone to survival, you decide... to take your talents... to the coin pusher ! That's right, a [Coin Pusher] imbued with magical powers and featuring exciting, varied gameplay. Adventurers, magic, war beasts, and wondrous buildings are randomly drawn onto the board. Different cards trigger varied chain reactions. From novice swordsmen to dragon-slaying heroes, from humble villages to wonderous constructions, from a lone man and his dog to a united force. Use the coin pusher to summon heroes, forge weapons, build your home, unleash devastating chain damage, and overcome formidable foes. Furthermore, we offer engaging and deep card deck-building. For a card game with randomness, the playability and strategic depth of deck-building are paramount. We provide 6 different lords with unique starting traits, over 150 cards, and more than 60 hero cards with diverse effects . You can form adventurer squads, let Hunters lead beast packs, have Mages unleash chain spells, let Thieves pilfer enemy treasures, or have Priests baptize children to expand the village. Alternatively, go crazy raising chickens on the farm, plant infinite trees to become the Forest Guardian, become an Alchemist to boost farm yields, or mine resources to become a Mining Tycoon. Rich card combinations paired with diverse hero enhancements allow you to explore your own unique builds. Every game offers a different experience. Focus on the Coin Pusher, striving to uncover even more fun ways to play it. While learning from great games is part of gameplay design, our own unique perspective is essential. As a game centered around the [Coin Pusher], we strive to keep all focus within the pusher. There's no complex meta-progression. You can start a match anytime, without burden. Thank you for playing our game! We are a very inexperienced team of three. Every player who clicks on this page is our most precious and cherished friend. Allow us to sincerely express our gratitude to you. We will continuously update and maintain this game. According to our update plan, we will add more lords, cards, and hero gameplay in the future. We will also constantly optimize game balance and experience. If you have any thoughts or suggestions about the game, please contact us via the following methods: Email: StarSeekerGameStudio@hotmail.com Thank you again for playing our game!

name: Sudoku Killer / 杀手数独
about_the_game: Sudoku (数独 sūdoku, digit-single) - is a logic-based, combinatorial number-placement puzzle. The objective is to fill a 9×9 grid with digits so that each column, each row, and each of the nine 3×3 subgrids that compose the grid (also called 'boxes', 'blocks', or 'regions') contains all of the digits from 1 to 9. Killer Sudoku puzzles include all the rules of regular Sudoku but add in dashed-line 'cages' which must sum to given values. Killer Sudoku is also sometimes known as Sumdoku, Mathdoku or Addoku. The name 'Killer' Sudoku arises because of the wicked twist on the standard Sudoku puzzle, since you must not only place each of the numbers 1 to 9 (or 1 to the size of the puzzle) into each of the rows, columns and bold-lined 3x3 (or other size) boxes but you must also place the numbers into each dashed-line cage so that they add up to its given total - and without repeating a digit in a dashed-line cage. © 100 killer Sudoku Killer puzzles Level's progress save Beautiful minimalist design, multiple color themes 10 ambient relaxing soundtracks Steam Achievements Trading Cards, Badge, Emoticons and Backgrounds (Coming soon) Cross-platform Steam Cloud saves As always - Windows, Mac and Linux support
